descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
L'opportunità di unire un team altamente performante in cui la vostra esperienza fa davvero un impatto. Come nostro Process Technician – Implantation, sarete responsabili per il funzionamento, il monitoraggio e il mantenimento di processi avanzati di impianto ionico utilizzati nei processi di produzione dei semiconduttori. Questa è la vostra opportunità per modellare le decisioni tecniche, contribuire a strategie di utensili a lungo termine, e guidare miglioramenti significativi nella stabilità, uptime e le prestazioni di processo. Sei qualcuno che prende la proprietà, prospera in un ambiente frenetico e gode di un impatto reale? Allora applica oggi!

Come farai ad avere un impatto
- Supporto di produzione per l'area designata
- Analizzare e prendere decisioni su come rilasciare lotti di produzione (Lots on hold)
- Esegui il processo di top-up post macchina aborti
- Operare e monitorare gli impianti ioni, assicurando che i parametri siano impostati correttamente e i wafer vengono elaborati secondo le ricette
- Condurre controlli di controllo della qualità del processo, inclusi controlli visivi e registrazione dei dati, per garantire l'integrità del prodotto
- Documentare e mantenere aggiornate tutte le istruzioni di lavoro per la produzione personale così come eseguire allenamenti e mantenere tutta la documentazione di certificazione di formazione aggiornata per la produzione personale
- Collaborare con team di progettazione e produzione per ottimizzare i processi, migliorare i rendimenti e risolvere i problemi di produzione
- Partecipare a iniziative di miglioramento continuo, suggerendo e implementando miglioramenti per la produzione e i processi

Il tuo sfondo
- Laurea in scienze / processi produttivi
- 2+ anni di esperienza che lavorano come tecnico di processo in un ambiente di produzione di semiconduttori, in particolare con l'impianto ionico
- Forte comprensione dei processi di fisica e fabbricazione dei dispositivi semiconduttori
- Esperienza con vari strumenti di metrologia utilizzati per le misurazioni in processo
- Capacità di leggere e interpretare manuali tecnici
- Proficiente nell'utilizzo di apparecchiature controllate dal computer e software di registrazione dati
- fluente tedesco, capacità di comunicare e leggere l'inglese
- Capacità di lavorare in un ambiente pulito e seguire rigidi protocolli di pulizia

Ulteriori informazioni su di noi
Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity to join a high performing team where your expertise truly makes an impact. As our Process Technician – Implantation, you will be responsible for operating, monitoring, and maintaining advanced ion implantation processes used in semiconductor manufacturing processes. This is your opportunity to shape technical decisions, contribute to long term tool strategies, and drive meaningful improvements in stability, uptime, and process performance. Are you someone who takes ownership, thrives in a fast-paced environment, and enjoys making a real impact? Then apply today!

## How you'll make an impact
- Production support for the designated area
- Analyze and make decisions on how to release production lots (Lots on hold)
- Perform process top-up post machine aborts
- Operate and monitor ion implanters, ensuring parameters are set correctly and wafers are processed according to recipes
- Conduct in-process quality control checks, including visual inspections and data logging, to ensure product integrity
- Document and keep up-to-date all work instructions for the production personal as well as perform trainings and maintain all the training certification documentation up-to-date for the production personal
- Collaborate with engineering and manufacturing teams to optimize processes, improve yields, and resolve production issues
- Participate in continuous improvement initiatives, suggesting and implementing enhancements for production and processes

## Your background
- Associate's degree in science / production processes
- 2+ years of experience working as a process technician in a semiconductor manufacturing environment, specifically with ion implantation equipment
- Strong understanding of semiconductor device physics and fabrication processes
- Experience with various metrology tools used for in-process measurements
- Ability to read and interpret technical manuals
- Proficient in using computer-controlled equipment and data logging software
- German fluent, ability to communicate and read English
- Ability to work in a cleanroom environment and follow strict cleanroom protocols

## More about us
Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung
Die Möglichkeit, sich einem hochleistungsfähigen Team anzuschließen, wo Ihr Know-how wirklich einen Einfluss hat. Als Process Technician – Implantation sind Sie für den Betrieb, die Überwachung und die Aufrechterhaltung fortschrittlicher Ionenimplantationsprozesse verantwortlich, die in Halbleiterherstellungsprozessen eingesetzt werden. Dies ist Ihre Chance, technische Entscheidungen zu formen, zu langfristigen Werkzeugstrategien beizutragen und sinnvolle Verbesserungen in der Stabilität, der Standzeit und der Prozessleistung zu erreichen. Sind Sie jemand, der Eigentum nimmt, in einer schnelllebigen Umgebung gedeiht und genießt eine echte Wirkung? Dann bewerben Sie sich heute!

Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben
- Produktionsunterstützung für die ausgewiesene Fläche
- Analysieren und Entscheidungen über die Freigabe von Produktions Losen (Lots on hold)
- Prozess Top-up Post Maschine abbrechen
- Betrieb und Überwachung von Ionenimplantatoren, die sicherstellen, dass die Parameter korrekt eingestellt werden und Wafer nach Rezepten verarbeitet werden
- Durchführung von Qualitätskontrollprüfungen im Prozess, einschließlich visueller Inspektionen und Datenerfassung, um die Integrität der Produkte zu gewährleisten
- Dokumentieren und halten Sie alle Arbeitsanleitungen für die Produktion persönlich und führen Sie Schulungen durch und halten Sie alle Schulungs-Zertifizierungsdokumente aktuell für die Produktion persönlich
- Mit Ingenieur- und Fertigungsteams zusammenarbeiten, um Prozesse zu optimieren, Erträge zu verbessern und Produktionsprobleme zu lösen
- Beteiligen Sie sich an kontinuierlichen Verbesserungsinitiativen, die Andeutung und Umsetzung von Verbesserungen für Produktion und Prozesse

Ihr Hintergrund
- Studium der Wissenschaft / Produktion
- 2+ Jahre Erfahrung als Prozesstechniker in einer Halbleiterbauumgebung, speziell mit Ionenimplantationsanlagen
- Starkes Verständnis von Halbleiterbauelementen Physik und Fertigungsprozessen
- Erfahrung mit verschiedenen Messtechnik-Werkzeugen für Prozessmessungen
- Fähigkeit, technische Handbücher zu lesen und zu interpretieren
- Mit computergesteuerter Geräte- und Datenerfassungssoftware kompetent
- Deutsch fließend, Fähigkeit, Englisch zu kommunizieren und zu lesen
- Fähigkeit, in einer Reinraumumgebung zu arbeiten und strengen Reinraumprotokollen zu folgen

Mehr über uns
Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
L'occasion de rejoindre une équipe de haut niveau où votre expertise fait vraiment un impact. En tant que technicien en procédés – Implantation, vous serez responsable de l'exploitation, de la surveillance et du maintien des procédés avancés d'implantation d'ions utilisés dans les procédés de fabrication de semi-conducteurs. C'est l'occasion pour vous d'élaborer des décisions techniques, de contribuer à des stratégies d'outils à long terme et d'apporter des améliorations significatives à la stabilité, à la disponibilité et au rendement des processus. Êtes-vous quelqu'un qui prend possession, prospère dans un environnement rapide, et aime faire un impact réel? Alors appliquez aujourd'hui !

Comment vous ferez un impact
- Appui à la production de la zone désignée
- Analyser et prendre des décisions sur la façon de libérer les lots de production (Lots en attente)
- Effectuer des avortations de post-machine
- Opérer et surveiller les implants ioniques, s'assurer que les paramètres sont correctement définis et que les plaquettes sont traitées selon les recettes
- Effectuer des contrôles de qualité en cours de fabrication, y compris des inspections visuelles et l'enregistrement des données, pour assurer l'intégrité du produit
- Documenter et tenir à jour toutes les instructions de travail pour la production personnelle ainsi que les formations et tenir à jour tous les documents de certification de formation pour la production personnelle
- Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie et de fabrication pour optimiser les processus, améliorer les rendements et résoudre les problèmes de production
- Participer à des initiatives d'amélioration continue, proposer et mettre en œuvre des améliorations pour la production et les procédés

Vos antécédents
- Diplôme d'associé en sciences / procédés de production
- 2+ ans d'expérience en tant que technicien de process dans un environnement de fabrication de semi-conducteurs, en particulier avec des équipements d'implantation ionique
- Une bonne compréhension de la physique des dispositifs semi-conducteurs et des procédés de fabrication
- Expérience des divers outils de métrologie utilisés pour les mesures en cours de fabrication
- Capacité de lire et d'interpréter les manuels techniques
- Compétence dans l'utilisation d'équipements contrôlés par ordinateur et de logiciels d'enregistrement de données
- Allemand couramment, capacité de communiquer et de lire l'anglais
- Capacité de travailler dans un environnement propre et de suivre des protocoles stricts de salle propre

Plus sur nous
Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et professionnelle tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Internship in Computational Chemistry 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity The design of high voltage (HV) devices, such as gas circuit breakers (CB) and gas insulated switchgear (GIS), requires – among others –simulations and experiments for verification of insulation and switching performance. Additionally, the research activities in the area of gas circuit breakers are enhanced by various computer-aided-engineering tools. We are looking for an intern student with expertise in computational chemistry to contribute to the development of novel insulating materials for high-voltage power grid applications. The superior goal is the achievement of high-end quality of the product. The duration of the internship is 6 to 12 months. How you'll make an impact Contribute to technology development and research activities focusing on material analysis and characterization Support simulations of gas insulation systems using state of the art computational chemistry packages Study the relationship between microstructure and material characteristics and document findings and present test results to the team Your background B.Sc. degree in Material Science, Chemistry, Physics or similar discipline with focus on computer-aided methods Programming skills and experience in computational chemistry is an advantage Fluency in written and spoken English Team player and well organized Creative and able to work autonomously Laboratory and experimental experience is a plus More about us We are a technology‑driven company with a strong focus on innovation, continuous improvement, and sustainable manufacturing. We offer flexible working conditions, dedicated mentorship, and a supportive, inclusive environment where you can grow personally and professionally – empowering you to thrive while balancing life and work.

jobs.title: SAP Business Unit Lead Service
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy is searching for an expert SAP Business Analyst who can bridge business needs and technology by driving end-to-end ERP solutions. This role involves analyzing requirements, defining scope, and translating complex business processes into SAP module specifications, while recommending improvements that enhance efficiency and performance. As a recognized subject matter expert, you'll shape operational plans, influence leadership, and lead the development of innovative processes and standards that deliver measurable impact. Strong communication skills and the ability to align stakeholders with strategic objectives are essential for success. How you'll make an impact Establish governance and organizational frameworks to ensure clear roles, responsibilities, and decision-making aligned with global strategies. Provide strategic oversight for global programs , ensuring adherence to standardized processes and full adoption of core systems. Gather and analyze business requirements , synthesizing input from stakeholders to align with business goals. Manage BU demand funnel toward SAP CoE in line with business archetype. Lead process harmonization and continuous improvement , eliminating template deviations and promoting best practices across regions. Monitor business process performance through key metrics, data analysis, and benchmarking against industry standards. Drive data governance and management , ensuring accuracy, consistency, and security across HUBs and systems. Assess and address training needs , delivering resources and sessions to enhance team competencies and performance. Champion change management initiatives , promoting global process adoption, minimizing local customizations, and securing stakeholder buy-in. Identify and mitigate risks related to system implementations and process changes, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements. Lead and develop global teams , fostering accountability, collaboration, and professional growth through coaching and performance management. Collaborate on budget and demand planning , share best practices, and maintain regular communication with BU management. Your background Degree in Information Technology, Engineering, Business Administration, or related field. Minimum of 10 years of progressive experience in manufacturing, operations management, or related roles, with a proven track record of leading cross-functional teams and managing global projects. Strong leadership and change management skills, with the ability to influence and motivate global teams and stakeholders. In-depth knowledge of manufacturing, sales, logistics, service processes, systems, and process improvement methodologies (Lean, Six Sigma). Excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills, capable of effectively conveying complex concepts and securing buy-in at all organizational levels. Analytical mindset with the ability to leverage data for performance monitoring, decision-making, and continuous improvement initiatives.

titleByLocale.it: Servizio Lead delle Unità di Business SAP
titleByLocale.fr: Service chef de file de l'unité opérationnelle SAP

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
L'opportunità Hitachi Energy è alla ricerca di un esperto SAP Business Analyst che può colmare le esigenze aziendali e la tecnologia guidando soluzioni ERP end-to-end. Questo ruolo consiste nell'analisi dei requisiti, nella definizione del campo di applicazione e nella traduzione di complessi processi aziendali nelle specifiche del modulo SAP, raccomandando al contempo miglioramenti che migliorano l'efficienza e le prestazioni. Come esperto di materia riconosciuta, formerai piani operativi, influenzerai la leadership e guiderai lo sviluppo di processi e standard innovativi che offrono un impatto misurabile. Le forti capacità di comunicazione e la capacità di allineare gli stakeholder con obiettivi strategici sono essenziali per il successo.

Condividi su Twitter
- Stabilire strutture di governance e organizzazione per garantire ruoli chiari, responsabilità e processi decisionali allineati alle strategie globali.
- Fornire una supervisione strategica per i programmi globali, assicurando l'adesione a processi standardizzati e l'adozione completa di sistemi core.
- Raccogliere e analizzare i requisiti aziendali, sintetizzare gli input da parte degli stakeholder per allineare con gli obiettivi aziendali.
- Gestisci l'imbuto della domanda BU verso SAP CoE in linea con l'archetipo aziendale.
- Armonizzazione del processo di piombo e miglioramento continuo, eliminando deviazioni dei modelli e promuovendo le migliori pratiche in tutte le regioni.
- Monitorare le prestazioni del processo aziendale attraverso metriche chiave, analisi dei dati e benchmarking rispetto agli standard del settore.
- Guidare la governance e la gestione dei dati, garantendo precisione, coerenza e sicurezza attraverso HUB e sistemi.
- Valutare e affrontare le esigenze di formazione, fornire risorse e sessioni per migliorare le competenze e le prestazioni del team.
- Iniziative di gestione del cambiamento del campione, promozione dell'adozione del processo globale, minimizzazione delle personalizzazione locali, e garantire il buy-in degli stakeholder.
- Identificare e mitigare i rischi relativi alle implementazioni del sistema e alle modifiche dei processi, garantendo la conformità ai requisiti normativi.
- Guidare e sviluppare team globali, promuovere la responsabilità, la collaborazione e la crescita professionale attraverso coaching e la gestione delle prestazioni.
- Collaborare sulla pianificazione del budget e della domanda, condividere le migliori pratiche e mantenere la comunicazione regolare con la gestione BU.

Requisiti
- Laurea in Informatica, Ingegneria, Business Administration o campo relativo.
- Minimo di 10 anni di esperienza progressiva nella produzione, nella gestione delle operazioni o in ruoli correlati, con una comprovata traccia dei principali team interfunzionali e la gestione di progetti globali.
- Forte leadership e capacità di gestione dei cambiamenti, con la capacità di influenzare e motivare team e stakeholder globali.
- Conoscenza approfondita delle metodologie di produzione, vendita, logistica, servizi, sistemi e miglioramento dei processi (Lean, Six Sigma).
- Eccellente capacità di comunicazione e coinvolgimento degli stakeholder, in grado di trasmettere efficacemente concetti complessi e garantire buy-in a tutti i livelli organizzativi.
- Mindset analitico con la capacità di sfruttare i dati per il monitoraggio delle prestazioni, il processo decisionale e le iniziative di miglioramento continuo.

Cosa?
- Opportunità di crescita professionale e personale.
- Ambiente di lavoro stimolante e collaborativo.
- Benefici competitività e vantaggious.

Contatto
- [Inserisci qui i di contatto, come email o numero di telefono]
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity Hitachi Energy is searching for an expert SAP Business Analyst who can bridge business needs and technology by driving end-to-end ERP solutions. This role involves analyzing requirements, defining scope, and translating complex business processes into SAP module specifications, while recommending improvements that enhance efficiency and performance. As a recognized subject matter expert, you'll shape operational plans, influence leadership, and lead the development of innovative processes and standards that deliver measurable impact. Strong communication skills and the ability to align stakeholders with strategic objectives are essential for success.

## Come farai un impatto
- Establish governance and organizational frameworks to ensure clear roles, responsibilities, and decision-making aligned with global strategies.
- Provide strategic oversight for global programs, ensuring adherence to standardized processes and full adoption of core systems.
- Gather and analyze business requirements, synthesizing input from stakeholders to align with business goals.
- Manage BU demand funnel toward SAP CoE in line with business archetype.
- Lead process harmonization and continuous improvement, eliminating template deviations and promoting best practices across regions.
- Monitor business process performance through key metrics, data analysis, and benchmarking against industry standards.
- Drive data governance and management, ensuring accuracy, consistency, and security across HUBs and systems.
- Assess and address training needs, delivering resources and sessions to enhance team competencies and performance.
- Champion change management initiatives, promoting global process adoption, minimizing local customizations, and securing stakeholder buy-in.
- Identify and mitigate risks related to system implementations and process changes, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements.
- Lead and develop global teams, fostering accountability, collaboration, and professional growth through coaching and performance management.
- Collaborate on budget and demand planning, share best practices, and maintain regular communication with BU management.

## Requisiti
- Degree in Information Technology, Engineering, Business Administration, or related field.
- Minimum of 10 years of progressive experience in manufacturing, operations management, or related roles, with a proven track record of leading cross-functional teams and managing global projects.
- Strong leadership and change management skills, with the ability to influence and motivate global teams and stakeholders.
- In-depth knowledge of manufacturing, sales, logistics, service processes, systems, and process improvement methodologies (Lean, Six Sigma).
- Excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills, capable of effectively conveying complex concepts and securing buy-in at all organizational levels.
- Analytical mindset with the ability to leverage data for performance monitoring, decision-making, and continuous improvement initiatives.

## Cosa offriamo
- Opportunità di crescita professionale e personale.
- Ambiente di lavoro stimolante e collaborativo.
- Benefici competitivi e vantaggious.

## Contatto
- [Inserisci qui i dettagli di contatto, come email o numero di telefono]
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung
Die Gelegenheit Hitachi Energy sucht einen kompetenten SAP Business Analyst, der die geschäftlichen Bedürfnisse und Technologien durch das Fahren von End-to-End-ERP-Lösungen überbrücken kann. Diese Rolle besteht darin, Anforderungen zu analysieren, den Umfang zu definieren und komplexe Geschäftsprozesse in SAP-Modulspezifikationen zu übersetzen und Verbesserungen zu empfehlen, die Effizienz und Leistungsfähigkeit verbessern. Als anerkannter Fachexperte gestalten Sie operative Pläne, beeinflussen die Führung und führen die Entwicklung innovativer Prozesse und Standards, die messbare Auswirkungen liefern. Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und die Fähigkeit, Stakeholder mit strategischen Zielen auszurichten, sind für den Erfolg unerlässlich.

Come farai un impatto
- Schaffung von Governance- und Organisationsrahmen, um klare Rollen, Verantwortlichkeiten und Entscheidungsfindung im Einklang mit globalen Strategien zu gewährleisten.
- Bereitstellung strategischer Aufsicht für globale Programme, Sicherstellung der Einhaltung standardisierter Prozesse und der vollständigen Einführung von Kernsystemen.
- Gewinnen und analysieren Sie die Geschäftsanforderungen und synthetisieren Sie die Eingabe von Stakeholdern, um sich mit Geschäftszielen auszurichten.
- Verwalten Sie BU-Anforderungstrichter in Richtung SAP CoE im Einklang mit Geschäftsbogentyp.
- Leitende Prozessharmonisierung und kontinuierliche Verbesserung, Beseitigung von Musterabweichungen und Förderung von Best Practices in Regionen.
- Überwachen Sie die Performance der Geschäftsprozesse durch wichtige Kennzahlen, Datenanalyse und Benchmarking gegen Industriestandards.
- Führen Sie die Datenverwaltung und -verwaltung aus, sorgen Sie für Genauigkeit, Konsistenz und Sicherheit über HUBs und Systeme.
- Assess und die Bedürfnisse der Schulungen, die Bereitstellung von Ressourcen und Sitzungen, um Teamfähigkeiten und Leistung zu verbessern.
- Champion Change Management-Initiativen, die Förderung der globalen Prozessannahme, die Minimierung lokaler Anpassungen und die Sicherung von Stakeholder Buy-in.
- Ermittlung und Minderung von Risiken im Zusammenhang mit Systemumsetzungen und Prozessänderungen, um die Einhaltung regulatorischer Anforderungen zu gewährleisten.
- Führen und entwickeln globale Teams, fördern Rechenschaftspflicht, Zusammenarbeit und professionelles Wachstum durch Coaching und Leistungsmanagement.
- Zusammenarbeit bei der Budget- und Nachfrageplanung, der Austausch bewährter Praktiken und der regelmäßigen Kommunikation mit dem BU-Management.

Voraussetzungen
- Studium der Informatik, Ingenieurwesen, Betriebswirtschaft oder verwandten Bereich.
- Mindestens 10 Jahre fortschrittliche Erfahrung in der Fertigung, im Betriebsmanagement oder in verwandten Rollen, mit einem nachgewiesenen Erfolgsrekord führender funktionsübergreifender Teams und der Verwaltung globaler Projekte.
- Starke Führungs- und Change-Management-Fähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, globale Teams und Interessenvertreter zu beeinflussen und zu motivieren.
- Vertiefte Kenntnisse über Fertigungs-, Verkaufs-, Logistik-, Service-, System- und Prozessverbesserungsmethoden (Lean, Six Sigma).
- Ausgezeichnete Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Verlobungskompetenzen, die in der Lage sind, komplexe Konzepte effektiv zu fördern und den Buy-in auf allen organisatorischen Ebenen zu sichern.
- Analytische Denkweise mit der Fähigkeit, Daten für Leistungsüberwachung, Entscheidungsfindung und kontinuierliche Verbesserungsinitiativen zu nutzen.

Cosa offriamo
- Opportunità di crescita professionale e personale.
- Ambiente di lavoro stimolante e collaborativo.
- Benefici competitivi e vantaggious.

Contattoo
- [Inserisci qui i dettagli di contatto, come email o numero di telefono]
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
L'occasion Hitachi Energy est à la recherche d'un expert SAP Business Analyste qui peut combler les besoins et la technologie en conduisant des solutions ERP de bout en bout. Ce rôle consiste à analyser les exigences, à définir la portée et à traduire les processus opérationnels complexes en spécifications de modules SAP, tout en recommandant des améliorations qui améliorent l'efficacité et le rendement. En tant qu'expert reconnu en la matière, vous façonnerez des plans opérationnels, influencerez le leadership et dirigerez l'élaboration de processus et de normes innovateurs qui produisent un impact mesurable. Pour réussir, il est essentiel de posséder de solides compétences en communication et de pouvoir aligner les intervenants sur les objectifs stratégiques.

Venez loin un impatto
- Établir des cadres de gouvernance et d'organisation pour assurer des rôles, des responsabilités et des processus décisionnels clairs, alignés sur les stratégies mondiales.
- Assurer la surveillance stratégique des programmes mondiaux, assurer le respect des processus normalisés et l'adoption complète des systèmes de base.
- Rassembler et analyser les besoins opérationnels, synthétiser les commentaires des intervenants afin de les aligner sur les objectifs opérationnels.
- Gérer l'entonnoir de demande BU vers SAP CoE en ligne avec l'archétype d'affaires.
- Coordonner l'harmonisation des processus et l'amélioration continue, éliminer les écarts entre les modèles et promouvoir les meilleures pratiques dans les régions.
- Surveiller le rendement des processus opérationnels au moyen de mesures clés, d'analyses de données et d'analyse comparative par rapport aux normes de l'industrie.
- Diriger la gouvernance et la gestion des données, en assurant la précision, la cohérence et la sécurité dans les HUB et les systèmes.
- Évaluer et répondre aux besoins de formation, fournir des ressources et des séances pour améliorer les compétences et le rendement de l'équipe.
- Promouvoir les initiatives de gestion du changement, promouvoir l'adoption de processus mondiaux, minimiser les personnalisations locales et obtenir l'adhésion des intervenants.
- Déterminer et atténuer les risques liés à la mise en oeuvre du système et aux changements de processus, en veillant au respect des exigences réglementaires.
- Diriger et développer des équipes mondiales, favoriser la responsabilisation, la collaboration et la croissance professionnelle par l'encadrement et la gestion du rendement.
- Collaborer à la planification du budget et de la demande, partager les meilleures pratiques et maintenir une communication régulière avec la direction de l'UB.

Requisiti
- Diplôme en technologie de l'information, génie, administration des affaires, ou domaine connexe.
- Au moins 10 ans d'expérience progressive dans la fabrication, la gestion d'exploitation ou des rôles connexes, avec une expérience éprouvée de la direction d'équipes interfonctionnelles et de la gestion de projets mondiaux.
- De solides compétences en leadership et en gestion du changement, avec la capacité d'influencer et de motiver les équipes et les parties prenantes mondiales.
- Connaissance approfondie de la fabrication, des ventes, de la logistique, des processus de service, des systèmes et des méthodes d'amélioration des procédés (Lean, Six Sigma).
- Excellentes compétences en communication et engagement des parties prenantes, capables de transmettre efficacement des concepts complexes et d'obtenir l'adhésion à tous les niveaux organisationnels.
- Un état d'esprit analytique capable de tirer parti des données pour la surveillance du rendement, la prise de décisions et les initiatives d'amélioration continue.

Cosa offriamo
- Opportunità di crescita professionnelle e personnelle.
- Ambiente di lavoro stimolante e collarativo.
- Benefici competivi e vantaggious.

Contatto
- [Inserisci qui i dettagli di contatto, come email o numero di telefono]

jobs.title: GPG Insulation & Components APQP Leader
jobs.description: The Opportunity As an GPG Insulation & Components APQP Leader you will be responsible for the implementation and maintenance of Foundation APQP essentials, according to the defined strategy and plan for GPG I&C Quality. You will collaborate with crossfunctional teams ensuring that Foundation APQP essentials are updated according to novelties and new risks. How you´ll make an impact Coordinate the development of Foundation APQP plan. Lead foundation APQP Plan related meetings, collecting and preparing documentation, being main connection point between QMT, Factories, Global experts and R&D. Participate in Foundation FMEA workshops and s upport HUBs and Factories to use foundation APQP essentials (to be cascaded to local products). Support R&D organization to use foundation APQP essentials for new product developments. Support ToT projects to ensure proper transfer of APQP essentials. Act as GPG I&C Plato Admin, train crossfunctional teams, support the organization on the usage and ensure that foundation content is updated . Proactive identification of technology novelties to drive updates in foundation APQP essentials and c ollaborate with GPG Operations to identify global process changes that might affect to foundation APQP essentials ( e.g. from best practices to requirement). Your b ackground Technical degree from the University . 3-5 years of experience with APQP ( preferably in industries like Automotive or Wind). Strong knowledge of APQP processes, FMEA, PPAP, SPC, and MSA methodologies. Experience with Plato is an advatage . Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to identify and implement process improvements. Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams and facilitate effective collaboration among diverse stakeholders. Fluency in English What w e o ffer Collective agreement and flexible working hours. Health care and wellness allowance. Career opportunities within Hitachi Energ y, locally and globally. Mentor support during onboarding. Training and development programs. A diverse workplace with 70+ nationalities in Sweden. Supplementary parental leave compensation. Access to an Employee Benefit Portal with discounts. More a bout u s At Hitachi Energy, you'll work in an exciting, collaborative environment delivering world-class technology. We value personal development and diversity, and we are committed to building a sustainable energy future. We are growing and welcome applicants who may not meet every requirement—your potential matters. Applications are reviewed on an ongoing basis, so don't wait—apply today! For questions about the position, contact Recruiting Manager Yolanda Villaseca at yolanda.villaseca@hitachienergy.com . Union representatives: Sveriges Ingenjörer : Håkan Blomquist +46 107-38 31 52 , Ledarna : Frank Hollstedt +46 107 38 70 42 . All other questions can be directed to Talent Partner Michael Blomberg , michael.blomberg@hitachienergy.com

jobs.title: High Voltage Testing Engineer 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Our local product group Insulation & Components is a global technology leader in the design and manufacture of high-voltage transformer bushings. Renowned international companies across the electrical industry—including power generation, transmission, and distribution—trust our solutions. We hold a leading worldwide position in high-voltage bushing technology. To strengthen our operations, we are looking for a High Voltage Testing Engineer to join our high-voltage testing team at our MICAFIL bushing factory. If you are passionate about high-voltage testing and want to actively contribute to the future of our production processes, this is your opportunity to make a real impact. How you'll make an impact Plan and execute electrical and thermal type tests as well as special tests on high-voltage bushings (in-house and externally), considering available resources and budget Assist and lead Factory Acceptance Tests (FATs), including in-house FATs with customers Ensure the full functionality and availability of three high-voltage laboratories in collaboration with the team Lead and manage laboratory-related projects Ensure safety of equipment and personnel through training, instructions, and compliance with safety standards Secure quality, traceability, and compliance of bushing process steps through process instructions Perform routine, type, and special tests as required Continuously challenge and improve procedures and instructions as part of Continuous Improvement Processes (CIP) As part of the Operations department, actively support and contribute to daily business activities Your background Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent Professional experience in high-voltage technology, testing, or electrical machines, ideally in a production or industrial environment Solid understanding of ISO 9001 and ISO 17025 Business-fluent German and good English, both written and spoken Strong team spirit, high social competence, and enjoyment of working in a multicultural environment Flexible mindset with a strong enthusiasm for technology Proactive and solution-oriented approach to problem-solving More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Global Data, Analytics and Artificial Intelligence - BU Transformers
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy is seeking a Global Data, Analytics and Artificial Intelligence Manager for the Business Unit Transformers to join our team shaping the future of energy through digital innovation, data‑driven insights, and AI‑enabled solutions. In this role, you will drive data‑ and AI‑enabled value creation by converting business strategy into prioritized AI initiatives, ensuring measurable impact across operations, decision‑making, and innovation. This position offers the opportunity to grow your career within the newly established Digital Transformation Organization, collaborate with global stakeholders, and shape the future of Transformer solutions. How you will make an impact Shape the future of data, analytics, and AI by setting a clear strategic direction that drives meaningful business outcomes at scale. Turn real business challenges into AI opportunities that improve decisions, performance, and competitive advantage. Build and lead a high‑impact AI portfolio, taking ideas from early concepts to scaled solutions that create measurable value. Champion responsible and trusted AI by embedding strong governance, ethics, and data standards into everything delivered. Elevate data as a strategic asset by improving quality, consistency, and access to enable powerful insights and AI solutions. Lead diverse, cross‑functional teams to deliver AI initiatives that are practical, scalable, and business‑ready. Learn from results to continuously refine approaches, scale successes, and amplify business impact. Build strong partnerships with business and digital leaders to align priorities and accelerate AI adoption. Strengthen organizational capabilities through targeted learning, clear messaging, and a strong data‑driven mindset. Drive change with confidence by guiding stakeholders through transformation and ensuring responsible adoption of new solutions. Inspire, develop, and grow high‑performing Data, Analytics, and AI teams aligned behind a shared vision. Your background Master's degree in computer science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field. Relevant certifications (e.g., CAIP, advanced AI\/ML certifications) highly valued. Minimum 15+ years of experience in roles related to business process management or program implementation in the manufacturing industry. Effective communication skills with a proven ability to engage diverse stakeholders at all levels, fostering a collaborative environment to drive initiatives. Demonstrated competence in influencing and motivating teams to adopt new processes, reduce resistance, and achieve successful transitions to globally harmonized practices. Deep understanding of data, analytics, AI\/GenAI technologies, machine learning and analytics platforms. Strong analytical skills to tackle complex data and\/or AI challenges. Awareness of ethical considerations in AI development and deployment. Ability to bridge strategy, governance, and execution.

Strengthen organizational capabilities through targeted learning, clear messaging, and a strong data‑driven mindset. Drive change with confidence by guiding stakeholders through transformation and ensuring responsible adoption of new solutions. Inspire, develop, and grow high‑performing Data, Analytics, and AI teams aligned behind a shared vision. Your background Master's degree in computer science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field. Relevant certifications (e.g., CAIP, advanced AI\/ML certifications) highly valued. Minimum 15+ years of experience in roles related to business process management or program implementation in the manufacturing industry. Effective communication skills with a proven ability to engage diverse stakeholders at all levels, fostering a collaborative environment to drive initiatives. Demonstrated competence in influencing and motivating teams to adopt new processes, reduce resistance, and achieve successful transitions to globally harmonized practices. Deep understanding of data, analytics, AI\/GenAI technologies, machine learning and analytics platforms. Strong analytical skills to tackle complex data and\/or AI challenges. Awareness of ethical considerations in AI development and deployment. Ability to bridge strategy, governance, and execution.

jobs.title: Engineering Global Sustainability Leader
jobs.location: Remote - North Carolina, United States of America
jobs.description: The opportunity Sustainability starts at the design table—and this role puts you right at the center of that impact. As the Engineering Design Sustainability Lead , you will shape how sustainability is embedded into global engineering decisions across our transformer business. This is a highly visible, strategic role where engineering excellence meets environmental responsibility. You will lead the shift from downstream sustainability activities to design‑led outcomes, ensuring product‑level carbon reduction, material optimization, and environmental performance are built into every design choice from the outset. You will work across global engineering teams to translate sustainability ambitions into measurable, auditable product outcomes—balancing cost, safety, quality, and performance. With increasing expectations from customers, regulators, and stakeholders for credible product‑level data, your work will directly support compliance, ESG reporting, and long‑term business resilience. If you thrive at the intersection of engineering, data, and sustainability—and enjoy influencing without direct authority—this role offers a unique opportunity to shape the future of sustainable product design at scale. How you'll make an impact Define and drive a global, design‑led sustainability strategy within Engineering. Embed sustainability into engineering standards, processes, and decision frameworks. Reduce product‑level carbon footprint through smart design, material, and architecture choices. Establish sustainability targets, KPIs, and traceable product‑level data at BOM level. Partner across engineering, R&D, supply chain, digital and operations teams globally. Strengthen governance, reporting, and audit‑ready sustainability metrics. Build capability and foster ownership of sustainable design within engineering teams. Translate regulatory and customer sustainability expectations into engineering requirements. Responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines. Your background Master's degree or PhD in Engineering or a closely related sustainability discipline. 10+ years of engineering experience, including 5+ years in sustainability‑focused roles. Proven success delivering design‑led sustainability or product carbon reduction initiatives. Strong knowledge of lifecycle assessment, sustainable materials, and carbon accounting. Experience leading global, cross‑functional initiatives and influencing senior stakeholders. Strong analytical mindset with a data‑driven approach to decision‑making. More about us At Hitachi Energy , sustainability, innovation, and safety are core to how we design the future of energy. You'll work in a global, diverse environment where ideas are valued and impact is visible. We offer meaningful opportunities to grow, lead, and shape industry‑leading solutions with purpose.

jobs.title: Prozess- und Anlagentechniker/in 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Für unsere Industrie 4.0-fähige Produktion von Leistungshalbleitern suchen wir eine engagierte und technisch versierte Persönlichkeit als Process & Equipment Technician. Mit deinem Know-how in Systemtechnik und Automatisierung sorgst du für eine hohe Anlagenverfügbarkeit, behebst Störungen, treibst Verbesserungen voran und unterstützt deine Kolleg\/innen bei technischen Fragestellungen. Gemeinsam mit dem Engineering-Team bringst du unsere Fertigung auf das nächste Level und begleitest die Integration neuer Anlagen in laufende Produktionsprozesse. Das kannst du bewirken Kalibrierung, Wartung und Instandhaltung von Anlagen und Komponenten Eigenständige Fehlersuche und -behebung an komplexen Produktionssystemen (2.\/3. Level) Präventive und zustandsabhängige Instandhaltung, um Stillstände zu minimieren Dokumentation und Kommunikation des Anlagenzustands und technischer Anpassungen Überwachung der Prozesskonformität und Qualitätskontrolle (SPC) Umsetzung von Verbesserungsmassnahmen in Zusammenarbeit mit Engineering und Support Schulung und Unterstützung von Kolleg\/innen bei technischen Themen Sicherstellung der Arbeitssicherheit in allen Tätigkeiten Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene Ausbildung EFZ als Automatiker\/in, Elektroniker\/in oder Polymechaniker\/in Fundierte elektrotechnische Grundausbildung, idealerweise mit Weiterbildung als Systemtechniker\/in Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Instandhaltung oder Automatisierung von Produktionsanlagen Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Steuerungstechnik, Pneumatik und\/oder Roboterprogrammierung Strukturierte, analytische und selbstständige Arbeitsweise Gute Deutschkenntnisse (C1) und Englischkenntnisse (B2) Mehr über uns Sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen Ein kollegiales Team mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen Attraktive Anstellungsbedingungen und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
Sulla posizione
Per la nostra produzione industriale 4.0-capable di semiconduttori di potenza siamo alla ricerca di una personalità dedicata e tecnicamente versata come un Process & Equipment Technician. Con il tuo know-how nella tecnologia del sistema e nell'automazione, guidi ad alta disponibilità di impianti, risoluzione dei problemi, miglioramento dell'azionamento e supporto ai tuoi colleghi in problemi tecnici. Insieme al team di ingegneri, portate la nostra produzione al livello successivo e accompagnate l'integrazione di nuovi impianti nei processi produttivi in corso. Questo può essere fatto calibrando, mantenendo e mantenendo impianti e componenti di risoluzione dei problemi indipendenti e risoluzione dei problemi di complessi sistemi di produzione (2 ° terzo livello) manutenzione preventiva e condizionale per minimizzare la documentazione di standstill e la comunicazione delle condizioni degli impianti e degli adattamenti tecnici Monitoraggio della conformità del processo e del controllo della qualità (SPC) Attuazione delle misure di miglioramento in collaborazione con l'ingegneria e il supporto Formazione e supporto dei colleghi in materia tecnica

Requisiti
- Allenamento completo EFZ come automatico, elettronico o polimeccanico
- Fondata formazione elettrotecnica di base, ideale con ulteriore formazione come tecnico di sistema
- Esperienza pluriennale nella manutenzione o nell'automazione degli impianti di produzione
- Ottima conoscenza della tecnologia di controllo, della programmazione pneumatica e/o robot
- Funzionamento strutturato, analitico e indipendente
- Buona conoscenza del tedesco (C1) e dell'inglese (B2)

Cosa?
- Posto di lavoro sicuro in una società orientata al futuro
- Una squadra collegiale con un breve processo decisionale
- Condizioni di lavoro interessanti e possibilità di sviluppo

Contatto
- Altro su di noi
descriptionByLocale.en:
Descrizione
About the position
For our Industry 4.0-capable production of power semiconductors we are looking for a dedicated and technically versed personality as a Process & Equipment Technician. With your know-how in system technology and automation, you drive for high plant availability, troubleshooting, drive improvements and support your colleagues in technical issues. Together with the engineering team, you bring our production to the next level and accompany the integration of new plants into ongoing production processes. This can be done by calibrating, maintaining and maintaining plants and components independent troubleshooting and troubleshooting of complex production systems (2nd/3rd level) preventive and conditional maintenance to minimize standstill documentation and communication of plant condition and technical adjustments Monitoring process compliance and quality control (SPC) Implementation of improvement measures in cooperation with engineering and support Training and support of colleagues in technical matters Ensuring work safety in all

Requisiti
- Completed training EFZ as an automatic, electronic or polymechanical
- Found basic electrotechnical training, ideally with further training as a system technician
- Multiannual experience in the maintenance or automation of production plants
- Very good knowledge of control technology, pneumatics and/or robot programming
- Structured, analytical and independent operation
- Good knowledge of German (C1) and English (B2)

Cosa offriamo
- Secure workplace in a future-oriented company
- A collegial team with short decision-making
- Attractive employment conditions and development possibilities

Contatto
- More about us
descriptionByLocale.de:
## Descrizione
Über die Position
Für unsere Industrie 4.0-fähige Produktion von Leistungshalbleitern suchen wir eine engagierte und technisch versierte Persönlichkeit als Process & Equipment Technician. Mit deinem Know-how in Systemtechnik und Automatisierung sorgst du für eine hohe Anlagenverfügbarkeit, behebst Störungen, treibst Verbesserungen voran und unterstützt deine Kolleginnen bei technischen Fragestellungen. Gemeinsam mit dem Engineering-Team bringst du unsere Fertigung auf das nächste Level und begleitest die Integration neuer Anlagen in laufende Produktionsprozesse. Das kannst du bewirken durch Kalibrierung, Wartung und Instandhaltung von Anlagen und Komponenten Eigenständige Fehlersuche und -behebung an komplexen Produktionssystemen (2./3. Level) Präventive und zustandsabhängige Instandhaltung, um Stillstände zu minimieren Dokumentation und Kommunikation des Anlagenzustands und technischer Anpassungen Überwachung der Prozesskonformität und Qualitätskontrolle (SPC) Umsetzung von Verbesserungsmassnahmen in Zusammenarbeit mit Engineering und Support Schulung und Unterstützung von Kolleginnen bei technischen Themen Sicherstellung der Arbeitssicherheit in allen Tätigkeiten

## Requisiti
- Abgeschlossene Ausbildung EFZ als Automatiker/in, Elektroniker/in oder Polymechaniker/in
- Fundierte elektrotechnische Grundausbildung, idealerweise mit Weiterbildung als Systemtechniker/in
- Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Instandhaltung oder Automatisierung von Produktionsanlagen
- Sehr gute Kenntnisse in Steuerungstechnik, Pneumatik und/oder Roboterprogrammierung
- Strukturierte, analytische und selbstständige Arbeitsweise
- Gute Deutschkenntnisse (C1) und Englischkenntnisse (B2)

## Cosa offriamo
- Sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen
- Ein kollegiales Team mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen
- Attraktive Anstellungsbedingungen und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten

## Contatto
- Mehr über uns
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
Sur la position
Pour notre industrie 4.0-capable production de semi-conducteurs de puissance, nous recherchons une personnalité dédiée et techniquement parlante en tant que technicien de processus et d'équipement. Avec votre savoir-faire en technologie du système et en automatisation, vous conduisez pour une grande disponibilité de l'usine, dépannage, améliorations de la conduite et soutenir vos collègues dans des problèmes techniques. Avec l'équipe d'ingénierie, vous apportez notre production au niveau supérieur et accompagnez l'intégration de nouvelles usines dans les processus de production en cours. Cela peut se faire par l'étalonnage, l'entretien et l'entretien des installations et des composants de dépannage et de dépannage des systèmes de production complexes (2e et 3e niveaux) d'entretien préventif et conditionnel pour minimiser la documentation d'arrêt et la communication de l'état des installations et des ajustements techniques Surveillance de la conformité des processus et du contrôle de la qualité (SPC) Mise en œuvre de mesures d'amélioration en coopération avec l'ingénierie et le soutien Formation et soutien des collègues en matière technique Assurer la sécurité du travail dans tous

Requisiti
- Formation complète EFZ comme automatique, électronique ou polymécanique
- Trouvé formation électrotechnique de base, idéalement avec formation continue en tant que technicien système
- Expérience pluriannuelle dans la maintenance ou l'automatisation des usines de production
- Très bonne connaissance de la technologie de contrôle, des pneumatiques et/ou de la programmation des robots
- Fonctionnement structuré, analytique et indépendant
- Bonne connaissance de l'allemand (C1) et de l'anglais (B2)

Cosa offriamo
- Sécurisation du lieu de travail dans une entreprise tournée vers l'avenir
- Une équipe collégiale avec une courte prise de décision
- Conditions d'emploi attractives et possibilités de développement

Contatto
- Plus sur nous

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition Partner 1 year contract (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity We're looking for a Talent Acquisition Partner to join our dynamic team and support our German-speaking market. In this role, you'll work closely local stakeholders and colleagues to attract top talent, drive local initiatives, and elevate candidate experience. If you're passionate about recruitment and thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment, we'd love to hear from you! titleByLocale.it: Talent Acquisition Partner Contratto di 1 anno (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
L'opportunità Stiamo cercando un Talent Acquisition Partner per unire il nostro team dinamico e sostenere il nostro mercato di lingua tedesca. In questo ruolo, lavorerai a stretto contatto con le parti interessate e i colleghi locali per attirare i migliori talenti, guidare le iniziative locali e aumentare l'esperienza dei candidati. Se siete appassionati di reclutamento e prosperare in un ambiente collaborativo veloce, ci piacerebbe sentire da voi!

Come farai ad avere un impatto
- Guidare il reclutamento end-to-end per ruoli sul mercato di lingua tedesca in più funzioni e unità aziendali
- Agire come consulente per l'assunzione di manager, fornendo informazioni di mercato e soluzioni di talento
- Collaborare con le risorse umane locali e gli stakeholder aziendali per lavorare attivamente sulle loro esigenze di assunzione e costruire pipeline proattive
- Campione diversità, equità e inclusione in tutte le pratiche di assunzione
- Rappresentare l'azienda in eventi esterni e costruire forti iniziative di branding datore di lavoro

Il tuo sfondo
- Almeno 3-5 anni di esperienza nell'acquisizione di talenti in un ruolo simile idealmente combinato con l'esperienza di lavoro in un ambiente internazionale o matrice
- Forte gestione degli stakeholder e influenzando le competenze in tutti i livelli dell'organizzazione
- La buona comprensione del mercato del lavoro di lingua tedesca è obbligatoria
- Profonda comprensione delle strategie di approvvigionamento, delle tecniche di intervista e degli strumenti di valutazione
- La fluidità in inglese e tedesco è obbligatoria (livello C1 o lingua madre)
- Appassionato di persone, processi decisionali basati sui dati e risultati
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity We're looking for a Talent Acquisition Partner to join our dynamic team and support our German-speaking market. In this role, you'll work closely local stakeholders and colleagues to attract top talent, drive local initiatives, and elevate candidate experience. If you're passionate about recruitment and thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment, we'd love to hear from you!

## How you'll make an impact
- Drive end-to-end recruitment for roles on the German-speaking market across multiple functions and Business Units
- Act as an advisor to hiring managers, providing market insights and talent solutions
- Partner with local HR and business stakeholders to work actively on their hiring needs and build proactive pipelines
- Champion diversity, equity, and inclusion in all hiring practices
- Represent the company at external events and build strong employer branding initiatives

## Your background
- At least 3-5 years of experience in talent acquisition in a similar role ideally combined with experience working in an international or matrixed environment
- Strong stakeholder management and influencing skills across all levels of the organization
- Good understanding of German-speaking labor market is mandatory
- Deep understanding of sourcing strategies, interview techniques, and assessment tools
- Fluency in English and German is mandatory (C1 level or mother tongue)
- Passionate about people, data-driven decision-making, and delivering results
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung
Die Gelegenheit Wir suchen einen Talent Acquisition Partner, der unserem dynamischen Team beitritt und unseren deutschsprachigen Markt unterstützt. In dieser Rolle arbeiten Sie eng mit lokalen Interessenvertretern und Kollegen zusammen, um Top-Talent zu gewinnen, lokale Initiativen zu fördern und Kandidatenerfahrung zu erhöhen. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich über Rekrutierung und Hunger in einem schnelllebigen, kollaborativen Umfeld sind, würden wir gerne von Ihnen hören!

Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben
- Fahren Sie End-to-End-Rekrutierung für Rollen auf dem deutschsprachigen Markt über mehrere Funktionen und Business Units
- Aktivieren Sie als Berater für die Einstellung von Managern, die Bereitstellung von Markteinsichten und Talentlösungen
- Partner mit lokalen Personal- und Unternehmensvertretern, um aktiv an ihren Einstellungsanforderungen zu arbeiten und proaktive Pipelines aufzubauen
- Championdiversität, Equity und Inklusion in allen Einstellungspraktiken
- Vertreten Sie das Unternehmen bei externen Veranstaltungen und bauen Sie starke Arbeitgeber Branding Initiativen

Ihr Hintergrund
- Mindestens 3-5 Jahre Erfahrung in der Akquisition von Talenten in einer ähnlichen Rolle ideal kombiniert mit Erfahrung in einer internationalen oder Matrix-Umgebung
- Starkes Stakeholder-Management und Einfluss auf alle Ebenen der Organisation
- Gutes Verständnis des deutschsprachigen Arbeitsmarktes ist obligatorisch
- Tiefes Verständnis der Beschaffungsstrategien, Interviewtechniken und Bewertungstools
- Fluency in Englisch und Deutsch ist obligatorisch (C1 Ebene oder Muttersprache)
- Leidenschaft für Menschen, datengesteuerte Entscheidungsfindung und Ergebnisse
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
L'opportunité Nous recherchons un Talent Acquisition Partner pour rejoindre notre équipe dynamique et soutenir notre marché germanophone. Dans ce rôle, vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec les intervenants locaux et vos collègues pour attirer les meilleurs talents, stimuler les initiatives locales et améliorer l'expérience des candidats. Si vous êtes passionné par le recrutement et que vous prospèrez dans un environnement de collaboration rapide, nous aimerions entendre parler de vous!

Comment vous ferez un impact
- Conduire le recrutement de bout en bout pour des rôles sur le marché germanophone à travers plusieurs fonctions et unités commerciales
- Agir à titre de conseiller auprès des gestionnaires d'embauche, en offrant des perspectives de marché et des solutions de talents
- Établir des partenariats avec les intervenants locaux des RH et des entreprises afin de répondre activement à leurs besoins en matière d'embauche et de créer des pipelines proactifs
- Diversité des champions, équité et inclusion dans toutes les pratiques d'embauche
- Représenter l'entreprise lors d'événements extérieurs et construire de solides initiatives de marque employeur

Vos antécédents
- Au moins 3-5 ans d'expérience dans l'acquisition de talents dans un rôle similaire idéalement combiné avec l'expérience de travail dans un environnement international ou matricielle
- Une gestion forte des intervenants et une influence sur les compétences à tous les niveaux de l'organisation
- Une bonne compréhension du marché du travail germanophone est obligatoire
- Connaissance approfondie des stratégies d'approvisionnement, des techniques d'entrevue et des outils d'évaluation
- La maîtrise de l'anglais et de l'allemand est obligatoire (niveau C1 ou langue maternelle)
- Passionné par les gens, la prise de décision axée sur les données et l'obtention de résultats

jobs.title: R&D Engineer - High Voltage Circuit Breakers 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity For our Business Unit High Voltage Products in Zurich-Oerlikon, we are looking for an R&D Engineer to strengthen our team for High Voltage Circuit Breakers development. If you are passionate about solving highly complex multi-physical problems and want to work with world-leading experts to develop best-in-class High Voltage Circuit Breakers, this is your chance. Join our innovative team and be part of an international working environment in Zurich. How you'll make an impact Execute product-development-related engineering activities for specific R&D projects from concept to series implementation, ensuring technical alignment with cross-functional experts and project stakeholders Support the Design Lead in product development topics and ensure structured documentation of development activities Plan and supervise assembly, disassembly and inspection of prototypes together with other experts Contribute to the continuous improvement of R&D processes and activities Your background Master's degree in mechanical engineering or a closely related subject from a Polytechnical\/Technical University Working experience in an R&D environment is a plus Experience in project management is a plus Good know-how in 3D CAD and FEM software tools required High expectations on quality of work in all regards Independent, proactive and goal-oriented personality Practically oriented and hands-on way of working Self-motivated, committed, willing to learn Excellent communication skills Excellent command of English and German, both written and spoken More about us At Hitachi Energy, our culture is built on collaboration, diversity and continuous learning. We believe that the best ideas come from working together across cultures and disciplines, embracing different perspectives and fostering an inclusive environment. We encourage curiosity and innovation, providing opportunities for personal and professional growth. Join us and be part of a global team that is shaping a sustainable energy future.

jobs.title: Factory Digitalization and Automation Engineer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Switzerland as a Digitalization & Automation Engineer and support our factory's digital transformation by designing, developing, and implementing automation, digitalization, and data-driven improvement solutions. How you'll make an impact Analyze manufacturing and business processes to identify automation and digitalization opportunities Design and implement solutions for process automation (industrial or office), digital workflows and paperless processes, as well as production data collection and analysis Collaborate with Operations, IT, Quality, and Continuous Improvement teams to define functional and technical requirements Develop and maintain KPI dashboards (OEE, productivity, quality, downtime) and data acquisition systems (PLC, sensors, MES) Manage technology suppliers and system integrators Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and cybersecurity standards Train end users and support change management activities Your background Master's or bachelor's degree in engineering (Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Electronics, or similar) Solid understanding of control logic and process automation, operational process digitalization Experience with MES, ERP, or traceability systems Knowledge of Python, SQL, Power BI \/ Tableau, RPA tools (for example: Power Automate) and industrial IoT solutions Experience with data analysis and reporting tools Experience in manufacturing or industrial environments Technical English (written and spoken) and Italian at least intermediate Familiarity of Lean Six Sigma methodologies and industrial automation systems (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) is an advantage More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team di Molinazzo di Monteggio, Svizzera come ingegnere di digitalizzazione e automazione e supporta la trasformazione digitale della nostra fabbrica progettando, sviluppando e implementando soluzioni di automazione, digitalizzazione e miglioramento basate sui dati. ## Mansioni - Analizzare processi produttivi e aziendali per identificare opportunità di automazione e digitalizzazione - Progettazione e realizzazione di soluzioni per l'automazione dei processi (industriale o ufficio), flussi di lavoro digitali e processi senza carta, nonché raccolta e analisi dei dati di produzione - Collaborare con i team Operazioni, IT, Qualità e Miglioramento continuo per definire requisiti funzionali e tecnici - Sviluppare e mantenere cruscotti KPI (OEE, produttività, qualità, downtime) e sistemi di acquisizione dati (PLC, sensori, MES) - Gestione di fornitori di tecnologia e integratori di sistema - Garantire il rispetto degli standard di sicurezza, qualità e sicurezza informatica - Utenti finali e attività di gestione dei cambiamenti di supporto # Requisiti # - Master o laurea in ingegneria (Automazione, Meccatronica, Informatica, Elettronica, o simili) - Solida comprensione della logica di controllo e dell'automazione dei processi, digitalizzazione dei processi operativi - Esperienza con sistemi MES, ERP o tracciabilità - Conoscenza di Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, strumenti RPA (ad esempio: Power Automate) e soluzioni IoT industriali - Esperienza con l'analisi dei dati e strumenti di reportistica - Esperienza in ambienti industriali o industriali - Inglese tecnico (scritto e parlato) e italiano almeno intermedio - La familiarità delle metodologie Lean Six Sigma e dei sistemi di automazione industriale (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) è un vantaggio # Cosa # Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity Join our team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Switzerland as a Digitalization & Automation Engineer and support our factory's digital transformation by designing, developing, and implementing automation, digitalization, and data-driven improvement solutions. ## Mansioni - Analyze manufacturing and business processes to identify automation and digitalization opportunities - Design and implement solutions for process automation (industrial or office), digital workflows and paperless processes, as well as production data collection and analysis - Collaborate with Operations, IT, Quality, and Continuous Improvement teams to define functional and technical requirements - Develop and maintain KPI dashboards (OEE, productivity, quality, downtime) and data acquisition systems (PLC, sensors, MES) - Manage technology suppliers and system integrators - Ensure compliance with safety, quality, and cybersecurity standards - Train end users and support change management activities ## Requisiti - Master's or bachelor's degree in engineering (Automation, Mechatronics, Computer Science, Electronics, or similar) - Solid understanding of control logic and process automation, operational process digitalization - Experience with MES, ERP, or traceability systems - Knowledge of Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, RPA tools (for example: Power Automate) and industrial IoT solutions - Experience with data analysis and reporting tools - Experience in manufacturing or industrial environments - Technical English (written and spoken) and Italian at least intermediate - Familiarity of Lean Six Sigma methodologies and industrial automation systems (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) is an advantage ## Cosa offriamo - More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Descrizione Die Chance: Treten Sie unserem Team in Molinazzo di Monteggio, Schweiz, als Digitalisierungs- und Automatisierungsingenieur bei und unterstützen Sie die digitale Transformation unserer Fabrik, indem Sie Automatisierungs-, Digitalisierungs- und datengetriebene Verbesserungslösungen entwerfen, entwickeln und implementieren. ## Mansioni – Analyse von Fertigungs- und Geschäftsprozessen, um Automatisierungs- und Digitalisierungsmöglichkeiten zu identifizieren – Lösungen für Prozessautomatisierung (Industrie- oder Büroentwicklung), digitale Arbeitsabläufe und papierlose Prozesse sowie für die Sammlung und Analyse von Produktionsdaten zu entwerfen und umzusetzen – Zusammenarbeit mit Teams für Betrieb, IT, Qualität und kontinuierliche Verbesserung, um funktionale und technische Anforderungen zu definieren – Entwicklung und Pflege von KPI-Dashboards (OEE, Produktivität, Qualität, Ausfallzeit) und Datenerfassungssysteme (SPS, Sensoren, MES) - Verwaltung von Technologiezulieferern und Systemintegratoren - Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Sicherheits-, Qualitäts- und Cybersicherheitsstandards - Ausbildung von Endnutzern und Unterstützung von Change-Management-Aktivitäten ## Requisiti - Master- oder Bachelorabschluss in Ingenieurwesen (Automatisierung, Mechatronik, Informatik, Elektronik oder Ähnliches) - Solides Verständnis von Regelungslogik und Prozessautomatisierung, operativer Prozessdigitalisierung - Erfahrung mit MES-, ERP- oder Rückverfolgungssystemen – Kenntnisse in Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, RPA-Tools (z. B. Power Automate) und industriellen IoT-Lösungen – Erfahrung mit Datenanalyse- und Berichtswerkzeugen – Erfahrung in Fertigungs- oder Industrieumgebungen – Technisches Englisch (geschrieben und gesprochen) und Italienisch mindestens auf Mittelstufe – Vertrautheit mit Lean Six Sigma-Methoden und industriellen Automatisierungssystemen (SPS, HMI, SCADA, IBA) ist ein Vorteil ## Cosa offriamo – Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen, persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und gleichzeitig ein Umfeld zu schaffen, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'opportunité Rejoignez notre équipe à Molinazzo di Monteggio, Suisse en tant qu'ingénieur Digitalisation & Automation et soutenez la transformation numérique de notre usine en concevant, développant et implémentant des solutions d'automatisation, de numérisation et d'amélioration des données. Les hommes - Analyser les processus de fabrication et d'affaires pour identifier les possibilités d'automatisation et de numérisation - Concevoir et mettre en œuvre des solutions pour l'automatisation des processus (industriels ou de bureau), les flux de travail numériques et les processus sans papier, ainsi que la collecte et l'analyse des données de production - Collaborer avec les équipes Opérations, TI, Qualité et Amélioration continue pour définir les exigences fonctionnelles et techniques - Développer et entretenir des tableaux de bord KPI (EEE, productivité, qualité, temps d'arrêt) et des systèmes d'acquisition de données (PLC, capteurs, MES) - Gérer les fournisseurs de technologie et les intégrateurs de systèmes - Assurer le respect des normes de sécurité, de qualité et de cybersécurité - Former les utilisateurs finaux et soutenir les activités de gestion du changement ## Requisiti - Maîtrise ou baccalauréat en ingénierie (Automation, Mécatronique, Informatique, Électronique ou similaire) - Compréhension solide de la logique de contrôle et de l'automatisation des processus, numérisation des processus opérationnels - Expérience des systèmes MES, ERP ou de traçabilité - Connaissance de Python, SQL, Power BI / Tableau, outils RPA (par exemple: Power Automate) et solutions IoT industrielles - Expérience des outils d ' analyse et de communication des données - Expérience dans les environnements industriels ou manufacturiers - Anglais technique (écrit et parlé) et italien au moins intermédiaire - Connaissance des méthodologies Lean Six Sigma et des systèmes d'automatisation industrielle (PLC, HMI, SCADA, IBA) est un avantage Cosa offriamo - Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Troubleshooting Improvement Specialist 40 - 50% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Der Bereich GIS (gasisolierte Schaltanlagen) steht für höchste Qualität, Sicherheit und Effizienz – und genau hier setzt deine Rolle an. Als Troubleshooting Improvement Specialist unterstützt du aktiv bei der Analyse und nachhaltigen Verbesserung von Qualitäts- und Produktionsprozessen. Du arbeitest eng mit unterschiedlichen internen Fachbereichen zusammen, bringst neue Perspektiven ein und hilfst dabei, wiederkehrende Probleme systematisch zu identifizieren und zu lösen. Das kannst du bewirken Unterstützung bei der Analyse von Qualitätsmeldungen und Produktionsproblemen Mitarbeit an der kontinuierlichen Verbesserung von Troubleshooting-Prozessen Enge Zusammenarbeit mit internen Schnittstellen wie Produktion, Qualität, Engineering und Planung Unterstützung bei der Auswertung von Produktions- und Qualitätsdaten Dokumentation von Maßnahmen und Nachverfolgung von Verbesserungsinitiativen Mitarbeit bei internen Reviews und Audits Das bringst du mit Laufendes Studium oder abgeschlossene Ausbildung im Bereich Elektrotechnik, Maschinenbau, Industrial Engineering, Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen oder vergleichbar Erste praktische Erfahrung im industriellen Umfeld von Vorteil, idealerweise mit Bezug zu Produktion, Industrialisierung, Digitalisierung oder Prozessautomatisierung Starkes Interesse an Produktionsprozessen, Qualität und Problemanalyse sowie eine analytische, strukturierte und eigenständige Arbeitsweise Gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse Grundkenntnisse in SAP, DSP, MES oder Datenanalyse-Tools sind ein Plus Mehr über uns Bei Hitachi Energy glauben wir an die Kraft der Vielfalt, Zusammenarbeit und Innovation. Unsere Kultur ist geprägt von kontinuierlichem Lernen und dem gemeinsamen Ziel, nachhaltige Energielösungen zu gestalten. Wir fördern ein inklusives Arbeitsumfeld, in dem jede Meinung zählt und du deine Ideen einbringen kannst – unabhängig von Herkunft, Geschlecht oder Hintergrund.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
L'area GIS (interruttore isolato a gas) rappresenta la massima qualità, sicurezza ed efficienza, ed è qui che inizia il tuo ruolo. Come Specialista per il miglioramento dei problemi, supporta attivamente l'analisi e il miglioramento sostenibile dei processi di qualità e produzione. Lavorare a stretto contatto con diverse discipline interne, introdurre nuove prospettive e aiutare sistematicamente a identificare e risolvere problemi ricorrenti.

Mansioni
- Sostegno all'analisi dei rapporti di qualità e dei problemi di produzione
- Lavorare al miglioramento continuo dei processi di risoluzione dei problemi
- Una stretta collaborazione con interfacce interne come la produzione, la qualità, l'ingegneria e la pianificazione
- Supporto nella valutazione dei dati di produzione e qualità
- Documentazione delle misure e follow-up delle iniziative di miglioramento
- Lavorare con recensioni interne e audit

Requisiti
- Studi continui o formazione completa in ingegneria elettrica, ingegneria meccanica, ingegneria industriale, ingegneria industriale o comparabile
- Prima esperienza pratica nell'ambiente industriale di vantaggio, idealmente legata alla produzione, all'industrializzazione, alla digitalizzazione o all'automazione dei processi
- Un forte interesse nei processi produttivi, nell'analisi della qualità e dei problemi, nonché un modo di lavoro analitico, strutturato e indipendente
- Buona conoscenza della lingua tedesca e inglese
- La conoscenza di base di SAP, DSP, MES o strumenti di analisi dei dati è un plus

Cosa?
- A Hitachi Energy crediamo nel potere della diversità, della cooperazione e dell'innovazione. La nostra cultura è caratterizzata da un apprendimento continuo e dall'obiettivo comune di modellare soluzioni energetiche sostenibili.
- Promuoviamo un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo in cui ogni opinione conta e puoi portare le tue idee – indipendentemente dall'origine, dal sesso o dallo sfondo.

Contatto
- Contatto

descriptionByLocale.en:

As an operator/in varistor production at Hitachi Energy at the Wettingen site, you are a central part of our production. You are responsible for setting up and operating production systems for the production of metal oxide varistors and ensure that our products meet the highest quality, safety and process standards. Thanks to your experience, you can keep track of deviations, analyze causes and actively support the stability and continuous improvement of our production processes.

Mansioni
- Set up, operate and monitor various production plants for the production of metal oxide varistors
- Careful and quality-conscious execution of all relevant process and work steps
- Monitoring production processes and early detection and analysis of deviations
- Conducting quality controls and ensuring product conformity according to specifications
- Documentation of production and process values in the intended systems
- Ensuring compliance with safety, quality and environmental regulations (HSE)
- Active support in optimizing processes and continuous improvements
- Ensure order and cleanliness in the working area according to 5S principles

Requisiti
- Complete technical or craft training (e.g. production mechanic, automatic, plant operator or similar)
- Multiannual experience in industrial production or plant operation
- Good technical understanding and safe handling of production and process plants
- Structured, reliable and quality-oriented operation
- Teamability, Responsibility and Independent Operation
- Good knowledge of German in word and writing

Cosa offriamo
- More about us Hitachi Energy stands for innovative technologies and sustainable energy solutions worldwide.
- We expect a safe workplace in a future-oriented company, exciting development opportunities, a collegial and value-adding working environment and attractive social benefits.

- Contatto

jobs.title: Product Manager Network Control – Power Applications (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity At Hitachi Energy, we're shaping the future of sustainable energy systems—and you can be at the heart of it. As Product Manager for Power Applications (EMS \/ ADMS \/ DERMS), you will own the vision, strategy, and evolution of the advanced power and network analysis applications that power our Network Control (NC) portfolio. This is a highly visible, global role where technical depth meets strategic influence, and where your ideas can directly transform how power systems are analysed and optimised in real time. You'll work across a sophisticated ecosystem of products including EMS, ADMS, DERMS and more ensuring that our power applications are aligned, scalable, and future-ready. A key focus of this role is identifying game‑changing opportunities to apply AI in power system analysis , redefining what's possible for grid operations worldwide. and design through testing, release, and post-launch support Shape and evolve advanced applications such as State Estimation, Power Flow (balanced & unbalanced), Security Analysis, Transient Stability, Dynamic Assessment, and Optimal Power Flow Collaborate with global R&D, Sales, Pre-sales, Marketing, and Customer Service teams to prioritize features and ensure successful delivery
