titleByLocale.it: Vice Presidente Vendite e Marketing GPQSS

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione

La nostra Grid Integration – GPQSS (azienda di integrazione del sistema AC) sta cercando un Leader di Marketing e Vendite globale per modellare, accelerare ed eseguire la nostra strategia commerciale mondiale. Questo ruolo strategico senior richiede un esecutivo di vendite realizzato in grado di guidare la crescita redditizia, rafforzare la nostra presenza di mercato, e leader team globali ad alto rendimento all'interno di una complessa matrice organizzazione. In qualità di Executive Sales & Marketing Manager, possederai la strategia commerciale a lungo termine e la sua esecuzione operativa per il Global Product Group, impostando la visione e gli obiettivi di vendita globali, garantendo un'efficace distribuzione in paesi e segmenti. Sarete responsabili di fornire obiettivi ambiziosi di crescita, di margine e di espansione del mercato in allineamento con la strategia di Marketing & Sales dell'unità aziendale. Come membro chiave del team di leadership globale, collaborerai a stretto contatto con la gestione dei prodotti, lo sviluppo aziendale, le operazioni, le finanze e i leader regionali, e rappresenterai il business di Hitachi Energy Grid and Power Quality Solutions and Service in senior customer engagement, forum industriali e partnership strategiche, posizionando l'organizzazione come leader tecnologico di fiducia.

Come farai ad avere un impatto

- Condurre lo sviluppo e l'esecuzione della strategia commerciale globale per il business GPQSS, stabilire una chiara visione a lungo termine, traducendola in piani di vendita a livello nazionale e specifici per segmenti che consentono una crescita coerente e scalabile in tutto il mondo.
- Definire e possedere l'ambizione di vendita globale, tra cui ricavi, margini e obiettivi di espansione del mercato, assicurando che gli obiettivi di vendita non siano allineati solo con la strategia di Marketing & Sales della Business Unit, ma anche sostenuti da insight basati sui dati, posizionamento competitivo e tendenze dei clienti emergenti.
- Promuovere una crescita proficua in tutte le regioni organizzando un approccio unificato di go-to-market, rafforzando la qualità delle tubazioni, migliorando la precisione delle previsioni e garantendo una gestione delle prestazioni commerciali disciplinata in una struttura di matrice complessa.
- Elevate la presenza globale di mercato di Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions & Services, posizionando il portafoglio come punto di riferimento del settore attraverso l'intelligenza di mercato mirata, le proposte differenziate di valore e le attività di leader di pensiero che rafforzano la nostra reputazione come leader tecnologico di fiducia.
- Guidare, ispirare e sviluppare team di vendita e marketing globali ad alto rendimento, incorporando una cultura di responsabilità, collaborazione e eccellenza commerciale, fornendo ai team strumenti, formazione e strutture necessarie per eseguire in scala.
- Agire come partner strategico per le principali parti interessate interne, tra cui gestione del prodotto, sviluppo aziendale, operazioni, finanza e leadership regionale, garantendo un allineamento stretto tra strategia commerciale, priorità roadmap del prodotto, capacità di consegna e obiettivi di performance aziendali.
- Rappresentare l'azienda ai massimi livelli di impegno del cliente e dell'industria, costruire e nutrire relazioni esecutive, negoziare leader, e influenzare gli organismi del settore, alleanze strategiche e partner ecosistemici per far progredire la leadership di Hitachi Energy nell'integrazione della rete e nella qualità della potenza.
- Guidare l'allineamento interfunzionale per accelerare la penetrazione del mercato, assicurando un coordinamento senza soluzione di continuità tra vendite, marketing, tendering, servizio e operazioni per massimizzare i tassi di vincita, ottimizzare le strategie di prezzi e migliorare il valore del cliente attraverso il ciclo di vita.
- Superare i quadri di governance commerciale e le metriche di performance, assicurando che le attività di vendita globali siano eseguite in modo coerente, etico ed efficiente, e che il rigoroso monitoraggio delle prestazioni supporti il miglioramento continuo e l'agilità strategica.
- L'innovazione del campione e le intuizioni di mercato, l'alimentazione del cliente, il concorrente e l'intelligenza di mercato nell'organizzazione per modellare le strategie future del prodotto, guidare le decisioni di investimento e identificare nuove opportunità di crescita.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione

The opportunity Our Grid Integration – GPQSS (AC system integration business) is seeking a global Marketing and Sales Leader to shape, accelerate, and execute our worldwide commercial strategy. This senior strategic role requires an accomplished sales executive capable of driving profitable growth, strengthening our market presence, and leading high-performing global teams within a complex matrix organization. As the Executive Sales & Marketing Manager, you will own the long-term commercial strategy and its operational execution for the Global Product Group, setting the global sales vision and targets while ensuring effective deployment across countries and segments. You will be responsible for delivering ambitious growth, margin, and market-expansion objectives in alignment with the Business Unit's Marketing & Sales strategy. As a key member of the global leadership team, you will collaborate closely with Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finance, and regional leaders, and you will represent Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions and Service business in senior customer engagements, industry forums, and strategic partnerships, positioning the organization as a trusted technology leader.

## How you'll make an impact

- Lead the development and execution of the global commercial strategy for the GPQSS business, establishing a clear long-term vision while translating it into actionable, country-level and segment-specific sales plans that enable consistent, scalable growth worldwide.
- Define and own the global sales ambition, including revenue, margin, and market-expansion targets, ensuring that sales objectives are not only aligned with the Business Unit's Marketing & Sales strategy but also underpinned by data-driven insights, competitive positioning, and emerging customer trends.
- Drive profitable growth across all regions by orchestrating a unified go-to-market approach, strengthening pipeline quality, enhancing forecasting precision, and ensuring disciplined commercial performance management across a complex matrix structure.
- Elevate the global market presence of Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions & Services, positioning the portfolio as the industry benchmark through targeted market intelligence, differentiated value propositions, and thought-leadership activities that reinforce our reputation as a trusted technology leader.
- Lead, inspire, and develop high-performing global sales and marketing teams, embedding a culture of accountability, collaboration, and commercial excellence while equipping teams with the tools, training, and structures they need to execute at scale.
- Act as a strategic partner to key internal stakeholders, including Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finance, and regional leadership, ensuring tight alignment between commercial strategy, product roadmap priorities, delivery capabilities, and business performance objectives.
- Represent the business at the highest levels in customer and industry engagements, building and nurturing executive relationships, leading negotiations, and influencing industry bodies, strategic alliances, and ecosystem partners to advance Hitachi Energy's leadership in grid integration and power quality.
- Drive cross-functional alignment to accelerate market penetration, ensuring seamless coordination between sales, marketing, tendering, service, and operations to maximize win rates, optimize pricing strategies, and enhance customer value across the lifecycle.
- Oversee commercial governance frameworks and performance metrics, ensuring that global sales activities are executed consistently, ethically, and efficiently, and that rigorous performance tracking supports continuous improvement and strategic agility.
- Champion innovation and market-back insights, feeding customer, competitor, and market intelligence into the organization to shape future product strategies, guide investment decisions, and identify new growth opportunities.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung

Die Chance Unsere Grid Integration – GPQSS (AC-Systemintegrationsgeschäft) sucht einen globalen Marketing- und Vertriebsleiter, um unsere weltweite Handelsstrategie zu gestalten, zu beschleunigen und umzusetzen. Diese hochrangige strategische Rolle erfordert eine erfolgreiche Vertriebsleitung, die in der Lage ist, profitables Wachstum zu erzielen, unsere Marktpräsenz zu stärken und führende hochperformierende globale Teams innerhalb einer komplexen Matrixorganisation zu führen. Als Executive Sales & Marketing Manager besitzen Sie die langfristige kommerzielle Strategie und ihre operative Umsetzung für die Global Product Group und setzen dabei die globale Verkaufsvision und -ziele fest und gewährleisten einen effektiven Einsatz in Ländern und Segmenten. Sie werden dafür verantwortlich sein, ambitionierte Wachstums-, Margen- und Marktexpansionsziele im Einklang mit der Marketing- und Vertriebsstrategie des Unternehmens zu erreichen. Als zentrales Mitglied des globalen Führungsteams werden Sie eng mit Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finance und regionalen Führungskräften zusammenarbeiten und das Unternehmen Grid and Power Quality Solutions and Service von Hitachi Energy in Senior Customer Engagements, Branchenforen und strategischen Partnerschaften vertreten und die Organisation als vertrauenswürdiger Technologieführer positionieren.

Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben

- Führen Sie die Entwicklung und Umsetzung der globalen kommerziellen Strategie für das GPQSS-Geschäft, die Schaffung einer klaren langfristigen Vision und die Umsetzung in handlungsfähige, landesweite und segmentspezifische Vertriebspläne, die ein konsequentes, skalierbares Wachstum weltweit ermöglichen.
- Definieren und besitzen Sie den globalen Umsatz-Ehrgeiz, einschließlich Umsatz-, Margen- und Marktexpansions-Ziele, um sicherzustellen, dass die Verkaufsziele nicht nur mit der Marketing- und Vertriebsstrategie der Business Unit vereinbar sind, sondern auch durch datengetriebene Erkenntnisse, wettbewerbsfähige Positionierung und aufstrebende Kundentrends untermauert werden.
- Fahren Sie profitables Wachstum in allen Regionen, indem Sie einen einheitlichen Go-to-Market-Ansatz orchestrieren, die Pipeline-Qualität stärken, die Prognosegenauigkeit verbessern und diszipliniertes kommerzielles Leistungsmanagement über eine komplexe Matrixstruktur gewährleisten.
- Erhöhen Sie die globale Marktpräsenz von Hitachi Energy's Grid and Power Quality Solutions & Services und positionieren Sie das Portfolio als Branchen-Benchmark durch gezielte Marktinformationen, differenzierte Wertvorstellungen und durchdachte Führungsaktivitäten, die unseren Ruf als vertrauenswürdiger Technologieführer stärken.
- Führen, inspirieren und entwickeln leistungsstarke globale Vertriebs- und Marketingteams, die eine Kultur der Rechenschaftspflicht, Zusammenarbeit und kommerziellen Exzellenz einbetten und Teams mit Werkzeugen, Schulungen und Strukturen ausrüsten, die sie im Maßstab ausführen müssen.
- Handeln Sie als strategischer Partner für wichtige interne Interessenvertreter, einschließlich Product Management, Business Development, Operations, Finanzen und regionale Führung, um eine enge Abstimmung zwischen kommerzieller Strategie, Produkt-Roadmap-Prioritäten, Lieferfähigkeiten und Geschäftsleistungszielen sicherzustellen.
- Repräsentieren Sie das Geschäft auf höchstem Niveau in Kunden- und Industrieengagements, Aufbau und Pflege von Führungsbeziehungen, führenden Verhandlungen und Einfluss auf Branchengremien, strategische Allianzen und Ökosystem-Partner, um die Führung von Hitachi Energy bei der Netzintegration und -qualität zu fördern.
- Führen Sie die funktionsübergreifende Ausrichtung aus, um die Marktdurchdringung zu beschleunigen, eine nahtlose Abstimmung zwischen Vertrieb, Marketing, Angebot, Service und Betrieb sicherzustellen, um die Gewinnraten zu maximieren, Preisstrategien zu optimieren und den Kundenwert über den gesamten Lebenszyklus zu steigern.
- Beaufsichtigen Sie kommerzielle Governance-Frameworks und Performance Metriken, um sicherzustellen, dass globale Vertriebsaktivitäten konsequent, ethisch und effizient ausgeführt werden und dass strenge Performance Tracking kontinuierliche Verbesserung und strategische Agilität unterstützt.
- Championinnovation und Marktrückblicke, Fütterung von Kunden, Wettbewerbern und Marktinformationen in die Organisation, um zukünftige Produktstrategien zu gestalten, Investitionsentscheidungen zu führen und neue Wachstumschancen zu identifizieren.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione

L'opportunité Notre intégration Grid – GPQSS (AC system integration business) cherche un leader mondial du marketing et des ventes pour façonner, accélérer et exécuter notre stratégie commerciale mondiale. Ce rôle stratégique de haut niveau nécessite un cadre commercial accompli capable de stimuler une croissance rentable, de renforcer notre présence sur le marché et de diriger des équipes mondiales à haut rendement au sein d'une organisation matricielle complexe. En tant que responsable des ventes et du marketing, vous serez propriétaire de la stratégie commerciale à long terme et de son exécution opérationnelle pour le Groupe de produits mondial, en définissant la vision et les objectifs des ventes mondiales tout en assurant un déploiement efficace à travers les pays et les segments. Vous serez responsable de la réalisation d'objectifs ambitieux de croissance, de marge et d'expansion du marché, conformément à la stratégie de marketing et de vente de l'unité commerciale. En tant que membre clé de l'équipe de direction mondiale, vous collaborerez étroitement avec la gestion des produits, le développement des affaires, les opérations, les finances et les dirigeants régionaux, et vous représenterez l'activité Grid and Power Quality Solutions and Service d'Hitachi Energy dans les relations avec les clients, les forums de l'industrie et les partenariats stratégiques.

Comment vous ferez un impact

- Diriger l ' élaboration et la mise en œuvre de la stratégie commerciale mondiale pour les activités du GPQSS, en établissant une vision claire à long terme tout en la traduisant en plans de vente réalisables au niveau des pays et spécifiques à chaque segment, qui permettent une croissance cohérente et évolutive dans le monde entier.
- Définir et posséder l'ambition des ventes mondiales, y compris les revenus, la marge et les objectifs d'expansion du marché, en veillant à ce que les objectifs des ventes ne soient pas seulement alignés sur la stratégie marketing et des ventes de l'unité commerciale, mais également étayés par des informations basées sur les données, un positionnement concurrentiel et de nouvelles tendances clientes.
- Favoriser une croissance rentable dans toutes les régions en orchestrant une approche unifiée de l'accès au marché, en renforçant la qualité des pipelines, en améliorant la précision des prévisions et en assurant une gestion des performances commerciales disciplinées dans une structure matricielle complexe.
- Augmenter la présence sur le marché mondial des solutions et services Grid and Power Quality d'Hitachi Energy, positionner le portefeuille en tant que référence de l'industrie grâce à une intelligence de marché ciblée, à des propositions de valeur différenciées et à des activités de réflexion qui renforcent notre réputation de leader technologique de confiance.
- Diriger, inspirer et développer des équipes de vente et de marketing mondial hautement performantes, intégrer une culture de responsabilité, de collaboration et d'excellence commerciale tout en équipant les équipes des outils, de la formation et des structures dont elles ont besoin pour exécuter à l'échelle.
- Agir en tant que partenaire stratégique pour les principaux intervenants internes, y compris la gestion des produits, le développement des affaires, les opérations, les finances et le leadership régional, en assurant l'harmonisation étroite entre la stratégie commerciale, les priorités de la feuille de route des produits, les capacités de prestation et les objectifs de rendement opérationnel.
- Représenter les entreprises aux plus hauts niveaux dans les engagements des clients et de l'industrie, établir et entretenir des relations avec les cadres supérieurs, diriger les négociations et influencer les organismes de l'industrie, les alliances stratégiques et les partenaires écosystémiques pour faire progresser le leadership d'Hitachi Energy dans l'intégration du réseau et la qualité de l'énergie.
- Conduire l'alignement interfonctionnel pour accélérer la pénétration du marché, assurer une coordination transparente entre les ventes, le marketing, l'appel d'offres, le service et les opérations afin de maximiser les taux de réussite, d'optimiser les stratégies de tarification et d'améliorer la valeur du client tout au long du cycle de vie.
- Superviser les cadres de gouvernance commerciale et les indicateurs de performance, en veillant à ce que les activités de vente mondiales soient exécutées de façon cohérente, éthique et efficace, et à ce que le suivi rigoureux des performances favorise l'amélioration continue et l'agilité stratégique.
- Championne l'innovation et les perspectives de marché, alimente la clientèle, les concurrents et l'intelligence du marché dans l'organisation pour façonner les stratégies futures de produits, orienter les décisions d'investissement et identifier de nouvelles possibilités de croissance.

jobs.title: Field Service Technician Power Transformers (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our dynamic Transformers After Sales team in Zürich, Switzerland, and play a hands-on role in powering the nation! As a key player, you'll be at the forefront of maintaining and enhancing the reliability and longevity of power transformers all across Switzerland. In this role, you'll directly impact the stability of the Swiss electrical grid and get the unique opportunity to work alongside leading companies in the Swiss energy sector. Every day, you'll tackle new technical challenges, ensure the safe and high-quality execution of critical fieldwork, and proudly represent Hitachi Energy's reputation for technical excellence and customer satisfaction. Step into a position where your expertise truly makes a difference! How you´ll make an impact Apply and enforce Hitachi Energy safety standards during all onsite operations. Perform installations, preventive and corrective maintenance, inspections, and overhauls on power transformers in accordance with internal procedures. Plan, coordinate and optimize field interventions to ensure efficiency and quality. Identify potential service opportunities and communicate them to the Sales team. Collaborate closely with customers, project teams, suppliers and other stakeholders, ensuring clear and timely communication. Actively contribute to continuous improvement within the service organization. Complete all reports, documentation and quality records accurately in the internal tracking system. Your background Federal Certificate of Competence (CFC) in mechanics, industrial maintenance, electromechanics, or a related field (e.g., locksmith, mechanic, polymechanic, automation technician). At least 2 years of relevant field experience is considered an asset. Willingness to travel across Switzerland for extended periods (minimum 1 week) and occasionally work in 2×8 shifts. Strong sense of responsibility and high awareness of safety requirements. Valid Category B driver's licence. Good command of German, with English and French as additional working languages. What would be a plus Knowledge of electrical wiring and electrical diagrams Welding skills Motivation to follow internal training on transformer assembly and field interventions, including advanced training in Hitachi Energy factories More about us Exciting and varied responsibilities with plenty of room for autonomy and creativity Attractive opportunities for further training and personal development Interesting and diverse tasks and projects – including international assignments A well ‑ coordinated and dynamic team An open and supportive company culture An attractive compensation package including fixed salary, travel and meal allowances, as well as the opportunity to have a say in accommodation arrangements

titleByLocale.fr: Transformateurs de puissance pour techniciens du Service mobile (f/m/j)

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
L'opportunità di unire il nostro team dinamico Transformers After Sales a Zurigo, in Svizzera, e giocare un ruolo pratico nel potere della nazione! Come giocatore chiave, sarete in prima linea nel mantenere e migliorare l'affidabilità e la longevità dei trasformatori di potenza in tutta la Svizzera. In questo ruolo, influenzerai direttamente la stabilità della rete elettrica svizzera e avrai l'opportunità unica di lavorare insieme a aziende leader nel settore energetico svizzero. Ogni giorno affronterai nuove sfide tecniche, garantirai l'esecuzione sicura e di alta qualità del lavoro sul campo critico e rappresenterai con orgoglio la reputazione di Hitachi Energy per l'eccellenza tecnica e la soddisfazione del cliente. Entra in una posizione in cui la tua esperienza fa davvero la differenza!

Come farai ad avere un impatto
- Applicare e applicare gli standard di sicurezza Hitachi Energy durante tutte le operazioni in loco.
- Eseguire installazioni, manutenzione preventiva e correttiva, ispezioni e revisioni sui trasformatori di potenza secondo procedure interne.
- Pianificare, coordinare e ottimizzare gli interventi sul campo per garantire efficienza e qualità.
- Identificare potenziali opportunità di servizio e comunicarle al team Vendite.
- Collaborare a stretto contatto con clienti, team di progetto, fornitori e altri stakeholder, assicurando una comunicazione chiara e tempestiva.
- Contribuire attivamente al miglioramento continuo all'interno dell'organizzazione del servizio.
- Completa tutti i report, la documentazione e i record di qualità esattamente nel sistema di tracciamento interno.

Requisiti
- Certificato federale di competenza (CFC) in meccanica, manutenzione industriale, elettromeccanica, o un campo correlato (ad esempio, fabbro, meccanico, polimeccanico, automazione tecnico).
- Almeno 2 anni di esperienza in campo rilevante è considerato un bene.
- Volontà di viaggiare attraverso la Svizzera per lunghi periodi (minimo 1 settimana) e occasionalmente lavorare in 2×8 turni.
- forte senso di responsabilità e alta consapevolezza dei requisiti di sicurezza.
- Patente valida della categoria B.
- Buon comando del tedesco, con inglese e francese come lingue di lavoro aggiuntive.

Cosa?
- Conoscenza del cablaggio elettrico e diagrammi elettrici.
- Capacità di saldatura.
- Motivazione per seguire la formazione interna sul montaggio del trasformatore e gli interventi sul campo, compresa la formazione avanzata nelle fabbriche Hitachi Energy.

Ulteriori informazioni su di noi
- Responsabilità emozionanti e varie con ampio spazio per l'autonomia e la creatività.
- Opportunità interessanti per ulteriori formazione e sviluppo personale.
- Compiti e progetti interessanti e diversificati, inclusi incarichi internazionali.
- Un team ben coordinato e dinamico.
- Una cultura aziendale aperta e solidale.
- un pacchetto di compensazione attraente, compreso stipendio fisso, viaggi e assegni pasto, così come l'opportunità di avere una voce nel regime di alloggio.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity to join our dynamic Transformers After Sales team in Zürich, Switzerland, and play a hands-on role in powering the nation! As a key player, you'll be at the forefront of maintaining and enhancing the reliability and longevity of power transformers all across Switzerland. In this role, you'll directly impact the stability of the Swiss electrical grid and get the unique opportunity to work alongside leading companies in the Swiss energy sector. Every day, you'll tackle new technical challenges, ensure the safe and high-quality execution of critical fieldwork, and proudly represent Hitachi Energy's reputation for technical excellence and customer satisfaction. Step into a position where your expertise truly makes a difference!

## How you´ll make an impact
- Apply and enforce Hitachi Energy safety standards during all onsite operations.
- Perform installations, preventive and corrective maintenance, inspections, and overhauls on power transformers in accordance with internal procedures.
- Plan, coordinate and optimize field interventions to ensure efficiency and quality.
- Identify potential service opportunities and communicate them to the Sales team.
- Collaborate closely with customers, project teams, suppliers and other stakeholders, ensuring clear and timely communication.
- Actively contribute to continuous improvement within the service organization.
- Complete all reports, documentation and quality records accurately in the internal tracking system.

## Requisiti
- Federal Certificate of Competence (CFC) in mechanics, industrial maintenance, electromechanics, or a related field (e.g., locksmith, mechanic, polymechanic, automation technician).
- At least 2 years of relevant field experience is considered an asset.
- Willingness to travel across Switzerland for extended periods (minimum 1 week) and occasionally work in 2×8 shifts.
- Strong sense of responsibility and high awareness of safety requirements.
- Valid Category B driver's licence.
- Good command of German, with English and French as additional working languages.

## Cosa offriamo
- Knowledge of electrical wiring and electrical diagrams.
- Welding skills.
- Motivation to follow internal training on transformer assembly and field interventions, including advanced training in Hitachi Energy factories.

## More about us
- Exciting and varied responsibilities with plenty of room for autonomy and creativity.
- Attractive opportunities for further training and personal development.
- Interesting and diverse tasks and projects – including international assignments.
- A well-coordinated and dynamic team.
- An open and supportive company culture.
- An attractive compensation package including fixed salary, travel and meal allowances, as well as the opportunity to have a say in accommodation arrangements.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung
Die Möglichkeit, sich unserem dynamischen Transformers After Sales Team in Zürich, Schweiz, anzuschließen und eine Hand-on-Rolle bei der Macht der Nation zu spielen! Als Schlüsselakteur sind Sie an der Spitze der Aufrechterhaltung und Verbesserung der Zuverlässigkeit und Langlebigkeit von Stromwandlern in der ganzen Schweiz. In dieser Rolle werden Sie die Stabilität des Schweizer Stromnetzes direkt beeinflussen und die einzigartige Möglichkeit erhalten, gemeinsam mit führenden Unternehmen im Schweizer Energiesektor zu arbeiten. Jeden Tag werden Sie neue technische Herausforderungen angehen, die sichere und qualitativ hochwertige Ausführung von kritischen Feldarbeiten sicherstellen und stolz den Ruf von Hitachi Energy für technische Exzellenz und Kundenzufriedenheit vertreten. Treten Sie in eine Position, in der Ihr Know-how wirklich einen Unterschied macht!

Wie Sie einen Einfluss haben
- Anwendung und Durchsetzung von Hitachi-Energie-Sicherheitsstandards während aller Vor-Ort-Betriebe.
- Durchführung von Installationen, vorbeugenden und korrigierenden Wartungen, Inspektionen und Überholungen an Stromwandlern nach internen Verfahren.
- Planen, koordinieren und optimieren Sie Feldeingriffe, um Effizienz und Qualität zu gewährleisten.
- Erkennen Sie potenzielle Service-Möglichkeiten und kommunizieren Sie sie dem Vertriebsteam.
- Mit Kunden, Projektteams, Lieferanten und anderen Stakeholdern eng zusammenarbeiten und eine klare und zeitnahe Kommunikation gewährleisten.
- aktiv zur kontinuierlichen Verbesserung innerhalb der Service-Organisation beitragen.
- Vervollständigen Sie alle Berichte, Dokumentationen und Qualitätsaufzeichnungen genau im internen Trackingsystem.

Voraussetzungen
- Federal Certificate of Competence (CFC) in Mechanik, industrielle Wartung, Elektromechanik oder einem verwandten Bereich (z.B. Schlosser, Mechaniker, Polymechaniker, Automatisierungstechniker).
- Mindestens 2 Jahre relevante Felderfahrung wird als Anlage betrachtet.
- Reisebereitschaft in die Schweiz für längere Zeiträume (mindestens 1 Woche) und gelegentlich in 2×8 Schichten.
- Starkes Verantwortungsgefühl und hohes Bewusstsein für Sicherheitsanforderungen.
- Gültig Kategorie B Führerschein.
- Guter Befehl von Deutsch, mit Englisch und Französisch als zusätzliche Arbeitssprachen.

Cosa offriamo
- Kenntnisse der elektrischen Verdrahtung und elektrischen Diagramme.
- Schweißen Fähigkeiten.
- Motivation, die interne Ausbildung von Transformatoren-Montage- und Feldeingriffen zu verfolgen, einschließlich Fortbildung in Hitachi Energy Fabriken.

Mehr über uns
- Spannende und vielfältige Aufgaben mit viel Raum für Autonomie und Kreativität.
- Attraktive Möglichkeiten für Weiterbildung und persönliche Entwicklung.
- Interessante und vielfältige Aufgaben und Projekte – auch internationale Aufgaben.
- Ein gut koordiniertes und dynamisches Team.
- Eine offene und unterstützende Unternehmenskultur.
- Ein attraktives Vergütungspaket mit festen Gehalts-, Reise- und Mahlzeitenzulagen sowie die Möglichkeit, sich bei der Unterkunft zu äußern.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
L'occasion de rejoindre notre dynamique équipe Transformers After Sales à Zurich, en Suisse, et de jouer un rôle pratique dans le pouvoir de la nation ! En tant que joueur clé, vous serez à l'avant-garde du maintien et de l'amélioration de la fiabilité et de la longévité des transformateurs de puissance partout en Suisse. Dans ce rôle, vous aurez un impact direct sur la stabilité du réseau électrique suisse et aurez l'occasion unique de travailler avec des entreprises de premier plan du secteur énergétique suisse. Chaque jour, vous vous attaquerez à de nouveaux défis techniques, assurerez une exécution sûre et de haute qualité des travaux critiques sur le terrain et représenterez fièrement la réputation d'Hitachi Energy pour son excellence technique et sa satisfaction de la clientèle. Entrez dans une position où votre expertise fait vraiment une différence!

Comment vous ferez un impact
- Appliquer et appliquer les normes de sécurité Hitachi Energy pendant toutes les opérations sur place.
- Effectuer les installations, l'entretien préventif et correctif, les inspections et les révisions des transformateurs de puissance conformément aux procédures internes.
- Planifier, coordonner et optimiser les interventions sur le terrain pour assurer l'efficacité et la qualité.
- Identifier les possibilités de service et les communiquer à l'équipe des ventes.
- Collaborer étroitement avec les clients, les équipes de projet, les fournisseurs et les autres intervenants, en assurant une communication claire et opportune.
- Contribuer activement à l'amélioration continue au sein de l'organisation de services.
- Remplir avec précision tous les rapports, la documentation et les dossiers de qualité dans le système de suivi interne.

Requisiti
- Certificat fédéral de compétence (CFC) en mécanique, entretien industriel, électromécanique ou dans un domaine connexe (par exemple, serrurier, mécanicien, polymécanique, technicien d'automatisation).
- Au moins 2 ans d'expérience sur le terrain sont considérés comme un atout.
- Volonté de voyager à travers la Suisse pendant de longues périodes (minimum 1 semaine) et parfois travailler en 2×8 postes.
- Sens aigu des responsabilités et sensibilisation aux exigences de sécurité.
- Permis de conduire de catégorie B valide.
- Bonne maîtrise de l'allemand, l'anglais et le français étant des langues de travail supplémentaires.

Cosa offriamo
- Connaissance du câblage électrique et des schémas électriques.
- Compétences en soudage.
- La motivation à suivre une formation interne sur l'assemblage des transformateurs et les interventions sur le terrain, y compris une formation avancée dans les usines d'Hitachi Energy.

Plus sur nous
- Des responsabilités passionnantes et variées avec beaucoup de place pour l'autonomie et la créativité.
- Possibilités de formation continue et de perfectionnement personnel.
- Des tâches et des projets intéressants et diversifiés, y compris des missions internationales.
- Une équipe bien coordonnée et dynamique.
- Une culture d'entreprise ouverte et solidaire.
- Une rémunération attrayante comprenant un salaire fixe, des indemnités de voyage et de repas, ainsi que la possibilité d'avoir voix au chapitre dans les arrangements d'hébergement.

jobs.title: R&D Transformer Service Operations domain expert (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity: For our Transformer Global Team we are looking for R&D Transformer Service Operations domain expert (f\/m\/d) In this role you will be responsible for supporting and leading Research and Development projects related to Transformer Service Operations. Your focus will be contribution towards operations around transformer service portfolio, best practices collection, standardization and coordination of improvements within Transformer Service HUBs and local units together with Technology Centers and Research teams. How will you make an impact: Run standardization projects, propose and develop new operational concepts around new services, and simulate their expected performance in real pilots. Organize prototyping and testing activities to validate new \/ existing transformer services. Making standard policies, instructions, training material to ensure the effective implementation of the targeted processes from operational, quality and knowledge transfer standpoint. Provide support to other team member as well as local units when needed (operations, engineering, product management, product marketing, ...) Participate in, and assist team members in a variety of more complex operations activities. Global collaboration with scientists of Hitachi Energy Research team and Technology Centers, Technology Managers and Engineers from the various GPGs (Service \/ PT \/ DT). Your background: MSc education within Electrical or Mechanical Engineering field. More than 10 years of proven experience within Power Transformers operations. Experience in transformer service portfolio within multinational environment will be highly valued. Ability to use effective methodologies around knowledge and experience capture. Ability to create technical and operational documentation, training instructions… Spirit of innovation, out of the box thinking. Excellent abilities in teamwork in international teams with excellent interpersonal skills. A high level of self-motivation. A collaborative, structured, problem-solving, self-driven, solutions-oriented approach and strong communication skills. Fluent spoken and written English. Other languages will be an advantage. More about us: Our employee benefit programs are tailored to each country, depending on location of employment and job grade. More specific information on the employee benefit program offering in your intended country of employment\/ more information will be available during the recruitment process.

jobs.title: ​​Lead Data Platform Architect​
jobs.description: The Opportunity Business Unit Service is at the forefront of delivering advanced digital and outcome ‑ based service solutions worldwide. Our Service R&D organization develops next ‑ generation digital, data ‑ driven, and OT ‑ integrated service solutions that enable long ‑ term asset performance, reliability, and operational excellence across the energy and industrial domain. As Lead Data Platform Architect, you will play a key role in defining and evolving the data platform foundation that underpins BU Service digital service solutions. You will ensure that data platforms spanning cloud services, IoT and OT data sources, analytics, and AI enablement are architected, governed, and operated to support scalable, secure, and high ‑ quality digital solutions. This role directly impacts the success of data ‑ driven services, advanced analytics, and AI ‑ powered use cases, where data quality, availability, and reliability are critical for business value and customer trust. How You'll Make an Impact Defining and owning the data platform strategy and architecture for digital service solutions, covering cloud ‑ native data platforms, data lakes\/ lakehouses , streaming and batch pipelines, and analytics services. Establishing architectural principles and standards aligned with modern cloud delivery models, industrial scalability, and long ‑ lifecycle service solutions. Governing data ingestion and integration patterns from cloud services, enterprise systems, IoT, OT devices, and edge software. Designing and maintaining data models, schemas, and integration patterns that ensure consistent, reusable, and high ‑ quality data across solutions. Establishing and operating data governance frameworks, including data quality, lineage, traceability, ownership, and lifecycle management. Ensuring compliance with cybersecurity, regulatory, and industrial data handling requirements. Enabling advanced analytics, AI\/ML, and digital twin use cases through appropriate data platform capabilities, pipelines, and analytics services. Guiding implementation of robust, scalable data pipelines and storage solutions in collaboration with development, platform, DevOps, AI, cybersecurity, and IT teams. Integrating data platform components into CI\/CD pipelines, supporting automated testing, deployment, and governance controls. Defining and monitoring key metrics related to data quality, platform reliability, usage, and business impact. Your Background University degree (Bachelor's or Master's) in Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field. Proven experience in designing, implementing, or governing cloud ‑ based data platforms in complex digital or industrial environments. Strong understanding of data modeling, data pipelines, and data lifecycle management. Experience with data ingestion from IoT, OT, and enterprise systems. Solid knowledge of data governance, data quality management, and traceability concepts. Experience working in agile, hybrid, or scaled development environments. Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across global, cross ‑ functional teams What's in It for You A strategic leadership role where your work directly shapes the quality and reliability of next ‑ generation digital service solutions The opportunity to operate at enterprise scale, influencing standards, capabilities, and ways of working beyond individual projects A collaborative, technology ‑ driven environment with strong links to innovation, R&D, and service transformation Exposure to complex, real ‑ world digital challenges across cloud, edge, and industrial domains A role designed for experienced professionals who want to combine technical depth with organizational leadership and strategic impact More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefits to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us, in work and out. We can provide mo

As Lead Data Platform Architect, you will play a key role in defining and evolving the data platform foundation that underpins BU Service digital service solutions. You will ensure that data platforms spanning cloud services, IoT and OT data sources, analytics, and AI enablement are architected, governed, and operated to support scalable, secure, and high ‑ quality digital solutions. This role directly impacts the success of data ‑ driven services, advanced analytics, and AI ‑ powered use cases, where data quality, availability, and reliability are critical for business value and customer trust. How You'll Make an Impact Defining and owning the data platform strategy and architecture for digital service solutions, covering cloud ‑ native data platforms, data lakes\/ lakehouses , streaming and batch pipelines, and analytics services. Establishing architectural principles and standards aligned with modern cloud delivery models, industrial scalability, and long ‑ lifecycle service solutions. Governing data ingestion and integration patterns from cloud services, enterprise systems, IoT, OT devices, and edge software. Designing and maintaining data models, schemas, and integration patterns that ensure consistent, reusable, and high ‑ quality data across solutions. Establishing and operating data governance frameworks, including data quality, lineage, traceability, ownership, and lifecycle management. Ensuring compliance with cybersecurity, regulatory, and industrial data handling requirements. Enabling advanced analytics, AI\/ML, and digital twin use cases through appropriate data platform capabilities, pipelines, and analytics services. Guiding implementation of robust, scalable data pipelines and storage solutions in collaboration with development, platform, DevOps, AI, cybersecurity, and IT teams. Integrating data platform components into CI\/CD pipelines, supporting automated testing, deployment, and governance controls. Defining and monitoring key metrics related to data quality, platform reliability, usage, and business impact. Your Background University degree (Bachelor's or Master's) in Data Science, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field. Proven experience in designing, implementing, or governing cloud ‑ based data platforms in complex digital or industrial environments. Strong understanding of data modeling, data pipelines, and data lifecycle management. Experience with data ingestion from IoT, OT, and enterprise systems. Solid knowledge of data governance, data quality management, and traceability concepts. Experience working in agile, hybrid, or scaled development environments. Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate across global, cross ‑ functional teams What's in It for You A strategic leadership role where your work directly shapes the quality and reliability of next ‑ generation digital service solutions The opportunity to operate at enterprise scale, influencing standards, capabilities, and ways of working beyond individual projects A collaborative, technology ‑ driven environment with strong links to innovation, R&D, and service transformation Exposure to complex, real ‑ world digital challenges across cloud, edge, and industrial domains A role designed for experienced professionals who want to combine technical depth with organizational leadership and strategic impact More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefits to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us, in work and out. We can provide mo

jobs.title: Warehouse Specialist 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Du möchtest in einem dynamischen Umfeld arbeiten, Verantwortung übernehmen und aktiv zum reibungslosen Materialfluss beitragen? Dann bist du bei uns genau richtig. Als Warehouse Specialist spielst du eine entscheidende Rolle in unserem Logistikbereich und sorgst dafür, dass Material und Waren termingerecht, sicher und korrekt bewegt, gelagert und bereitgestellt werden. Mit deinem Engagement trägst du dazu bei, Ordnung, Effizienz und Qualität in unseren Lagerprozessen sicherzustellen. Das kannst du bewirken Administrative Tätigkeiten Erfassen und Pflegen von Daten im ERP-System Erstellen von Lieferscheinen, Versandpapieren und internen Dokumenten Bearbeitung von Bestellungen und Rückmeldungen Telefonische und schriftliche Korrespondenz mit internen Stellen und Lieferanten Unterstützung der Logistikleitung bei Auswertungen und Reportings Logistik & Lager Aktive Mitarbeit bei Prozessoptimierung und kontinuierlicher Verbesserung (KVP) Einlagerung der Ware nach vorgegebenen Prozessen Kommissionieren, Verpacken und Versandvorbereitung Be- und Entladen von LKW Durchführung von Inventuren Ordnung und Sauberkeit im Lager sicherstellen Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Logistiker\/in EFZ oder mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Logistik Erfahrung mit administrativen Tätigkeiten von Vorteil Gute PC-Kenntnisse (MS Office, ERP-Systeme SAP \/S4 HANA) Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil Selbstständige, strukturierte und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise Körperlich belastbar und teamfähig Staplerausweis Mehr über uns Sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen Ein kollegiales Team mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen Attraktive Anstellungsbedingungen und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
Volete lavorare in un ambiente dinamico, assumersi la responsabilità e contribuire attivamente al flusso liscio dei materiali? Allora hai ragione con noi. Come Specialista del Magazzino, si gioca un ruolo cruciale nella nostra area logistica e assicurarsi che materiale e merci sono spostati, memorizzati e consegnati in tempo, in modo sicuro e corretto. Con il vostro impegno, contribuite a garantire ordine, efficienza e qualità nei nostri processi di magazzino.

Mansioni
— Attività amministrative
- Raccolta e manutenzione dei dati nel sistema ERP
- Creazione di documenti di spedizione, documenti di spedizione e documenti interni
- Elaborazione di ordini e feedback
- corrispondenza
- Telefono e corrispondenza scritta con enti e fornitori interni
- Supporto per la gestione della logistica
- Sostegno alle valutazioni e alle segnalazioni
- Logistica e stoccaggio
- Cooperazione attiva nell'ottimizzazione dei processi e miglioramento continuo (KVP)
- Conservazione delle merci mediante processi prestabiliti
- Preparazione di prelievo, imballaggio e spedizione
- Caricamento e scarico di camion
- Attuazione dell'inventario
- Garantire l'ordine e la pulizia nel magazzino

Requisiti
- Formazione completa come fornitore di logistica/EFZ o esperienza pluriennale in logistica
- Esperienza con attività amministrative di vantaggio
- Buona conoscenza del PC (MS Office, sistemi ERP SAP/S4 HANA)
- Molto buona conoscenza tedesca in parola e scrittura, conoscenza inglese di vantaggio
- Funzionamento autonomo, strutturato e affidabile
- Fisicamente resiliente e collaborabile
- Carrelli elevatori

Cosa?
- Posto di lavoro sicuro in una società orientata al futuro
- Una squadra collegiale con un breve processo decisionale
- Condizioni di lavoro interessanti e possibilità di sviluppo

Contatto
- Altro su di noi
descriptionByLocale.en:
Descrizione
You want to work in a dynamic environment, take responsibility and actively contribute to the smooth flow of materials? Then you're right with us. As a Warehouse Specialist, you play a crucial role in our logistics area and ensure that material and goods are moved, stored and delivered on time, securely and correctly. With your commitment, you contribute to ensuring order, efficiency and quality in our warehouse processes.

Mansioni
— Administrative activities
- Collection and maintenance of data in the ERP system
- Creating shipping documents, shipping documents and internal documents
- Processing of orders and feedback
- correspondence
- Telephone and written correspondence with internal bodies and suppliers
- Support for logistics management
- Support for evaluations and reporting
- Logistics & Storage
- Active cooperation in process optimization and continuous improvement (KVP)
- Storage of the goods by predetermined processes
- Picking, packaging and shipping preparation
- Loading and unloading of trucks
- Implementation of inventory
- Ensuring order and cleanliness in the warehouse

Requisiti
- Complete training as a logistics provider/EFZ or multi-year experience in logistics
- Experience with administrative activities of advantage
- Good PC knowledge (MS Office, ERP systems SAP/S4 HANA)
- Very good German knowledge in word and writing, English knowledge of advantage
- Self-employed, structured and reliable operation
- Physically resilient and teamable
- Forklift

Cosa offriamo
- Secure workplace in a future-oriented company
- A collegial team with short decision-making
- Attractive employment conditions and development possibilities

Contatto
- More about us
descriptionByLocale.de:
## Descrizione
Über die Position Du möchtest in einem dynamischen Umfeld arbeiten, Verantwortung übernehmen und aktiv zum reibungslosen Materialfluss beitragen? Dann bist du bei uns genau richtig. Als Warehouse Specialist spielst du eine entscheidende Rolle in unserem Logistikbereich und sorgst dafür, dass Material und Waren termingerecht, sicher und korrekt bewegt, gelagert und bereitgestellt werden. Mit deinem Engagement trägst du dazu bei, Ordnung, Effizienz und Qualität in unseren Lagerprozessen sicherzustellen.

## Mansioni
- Administrative Tätigkeiten
  - Erfassen und Pflegen von Daten im ERP-System
  - Erstellen von Lieferscheinen, Versandpapieren und internen Dokumenten
  - Bearbeitung von Bestellungen und Rückmeldungen
- Korrespondenz
  - Telefonische und schriftliche Korrespondenz mit internen Stellen und Lieferanten
- Unterstützung der Logistikleitung
  - Unterstützung bei Auswertungen und Reportings
- Logistik & Lager
  - Aktive Mitarbeit bei Prozessoptimierung und kontinuierlicher Verbesserung (KVP)
  - Einlagerung der Ware nach vorgegebenen Prozessen
  - Kommissionieren, Verpacken und Versandvorbereitung
  - Be- und Entladen von LKW
  - Durchführung von Inventuren
  - Sicherstellung von Ordnung und Sauberkeit im Lager

## Requisiti
- Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Logistiker/EFZ oder mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Logistik
- Erfahrung mit administrativen Tätigkeiten von Vorteil
- Gute PC-Kenntnisse (MS Office, ERP-Systeme SAP/S4 HANA)
- Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil
- Selbstständige, strukturierte und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise
- Körperlich belastbar und teamfähig
- Staplerausweis

## Cosa offriamo
- Sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen
- Ein kollegiales Team mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen
- Attraktive Anstellungsbedingungen und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten

## Contatto
- Mehr über uns
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
Vous voulez travailler dans un environnement dynamique, prendre des responsabilités et contribuer activement au flux fluide des matériaux? Alors tu es avec nous. En tant que spécialiste de l'entreposage, vous jouez un rôle crucial dans notre secteur logistique et vous assurez que le matériel et les marchandises sont déplacés, entreposés et livrés à temps, en toute sécurité et correctement. Avec votre engagement, vous contribuez à assurer l'ordre, l'efficacité et la qualité dans nos processus d'entrepôt.

Mansioni
— Activités administratives
- Collecte et maintenance des données dans le système PGI
- Création de documents d'expédition, documents d'expédition et documents internes
- Traitement des commandes et rétroaction
- correspondance
- Correspondance téléphonique et écrite avec les organismes et fournisseurs internes
- Appui à la gestion logistique
- Appui aux évaluations et aux rapports
- Logistique & Stockage
- Coopération active dans l'optimisation des processus et l'amélioration continue (KVP)
- Stockage des marchandises par des procédés prédéterminés
- Picking, emballage et préparation d'expédition
- Chargement et déchargement des camions
- Mise en œuvre de l ' inventaire
- Assurer l'ordre et la propreté dans l'entrepôt

Requisiti
- Formation complète en tant que fournisseur de logistique/EFZ ou expérience pluriannuelle en logistique
- Expérience des activités administratives d'avantage
- Bonnes connaissances des ordinateurs (Bureau du Département des services administratifs, systèmes ERP SAP/S4 HANA)
- Très bonne connaissance allemande de la parole et de l'écriture, connaissance anglaise de l'avantage
- Travailleur indépendant, structuré et fiable
- Résilient physique et équitable
- Chariot élévateur

Cosa offriamo
- Sécurisation du lieu de travail dans une entreprise tournée vers l'avenir
- Une équipe collégiale avec une courte prise de décision
- Conditions d'emploi attractives et possibilités de développement

Contatto
- Plus sur nous

jobs.title: Vorarbeiter/in Montage 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Als Vorarbeiter in der GI Valves Fabrik in Turgi bzw. Seon übernimmst Du eine zentrale Rolle in der täglichen Produktionssteuerung. Du koordinierst operative Tätigkeiten innerhalb des Teams und sorgst dafür, dass Montage-, Prüf- und Logistikprozesse effizient, sicher und qualitätsgerecht ablaufen. Dabei bist Du die direkte Ansprechperson für die Mitarbeiter und arbeitest eng mit der Produktionsleitung und anderen Schnittstellen zusammen. Dein Einsatz trägt wesentlich dazu bei, dass wir unsere Produktionsziele erreichen und uns kontinuierlich verbessern. Neben koordinativen Tätigkeiten arbeitest Du aktiv im Montageprozess mit. Das kannst du bewirken Organisation und Überwachung der Produktionsabläufe (Montage, Prüfung, Logistik) Unterstützung des Teams sowohl fachlich als auch operativ Einhaltung von Sicherheits-, Qualitäts- und Umweltvorgaben Unterstützung bei der Einarbeitung neuer Mitarbeitender und Durchführung von Sicherheitsunterweisungen Zusammenarbeit mit Schnittstellen wie Planung, Qualität und Logistik sowie Dokumentation der Produktionsleistung Das bringst du mit Technische Berufsausbildung (z. B. Elektrotechnik, Elektroinstallation, Mechatronik) Mehrjährige Erfahrung in der Montage elektrotechnischer Komponenten Erfahrung als Vorarbeiter und gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten Deutsch in Wort und Schrift, Englischkenntnisse von Vorteil SAP-Kenntnisse und Erfahrung mit digitalen Produktionssystemen sind ein Plus Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen dir, deine persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

jobs.title: Product Engineer – Power Semiconductors Packaging (BiMOS) 80 – 100% (m/f/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Product Engineer, you will be a core member of the BiMOS Product Engineering Team, playing a key role at the interface of manufacturing, R&D, and quality. Based in Lenzburg, Switzerland, you will take end-to-end ownership of a product platform and drive its optimization using advanced data analysis and continuous improvement methods. Your work will directly impact product quality, yield, and cost competitiveness in high power semiconductor manufacturing. How you will make an impact Monitor, analyze, and interpret yield and quality data to identify improvement opportunities and drive sustainable enhancements in cost, quality, and yield Lead and execute improvement projects using methodologies such as Six Sigma, Lean Manufacturing, 8D, and related frameworks Take full product ownership after R&D handover, including coordination and monitoring of new product ramp up in the fabrication line Perform root cause analysis and troubleshooting of product defects, weaknesses, and quality issues, deriving clear conclusions on process and design gaps Maintain, enhance, and implement data acquisition, analytics, and reporting methods to support data driven decision making Support process and R&D engineers with strong technical expertise and structured problem-solving approaches Your background Master's degree or PhD in Physics, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline Strong expertise in statistical analysis, problem solving methodologies, and advanced data analysis techniques Semiconductor manufacturing experience is an advantage Proven experience leading complex improvement projects, ideally with small, cross functional teams Comfortable working in an international, matrix organization, with excellent communication and collaboration skills Innovative, quality driven team player with a high willingness to learn and take ownership Very good command of German and English (written and spoken, B2\/C1 level) More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Ingegnere del prodotto – Semiconduttori di potenza Imballaggio (BiMOS) 80 – 100% (m/f/d)

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
L'opportunità In qualità di Product Engineer, sarai un membro fondamentale del team di ingegneria del prodotto BiMOS, giocando un ruolo chiave nell'interfaccia di produzione, R&D e qualità. Con sede a Lenzburg, Svizzera, si prende la proprietà end-to-end di una piattaforma di prodotto e la sua ottimizzazione utilizzando l'analisi avanzata dei dati e metodi di miglioramento continuo. Il vostro lavoro influenzerà direttamente la qualità del prodotto, la resa e la competitività dei costi nella produzione di semiconduttori ad alta potenza.

Come si farà un impatto
- Monitorare, analizzare e interpretare i dati di rendimento e qualità per identificare le opportunità di miglioramento e promuovere miglioramenti sostenibili nei costi, qualità e resa
- Guidare ed eseguire progetti di miglioramento utilizzando metodologie come Six Sigma, Lean Manufacturing, 8D e framework correlati
- Prendere la piena proprietà del prodotto dopo la consegna R&D, compreso il coordinamento e il monitoraggio di nuova rampa di prodotto nella linea di fabbricazione
- Eseguire l'analisi delle cause e la risoluzione dei problemi dei difetti del prodotto, delle debolezze e dei problemi di qualità, derivanti da chiare conclusioni sulle lacune di processo e di progettazione
- Mantenere, migliorare e implementare metodi di acquisizione dei dati, analisi e reporting per supportare il processo decisionale guidato dai dati
- Gli ingegneri del processo di supporto e R&D con una forte competenza tecnica e approcci strutturati di problem solving

Il tuo sfondo
- Laurea magistrale o dottorato in fisica, ingegneria elettrica o disciplina correlata
- Forte competenza nell'analisi statistica, nelle metodologie di problem solving e nelle tecniche di analisi dei dati avanzate
- L'esperienza di produzione dei semiconduttori è un vantaggio
- Esperienza comprovata che conduce progetti di miglioramento complessi, idealmente con piccoli team funzionali
- Confortevole lavoro in un'organizzazione internazionale, matrice, con eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e collaborazione
- Giocatore di squadra innovativo e di qualità con un'alta volontà di imparare e prendere la proprietà
- Ottimo comando di tedesco e inglese (scritto e parlato, livello B2/C1)

Ulteriori informazioni su di noi
Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity As a Product Engineer, you will be a core member of the BiMOS Product Engineering Team, playing a key role at the interface of manufacturing, R&D, and quality. Based in Lenzburg, Switzerland, you will take end-to-end ownership of a product platform and drive its optimization using advanced data analysis and continuous improvement methods. Your work will directly impact product quality, yield, and cost competitiveness in high power semiconductor manufacturing.

## How you will make an impact
- Monitor, analyze, and interpret yield and quality data to identify improvement opportunities and drive sustainable enhancements in cost, quality, and yield
- Lead and execute improvement projects using methodologies such as Six Sigma, Lean Manufacturing, 8D, and related frameworks
- Take full product ownership after R&D handover, including coordination and monitoring of new product ramp up in the fabrication line
- Perform root cause analysis and troubleshooting of product defects, weaknesses, and quality issues, deriving clear conclusions on process and design gaps
- Maintain, enhance, and implement data acquisition, analytics, and reporting methods to support data driven decision making
- Support process and R&D engineers with strong technical expertise and structured problem-solving approaches

## Your background
- Master's degree or PhD in Physics, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline
- Strong expertise in statistical analysis, problem solving methodologies, and advanced data analysis techniques
- Semiconductor manufacturing experience is an advantage
- Proven experience leading complex improvement projects, ideally with small, cross functional teams
- Comfortable working in an international, matrix organization, with excellent communication and collaboration skills
- Innovative, quality driven team player with a high willingness to learn and take ownership
- Very good command of German and English (written and spoken, B2/C1 level)

## More about us
Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung
Die Gelegenheit Als Product Engineer sind Sie ein Kernmitglied des BiMOS Product Engineering Teams und spielen eine Schlüsselrolle an der Schnittstelle von Produktion, R&D und Qualität. Mit Sitz in Lenzburg, Schweiz, übernehmen Sie End-to-End-Eigentum an einer Produktplattform und fahren ihre Optimierung mit fortschrittlichen Datenanalysen und kontinuierlichen Verbesserungsmethoden. Ihre Arbeit wird direkt die Produktqualität, Ertrag und Kosten Wettbewerbsfähigkeit in der Hochleistungshalbleiterfertigung beeinflussen.

Wie Sie eine Wirkung machen
- Überwachen, analysieren und interpretieren Sie Ertrags- und Qualitätsdaten, um Verbesserungsmöglichkeiten zu erkennen und nachhaltige Verbesserungen in Kosten, Qualität und Ertrag zu erzielen
- Führen und Durchführung von Verbesserungsprojekten mit Methoden wie Six Sigma, Lean Manufacturing, 8D und verwandten Rahmen
- Vollständiges Produkteigentum nach R&D-Übergabe, einschließlich Koordinierung und Überwachung neuer Produktaufwetter in der Fertigungslinie
- Führen Sie Root Ursache Analyse und Fehlerbehebung von Produktfehlern, Schwächen und Qualitätsproblemen durch, die klare Schlussfolgerungen zu Prozess- und Designlücken ableiten
- Bereitstellung, Verbesserung und Implementierung von Datenerfassungs-, Analyse- und Berichtsmethoden zur Unterstützung datengesteuerter Entscheidungsfindung
- Unterstützungsprozess und F&D-Ingenieure mit hoher technischer Expertise und strukturierten Problemlösungsansätzen

Ihr Hintergrund
- Master-Abschluss oder Promotion in Physik, Elektrotechnik oder einer verwandten Disziplin
- Starkes Know-how in der statistischen Analyse, Problemlösungsmethoden und fortschrittliche Methoden zur Datenanalyse
- Halbleiterherstellungserfahrung ist ein Vorteil
- Erprobte Erfahrung führende komplexe Verbesserungsprojekte, ideal mit kleinen, Cross-Funktionsteams
- Bequeme Arbeit in einer internationalen, Matrix-Organisation, mit ausgezeichneten Kommunikations- und Kollaborationsfähigkeiten
- Innovativer, qualitätsgetriebener Teamplayer mit hoher Lernbereitschaft und Beteiligung
- Sehr guter Befehl von Deutsch und Englisch (schriftlich und gesprochen, B2/C1-Ebene)

Mehr über uns
Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungsfähigkeit zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
L'opportunité En tant qu'ingénieur de produits, vous serez un membre essentiel de l'équipe d'ingénierie de produits BiMOS, jouant un rôle clé à l'interface de la fabrication, de la R-D et de la qualité. Basé à Lenzburg, en Suisse, vous serez propriétaire d'une plate-forme de produits et piloterez son optimisation en utilisant des méthodes avancées d'analyse de données et d'amélioration continue. Votre travail aura une incidence directe sur la qualité du produit, le rendement et la compétitivité des coûts dans la fabrication de semi-conducteurs à haute puissance.

Comment vous ferez un impact
- Surveiller, analyser et interpréter les données sur le rendement et la qualité afin d'identifier les possibilités d'amélioration et de favoriser des améliorations durables dans les coûts, la qualité et le rendement
- Diriger et exécuter des projets d'amélioration en utilisant des méthodologies telles que Six Sigma, Lean Manufacturing, 8D et des cadres connexes
- Prendre la pleine propriété du produit après le transfert de R-D, y compris la coordination et la surveillance de la montée en puissance du nouveau produit dans la chaîne de fabrication
- Effectuer une analyse des causes profondes et le dépannage des défauts, des faiblesses et des problèmes de qualité des produits, en tirant des conclusions claires sur les lacunes de processus et de conception
- Maintenir, améliorer et mettre en oeuvre des méthodes d'acquisition, d'analyse et de rapport de données pour appuyer la prise de décisions fondées sur les données
- Ingénieurs en processus de soutien et en R-D possédant une solide expertise technique et des approches structurées de résolution de problèmes

Vos antécédents
- Maîtrise ou doctorat en physique, génie électrique ou discipline connexe
- Une solide expertise en analyse statistique, en méthodes de résolution de problèmes et en techniques avancées d ' analyse des données
- L'expérience de fabrication de semiconducteurs est un avantage
- Expérience éprouvée menant des projets d'amélioration complexes, idéalement avec de petites équipes interfonctionnelles
- Travail confortable dans une organisation internationale, matricielle, avec d'excellentes compétences de communication et de collaboration
- Innovant, joueur d'équipe de qualité avec une grande volonté d'apprendre et de s'approprier
- Très bonne maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais (écrit et parlé, niveau B2/C1)

Plus sur nous
Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et professionnelle tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: High Voltage Testing and Process Engineer for Bushings 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity We are looking for a skilled and driven R&D Test and Process Engineer for Bushings with a specialized focus on high voltage (HV) testing and manufacturing process development . This role is critical in ensuring the performance, safety, and compliance of high voltage energy systems through rigorous testing, data analysis, and continuous process optimization. You will play a key role in bridging R&D and manufacturing, supporting the development of innovative energy technologies. How you'll make an impact Lead and execute high voltage testing activities in compliance with IEC, IEEE, and internal standards Design and implement test setups, selecting appropriate HV equipment and methodologies Analyze test data, document results, and support root cause investigations and corrective actions Collaborate with R&D and manufacturing teams to define test strategies and process requirements Drive continuous improvement in testing and prototyping processes to enhance efficiency and quality Ensure proper maintenance, calibration, and safe operation of HV test equipment Support prototyping activities and assess process feasibility in a manufacturing environment Promote a strong safety culture and ensure adherence to ISO 9001, ISO 45001, and company policies Your background Bachelor's or Master's degree in Electrical Engineering Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in high voltage testing. Process engineering experience is a plus. Strong knowledge of HV testing protocols, equipment, and safety practices Familiarity with IEC, IEEE, ISO 9001, and ISO 45001 standards Proficient in analyzing test data and conducting failure analyses Fluent in German and good English knowledge, with excellent communication and problem-solving skills About Us Hitachi Energy offers you interesting tasks in a highly motivated team and an open communication style. Through an individual and practice-oriented induction plan, we will support you to quickly gain professional confidence to be able to work independently with high level of personal responsibility.

jobs.title: Commissioning Engineer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy High Voltage Service supports customers worldwide with after-sales services for generator circuit breakers and gas-insulated switchgear (GIS). The team works closely with customers globally on installation, commissioning, maintenance, retrofitting and modernization. In this role, you will be closely involved with the product and work on construction sites around the world. You will take on responsibility, contribute your own ideas and gain valuable international experience through extended assignments abroad. Continuous learning, teamwork and professional development are an integral part of your daily work. How you'll make an impact Commission and test GIS systems in close cooperation with customer representatives Verify correct system functionality according to specifications and scope of supply Identify deviations and initiate corrective actions with project stakeholders Ensure compliance with site safety regulations and procedures at all times Apply and monitor environmental protection measures on site Participate in site meetings with relevant stakeholders Your background Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Mechanics, or a related field Initial experience in commissioning and\/or control system engineering Fluent German and English communication skills Ability to work independently under challenging site conditions Willingness to travel globally up to 90% of working time More about us We are a technology-driven company with a strong focus on innovation, continuous improvement, and sustainable manufacturing. We offer flexible working conditions, dedicated mentorship, and a supportive, inclusive environment where you can grow personally and professionally – empowering you to thrive while balancing life and work.

jobs.title: Quality Specialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Quality Specialist in Production, you are responsible for ensuring product and process quality, as well as continuously improving our manufacturing operations. You will collaborate closely with Engineering, Production, and Supply Chain to ensure compliance with internal and external quality requirements. How you'll make an impact Create and maintain quality and inspection plans Support new products and production lines, including quality and reliability assessments Participate in PFMEA, DFMEA, and process development activities Monitor critical process parameters and ensure compliance with quality standards Lead NCR management and analyze deviations using methods such as Pareto, 8D, Ishikawa, or 5‑Why Maintain quality‑relevant documentation and support internal\/external audits (incl. customer and ISO) Support the digitalization and automation of the production lines Collaborate with Production, Engineering, Supply Chain, CI, and lead or support quality-related projects and outgoing inspections Your background Technical education or university degree in Quality Management, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science, Production Technology, or a similar field Several years of experience in a production environment, ideally in quality assurance and preferably in a ceramic or silicon molding industry Strong knowledge of quality methods (8D, FMEA, RCA, Control Plans) Experience in auditing and in preparing quality reports Excellent analytical skills and a structured way of working Strong communication skills and a collaborative, solution‑oriented mindset Fluent in German and English, written and spoken Ability to work effectively with cross‑functional teams and stakeholders More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Process Engineer BiMOS Backend 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a global leader in power semiconductor technology, we offer one of the most diverse product portfolios in the industry. Our products include thyristors, diodes, gate turn-off thyristors, integrated gate-commutated thyristors, insulated-gate bipolar transistors, and metal–oxide–semiconductor field-effect transistors. These components are trusted across sectors such as power transmission and distribution, mobility, and renewable energy for their exceptional quality and reliability. In the role of Process Engineer for BiMOS Backend, you will contribute to the advancement of our automated semiconductor production. You'll have the opportunity to improve existing manufacturing processes and lead innovative development projects, with a particular focus on automation and metal joining technologies. How you'll make an impact Improve the capability and quality of bonding and welding processes, by applying data analysis tools and designed experiments Analyze production data to optimize performance, identify long-term trends, and prevent potential failures Work on new automated production systems, improving production capacity and quality Support troubleshooting and root cause analysis to maintain and improve production throughput Collaborate to new product development by shaping the production process landscape and enabling volume manufacturing Your background A master's degree in industrial, mechanical, electrical, or chemical engineering, or a related field Several years of experience in an automated production environment, ideally within the semiconductor industry Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, a quality-focused mindset, and a proactive, hands-on approach Familiarity with DoE, data analysis, Six Sigma methodologies, and production statistics is a plus Proficiency in both German and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

How you'll make an impact Improve the capability and quality of bonding and welding processes, by applying data analysis tools and designed experiments Analyze production data to optimize performance, identify long-term trends, and prevent potential failures Work on new automated production systems, improving production capacity and quality Support troubleshooting and root cause analysis to maintain and improve production throughput Collaborate to new product development by shaping the production process landscape and enabling volume manufacturing Your background A master's degree in industrial, mechanical, electrical, or chemical engineering, or a related field Several years of experience in an automated production environment, ideally within the semiconductor industry Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, a quality-focused mindset, and a proactive, hands-on approach Familiarity with DoE, data analysis, Six Sigma methodologies, and production statistics is a plus Proficiency in both German and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Mechaniker 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Postion In dieser vielseitigen Position als Mechaniker tragen Sie maßgeblich zur Sicherstellung eines reibungslosen Produktionsbetriebs bei. Sie übernehmen anspruchsvolle Instandhaltungs- und Reparaturarbeiten an modernen Maschinen und Anlagen und wirken aktiv an technischen Optimierungen sowie Projekten mit. Ihre Fachkenntnisse in Mechanik, Automation und Steuerungstechnik ermöglichen es Ihnen, Störungen effizient zu analysieren und nachhaltige Lösungen umzusetzen. Dabei arbeiten Sie eng mit verschiedenen Schnittstellen zusammen und leisten einen wichtigen Beitrag zur kontinuierlichen Weiterentwicklung unserer technischen Infrastruktur. Unsere lokale Produktgruppe Insulation & Components ist technischer Marktführer in der Auslegung und Herstellung von Transformatoren-Durchführungen. Zu den Kunden zählen namhafte, internationale Unternehmen der Elektroindustrie, die sich mit Stromerzeugung, Stromübertragung und Stromverteilung befassen. Unsere Hochspannungs-Durchführungen nehmen weltweit eine Spitzenposition ein. Das können Sie bewirken Mechanische Instandsetzungsarbeiten an Maschinen und Anlagen durchführen Wartungs- und Revisionsarbeiten an Maschinen und Anlagen vornehmen Störungssuche- und analyse, sowie Behebung an Produktionsanlage Anpassungen und Umbauten an Produktions- und Infrastrukturanlagen Mitarbeit bei grossen Projekten in Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Schnittstellen Erstellen von Wartungsunterlagen und Pflege Ersatzteilmanagement Das bringen Sie mit Grundausbildung als Mechaniker im Bereich Mechatronik, Maschinen- und Anlagenbau oder Werkzeugbau Berufserfahrung in der Instandhaltung \/ Instandsetzung von Maschinen und Anlagen Kenntnisse im Bereich Automation \/ Steuerungstechnik \/ Antriebstechnik Deutsch (gute Kenntnisse) Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmodelle helfen Ihnen, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und gleichzeitig ein Umfeld zu schaffen, in dem alle Mitarbeitenden befähigt sind und sich entfalten können.
