jobs.title: Teamleiter Instandhaltung 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position In unserem Profit Center Überspannungsableiter in Wettingen produzieren und offerieren wir innovative, zuverlässige und sichere Überspannungsschutzlösungen für die Segmente Stromerzeugung\/-verteilung sowie Railway und Industrie. Unser Anspruch dabei ist, dass wir unsere Kunden auf der ganzen Welt als Technologieführer mit Überspannungsschutzlösungen auf Weltniveau begeistern. Dies erreichen wir durch den stetigen Ausbau unserer Führerschaft in Kerntechnologien wie auch durch die ständige Verbesserung unserer Geschäftsprozesse. Als Teamleiter Instandhaltung führen sie ein Team von 6 Personen tragen Sie die Gesamtverantwortung für die Instandhaltung aller Produktionsanlagen und technischen Systeme in einer hochautomatisierten Prozessfertigungsumgebung. Ziel der Funktion ist die Sicherstellung einer hohen Anlagenverfügbarkeit, maximaler Sicherheit sowie einer effizienten und kostenoptimierten Instandhaltungsorganisation. Sie agieren als strategischer Partner der Geschäftsleitung und führen die Instandhaltung sowohl strategisch als auch operativ. Das können Sie bewirken Strategische und operative Führung der Instandhaltungsorganisation Planung, Steuerung und Umsetzung von Wartungs- und Instandhaltungsmaßnahmen (präventiv, korrektiv und ganzheitliche Instandhaltungskonzepte) Entwicklung und Umsetzung von Instandhaltungsstrategien zur Steigerung von Anlagenverfügbarkeit, Produktivität und Anlagenlebensdauer Fachliche und disziplinarische Führung sowie Weiterentwicklung des Instandhaltungsteams Verantwortung für Budgetplanung, Kostenkontrolle sowie Ersatzteil- und Lagerstrategie Unterstützung von Umbau-, Neubau- und Investitionsprojekten Sicherstellung der Einhaltung von Sicherheits-, Umwelt- und gesetzlichen Vorgaben Kontinuierliche Verbesserung der Instandhaltungsprozesse sowie Einführung digitaler Tools und Kennzahlensysteme Das bringen Sie mit Abgeschlossenes technisches Studium im Bereich Ingenieurwesen, Mechatronik, Elektrotechnik, Automatisierungstechnik oder vergleichbare Qualifikation Mehrjährige Führungs- und Instandhaltungserfahrung in einer Prozess- oder Serienfertigung mit hoher Automatisierung Fundierte Kenntnisse in Automatisierungs-, Roboter- und industriellen Steuerungssystemen Erfahrung mit strukturierten Instandhaltungsansätzen, kontinuierlicher Verbesserung und zustandsorientierter Wartung Erfahrung in der Zusammenarbeit mit interdisziplinären Schnittstellen sowie im Management technischer Investitionsprojekte Analytische, strukturierte und umsetzungsstarke Arbeitsweise mit ausgeprägter Führungskompetenz Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmethoden helfen Ihnen, Ihre persönlichen und beruflichen Leistungen zu optimieren, und schaffen ein Umfeld, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione
Nel nostro Centro Profit, produciamo arresti di sovratensione a Wettingen e offriamo soluzioni di protezione da sovratensioni innovative, affidabili e sicure per i segmenti di produzione/distribuzione di energia e ferrovia e industria. Il nostro obiettivo è quello di ispirare i nostri clienti in tutto il mondo come leader tecnologici con soluzioni di protezione da sovratensioni a livello mondiale. Lo raggiungiamo attraverso la continua espansione della nostra leadership nelle tecnologie di base e il continuo miglioramento dei nostri processi aziendali.

Mansioni
- Come manutenzione del team manager, conducono un team di 6 persone
- Responsabilità complessiva per la manutenzione di tutti gli impianti produttivi e sistemi tecnici in un ambiente di produzione altamente automatizzato
- L'obiettivo della funzione è garantire un'elevata disponibilità degli impianti, la massima sicurezza e l'organizzazione di manutenzione efficiente e ottimizzata ai costi
- Agire come partner strategico della gestione e mantenere sia strategico che operativo

Requisiti
- Gestione strategica e operativa dell'organizzazione di manutenzione
- Pianificazione, controllo e attuazione di misure di manutenzione e manutenzione (concetti di manutenzione preventiva, correttiva e olistica)
- Sviluppo e attuazione di strategie di manutenzione per aumentare la disponibilità degli impianti, la produttività e la vita vegetale
- leadership professionale e disciplinare e ulteriore sviluppo del team di manutenzione
- Responsabilità per la pianificazione del bilancio, il controllo dei costi e le parti di ricambio e la strategia di stoccaggio
- Supporto per la ricostruzione, nuovi progetti di costruzione e investimenti
- Garantire il rispetto dei requisiti di sicurezza, ambientale e legale
- Miglioramento continuo dei processi di manutenzione e introduzione di strumenti digitali e sistemi di pagamento chiave

Cosa?
- Studi tecnici completi in ingegneria, meccatronica, ingegneria elettrica, tecnologia di automazione o qualificazione comparabile
- Esperienza pluriennale di gestione e manutenzione in una produzione di processo o serie con elevata automazione
- Conoscenza dei sistemi di automazione, robot e controllo industriale
- Esperienza con approcci di manutenzione strutturati, miglioramento continuo e manutenzione
- Esperienza in collaborazione con interfacce interdisciplinari e nella gestione di progetti di investimento tecnico
- Analitico, strutturato e ad alta conversione con una forte leadership
- Molto buone competenze in tedesco e inglese

Contatto
- Maggiori informazioni su di noi I nostri metodi di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le tue prestazioni personali e professionali e a creare un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare e crescere le loro competenze.
descriptionByLocale.en:
Descrizione
In our Profit Center, we produce overvoltage arresters in Wettingen and offer innovative, reliable and secure overvoltage protection solutions for the segments power generation/distribution as well as railway and industry. Our goal is to inspire our customers around the world as technology leaders with overvoltage protection solutions at world level. We achieve this through the continuous expansion of our leadership in core technologies as well as the continuous improvement of our business processes.

Mansioni
- As team manager maintenance, they lead a team of 6 people
- Wear the overall responsibility for the maintenance of all production facilities and technical systems in a highly automated process manufacturing environment
- The aim of the function is to ensure high plant availability, maximum safety and efficient and cost-optimized maintenance organization
- Act as a strategic partner of the management and maintain both strategic and operational

Requisiti
- Strategic and operational management of the maintenance organisation
- Planning, control and implementation of maintenance and maintenance measures (preventive, corrective and holistic maintenance concepts)
- Development and implementation of maintenance strategies to increase plant availability, productivity and plant life
- Professional and disciplinary leadership and further development of the maintenance team
- Responsibility for budget planning, cost control and spare parts and storage strategy
- Support for reconstruction, new construction and investment projects
- Ensure compliance with safety, environmental and legal requirements
- Continuous improvement of maintenance processes and introduction of digital tools and key payment systems

Cosa offriamo
- Complete technical studies in engineering, mechatronics, electrical engineering, automation technology or comparable qualification
- Multiannual management and maintenance experience in a process or series production with high automation
- Knowledge of automation, robot and industrial control systems
- Experience with structured maintenance approaches, continuous improvement and maintenance
- Experience in cooperation with interdisciplinary interfaces and in the management of technical investment projects
- Analytical, structured and high-conversion working with a strong leadership
- Very good German and English skills

Contatto
- More about us Our flexible working methods help you optimize your personal and professional performance, and create an environment where all employees can develop and grow their skills.

descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
Dans notre centre de profit, nous produisons des pare-chocs à Wettingen et offrons des solutions innovantes, fiables et sécurisées de protection contre les surtensions pour les segments production/distribution d'énergie ainsi que ferroviaire et industriel. Notre objectif est d'inspirer nos clients à travers le monde en tant que leaders technologiques avec des solutions de protection surtension au niveau mondial. Nous y parvenons grâce à l'expansion continue de notre leadership dans les technologies de base ainsi qu'à l'amélioration continue de nos processus opérationnels.

Mansioni
- En tant que responsable de maintenance, ils dirigent une équipe de 6 personnes
- Porter la responsabilité globale de la maintenance de toutes les installations de production et systèmes techniques dans un environnement de fabrication hautement automatisé
- L'objectif de la fonction est d'assurer une grande disponibilité des installations, une sécurité maximale et une organisation d'entretien efficace et rentable
- Agir en tant que partenaire stratégique de la gestion et maintenir à la fois stratégique et opérationnel

Requisiti
- Gestion stratégique et opérationnelle de l'organisme de maintenance
- Planification, contrôle et mise en œuvre des mesures d'entretien et d'entretien (concepts d'entretien préventif, correctif et holistique)
- Élaboration et mise en œuvre de stratégies d'entretien visant à accroître la disponibilité, la productivité et la vie des plantes
- Direction professionnelle et disciplinaire et perfectionnement de l ' équipe de maintenance
- Responsabilité de la planification budgétaire, du contrôle des coûts, des pièces de rechange et de la stratégie de stockage
- Appui à la reconstruction, aux nouveaux projets de construction et d ' investissement
- Assurer le respect des exigences en matière de sécurité, d ' environnement et de droit
- Amélioration continue des processus de maintenance et introduction d'outils numériques et de systèmes de paiement clés

Cosa offriamo
- Études techniques complètes en ingénierie, mécatronique, génie électrique, technologie d'automatisation ou qualification comparable
- Expérience multiannuelle de gestion et de maintenance dans un processus ou une série de production à haute automatisation
- Connaissance des systèmes d'automatisation, robot et de contrôle industriel
- Expérience des méthodes d'entretien structuré, amélioration continue et entretien
- Expérience en coopération avec les interfaces interdisciplinaires et en gestion de projets d'investissement technique
- Analyse, structure et haute conversion travaillant avec un leadership fort
- Très bonnes compétences en allemand et en anglais

Contatto
- En savoir plus sur nous Nos méthodes de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser vos performances personnelles et professionnelles, et à créer un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer et développer leurs compétences.

jobs.title: Global IT Manager for Business Unit Grid Automation
jobs.description: The opportunity The Grid Automation Business Unit of Hitachi Energy is seeking a dynamic Global IT Leader for the role of Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, to lead an existing team of over forty IT Professionals in supporting and advancing Grid Automation's global businesses and digital IT transformation initiatives. Business Solution Teams (BSTs) in each Business Unit (BU) have complete responsibility for managing BU-specific applications and Infrastructure services, including service delivery. They oversee and control these applications and services while adhering to global governance and security standards. BSTs design and implement the IT Roadmap and Application Landscape for their respective BUs to align with business requirements. They closely collaborate with global departments to help deliver function-wide applications and enterprise platforms. How you will make an impact Lead Business relationship management with BUs including BST Leadership and guidance across BU\/HUB\/GPG\/Functions. Lead IT Demand Mgt to meet Business requirements. Management and governance of the BST IT organization to support and deliver on Demand priorities. Accountable for Application Management for BU specific applications, Infrastructure\/ Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. Support IT\/OT Cybersecurity Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. Digital Transformation IT Build Deployments to support growth of business. Accountable for the total IT offering to the business and provide interface to relevant IT partners, articulating the needs of the business to the relevant IT partners to ensure impactful support to the business. Ensure alignment of IT roadmap to business needs through communication and active feedback loops between stakeholders and IT organization. Define and implement strategic IT priorities in the organization in line with BU strategy and Strategic Business initiatives, covering business functions application landscape, utilizing the existing IT solutions portfolio or ensuring to provide new solutions, where appropriate. Understand the business demands, the current and long-term business strategy and translate them into opportunities for IT to add value to the business. Implement and ensure compliance with global and local standards, tools, processes related to operations\/projects execution. Analyze results of internal and external audits and identify common areas of improvement within the organization. Provide the BU escalation point for all IT related issues. Responsible for BST budget and investments and creating transparency on business unit IT costs. Setting standard documentation for audits and their records, findings and reports. Develop and share best practices across BST community. Foster communication between BU and IT organization. Ensure (with HR support) that the area of responsibility is properly organized, staffed, skilled and directed. Guides, motivates and develops direct and indirect subordinates within HR policies, for the benefit of both company and the employee. Your background Minimum 15+ years of professional working experience in IT. 10+ years' experience working in global and diverse organizations with understanding of Infrastructure, Applications and platforms. A bachelor's degree is required; a master's degree is preferred. Strong written and verbal communication skills. Highly organized with attention to detail. Proven success working in matrixed organizations. Capable of successfully leading remote teams across multiple time zones More about us: Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader that is advancing a sustainable energy future for all. We serve customers in the utility, industry and infrastructure sectors with innovative solutions and services across the value chain. Together with customers and partners, we pioneer technologies and enable the digital transformation required to accelerate the energy transition towards

titleByLocale.it: Global IT Manager per Business Unit Grid Automation
titleByLocale.en: Global IT Manager for Business Unit Grid Automation
titleByLocale.de: Globaler IT-Manager für Business Unit Grid Automation
titleByLocale.fr: Global IT Manager pour l'automatisation du réseau d'unités d'affaires

descriptionByLocale.it: L'occasione The Grid Automation Business Unit di Hitachi Energy è alla ricerca di un Global IT Leader dinamico per il ruolo di Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, per guidare un team esistente di oltre quaranta professionisti IT nel sostenere e promuovere le attività globali di Grid Automation e le iniziative di trasformazione IT digitale. Business Solution Teams (BSTs) in ogni Business Unit (BU) hanno la completa responsabilità per la gestione delle applicazioni specifiche BU e dei servizi di infrastruttura, compresa la consegna dei servizi. Essi supervisionano e controllano queste applicazioni e servizi, rispettando gli standard di governance e sicurezza globali. BST progetta e implementa la Roadmap IT e Application Landscape per i rispettivi BU per allineare con i requisiti aziendali. Collaborano strettamente con i dipartimenti globali per aiutare a fornire applicazioni e piattaforme aziendali a livello di funzionalità. Come farete un impatto Lead Business Relations management con BUs, tra cui BST Leadership e guida attraverso BU\/HUB\/GPG\/Functions. Lead IT Demand Mgt per soddisfare i requisiti aziendali. Gestione e governance dell'organizzazione BST IT per sostenere e fornire le priorità della domanda. Contabile per la gestione delle applicazioni per applicazioni specifiche BU, Infrastructure\// Insite Service Delivery Operational Management dei Siti assegnati BST. Supporto IT\/OT Cybersecurity Servizio in loco Gestione operativa dei siti assegnati BST. Digital Transformation IT Build Distribuzioni per sostenere la crescita del business. Contabile per l'offerta IT totale al business e fornire l'interfaccia ai partner IT rilevanti, articolando le esigenze del business ai partner IT rilevanti per garantire un supporto efficace al business. Assicurare l'allineamento della roadmap IT alle esigenze aziendali attraverso la comunicazione e i loop di feedback attivi tra gli stakeholder e l'organizzazione IT. Definire e implementare le priorità IT strategiche nell'organizzazione in linea con la strategia BU e le iniziative strategiche di Business, coprendo il panorama delle applicazioni delle funzioni aziendali, utilizzando il portafoglio soluzioni IT esistente o garantendo nuove soluzioni, se del caso. Comprendere le esigenze aziendali, la strategia aziendale attuale e a lungo termine e tradurli in opportunità per IT per aggiungere valore al business. Implementare e garantire la conformità a standard globali e locali, strumenti, processi relativi all'esecuzione di operazioni\/progetti. Analizzare i risultati delle verifiche interne ed esterne e identificare le aree comuni di miglioramento all'interno dell'organizzazione. Fornire il punto di escalation BU per tutti i problemi relativi IT. Responsabile del bilancio BST e degli investimenti e della trasparenza sui costi dell'unità aziendale IT. Impostare la documentazione standard per gli audit e i loro record, risultati e report. Sviluppare e condividere le migliori pratiche in tutta la comunità BST. Promuovere la comunicazione tra BU e l'organizzazione IT. Assicurare (con il supporto HR) che l'area di responsabilità sia adeguatamente organizzata, personale, qualificata e diretta. Guide, motiva e sviluppa subalterni diretti e indiretti all'interno delle politiche HR, a beneficio sia dell'azienda che del dipendente. Esperienza lavorativa professionale minima di 15+ anni in IT. Esperienza di 10+ anni che lavora in organizzazioni globali e diversificate con la comprensione di Infrastrutture, Applicazioni e piattaforme. È richiesto un diploma di laurea; un master è preferito. Forte capacità di comunicazione scritta e verbale. Altamente organizzato con attenzione ai dettagli. E' stato un successo a lavorare in organizzazioni matrici. La Hitachi Energy è un leader tecnologico globale che sta promuovendo un futuro energetico sostenibile per tutti. Serviamo i clienti nei settori dell'utilità, dell'industria e delle infrastrutture con soluzioni e servizi innovativi in tutta la catena del valore. Insieme a clienti e partner, pionieri delle tecnologie e consentiamo la trasformazione digitale necessaria per accelerare la transizione energetica verso
descriptionByLocale.en: The opportunity The Grid Automation Business Unit of Hitachi Energy is seeking a dynamic Global IT Leader for the role of Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, to lead an existing team of over forty IT Professionals in supporting and advancing Grid Automation's global businesses and digital IT transformation initiatives. Business Solution Teams (BSTs) in each Business Unit (BU) have complete responsibility for managing BU-specific applications and Infrastructure services, including service delivery. They oversee and control these applications and services while adhering to global governance and security standards. BSTs design and implement the IT Roadmap and Application Landscape for their respective BUs to align with business requirements. They closely collaborate with global departments to help deliver function-wide applications and enterprise platforms. How you will make an impact Lead Business relationship management with BUs including BST Leadership and guidance across BU\/HUB\/GPG\/Functions. Lead IT Demand Mgt to meet Business requirements. Management and governance of the BST IT organization to support and deliver on Demand priorities. Accountable for Application Management for BU specific applications, Infrastructure\/ Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. Support IT\/OT Cybersecurity Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management of BST assigned Sites. Digital Transformation IT Build Deployments to support growth of business. Accountable for the total IT offering to the business and provide interface to relevant IT partners, articulating the needs of the business to the relevant IT partners to ensure impactful support to the business. Ensure alignment of IT roadmap to business needs through communication and active feedback loops between stakeholders and IT organization. Define and implement strategic IT priorities in the organization in line with BU strategy and Strategic Business initiatives, covering business functions application landscape, utilizing the existing IT solutions portfolio or ensuring to provide new solutions, where appropriate. Understand the business demands, the current and long-term business strategy and translate them into opportunities for IT to add value to the business. Implement and ensure compliance with global and local standards, tools, processes related to operations\/projects execution. Analyze results of internal and external audits and identify common areas of improvement within the organization. Provide the BU escalation point for all IT related issues. Responsible for BST budget and investments and creating transparency on business unit IT costs. Setting standard documentation for audits and their records, findings and reports. Develop and share best practices across BST community. Foster communication between BU and IT organization. Ensure (with HR support) that the area of responsibility is properly organized, staffed, skilled and directed. Guides, motivates and develops direct and indirect subordinates within HR policies, for the benefit of both company and the employee. Your background Minimum 15+ years of professional working experience in IT. 10+ years' experience working in global and diverse organizations with understanding of Infrastructure, Applications and platforms. A bachelor's degree is required; a master's degree is preferred. Strong written and verbal communication skills. Highly organized with attention to detail. Proven success working in matrixed organizations. Capable of successfully leading remote teams across multiple time zones More about us: Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader that is advancing a sustainable energy future for all. We serve customers in the utility, industry and infrastructure sectors with innovative solutions and services across the value chain. Together with customers and partners, we pioneer technologies and enable the digital transformation required to accelerate the energy transition towards
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Gelegenheit Die Grid Automation Business Unit von Hitachi Energy sucht einen dynamischen Global IT Leader für die Rolle von Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, um ein bestehendes Team von über vierzig IT-Experten bei der Unterstützung und Weiterentwicklung von Grid Automations globalen Unternehmen und digitalen IT-Transformationsinitiativen zu leiten. Business Solution Teams (BSTs) in jeder Business Unit (BU) haben die volle Verantwortung für die Verwaltung von BU-spezifischen Anwendungen und Infrastrukturdienstleistungen, einschließlich Service-Lieferung. Sie überwachen und kontrollieren diese Anwendungen und Dienstleistungen und haften dabei an globalen Governance- und Sicherheitsstandards. BSTs entwerfen und implementieren die IT Roadmap und Application Landscape für ihre jeweiligen BUs, um sich an die Geschäftsanforderungen anzupassen. Sie arbeiten eng mit globalen Abteilungen zusammen, um funktionsweite Anwendungen und Unternehmensplattformen zu liefern. Wie Sie einen Einfluss auf Lead Business-Beziehungsmanagement mit BUs einschließlich BST Leadership und Beratung über BU\/HUB\/GPG\/Functions. Führen Sie IT-Anforderung Mgt, um die Anforderungen des Unternehmens zu erfüllen. Management und Governance der BST IT-Organisation, um die Prioritäten der Nachfrage zu unterstützen und zu liefern. Bezahlbar für Anwendungsmanagement für BU-spezifische Anwendungen, Infrastruktur\/ Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management von BST zugewiesenen Websites. Support IT\/OT Cybersecurity Onsite Service Delivery Operational Management von BST zugewiesenen Websites. Digitale Transformation IT Erstellt Maßnahmen zur Unterstützung des Unternehmenswachstums. Rechenschaftlich für das gesamte IT-Angebot für das Unternehmen und bieten Schnittstelle zu relevanten IT-Partnern, die Bedürfnisse des Unternehmens an die relevanten IT-Partner zu artikulieren, um eine wirkungsvolle Unterstützung für das Unternehmen zu gewährleisten. Stellen Sie die Ausrichtung der IT-Roadmap auf die geschäftlichen Bedürfnisse durch Kommunikation und aktive Feedback-Schleifen zwischen Stakeholdern und IT-Organisation sicher. Definieren und implementieren Sie strategische IT-Prioritäten in der Organisation im Einklang mit BU-Strategie und Strategischen Business-Initiativen, die Business-Funktionen Anwendungslandschaft abdecken, das bestehende IT-Lösungen-Portfolio nutzen oder sicherstellen, gegebenenfalls neue Lösungen bereitzustellen. Verstehen Sie die Geschäftsanforderungen, die aktuelle und langfristige Geschäftsstrategie und übersetzen Sie sie in Möglichkeiten für IT, um Mehrwert für das Unternehmen zu schaffen. Umsetzung und Gewährleistung der Einhaltung globaler und lokaler Standards, Werkzeuge, Prozesse im Zusammenhang mit der Ausführung von Operationen/Projekten. Analyse der Ergebnisse interner und externer Audits und Identifizierung gemeinsamer Verbesserungsbereiche innerhalb der Organisation. Geben Sie den BU-Eskalationspunkt für alle IT-relevanten Fragen an. Verantwortlich für den BST-Haushalt und Investitionen und die Schaffung von Transparenz für die IT-Kosten der Geschäftseinheit. Standarddokumentation für Audits und deren Aufzeichnungen, Ergebnisse und Berichte. Entwickeln und teilen Sie Best Practices in der BST-Community. Foster Kommunikation zwischen BU und IT-Organisation. Stellen Sie sicher (mit HR-Unterstützung), dass der Zuständigkeitsbereich ordnungsgemäß organisiert, bedienstet, qualifiziert und geleitet ist. Führungen, motiviert und entwickelt direkte und indirekte Untergebene innerhalb der HR-Politik, zum Nutzen von Unternehmen und Arbeitnehmer. Ihr Hintergrund Mindestens 15+ Jahre Berufserfahrung in der IT. 10+ Jahre Erfahrung in globalen und vielfältigen Organisationen mit dem Verständnis von Infrastruktur, Anwendungen und Plattformen. Ein Bachelor-Abschluss ist erforderlich; ein Master-Abschluss ist bevorzugt. Starke schriftliche und verbale Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. Hoch organisiert mit Liebe zum Detail. Bewiesener Erfolg in Matrix-Organisationen. Hitachi Energy ist ein weltweit führender Technologieführer, der für alle eine nachhaltige Energie Zukunft vorantreibt. Wir bedienen Kunden in den Bereichen Energieversorgung, Industrie und Infrastruktur mit innovativen Lösungen und Dienstleistungen in der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette. Gemeinsam mit Kunden und Partnern sind wir Pioniertechnologien und ermöglichen die digitale Transformation, die erforderlich ist, um den Energiewandel in Richtung
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'occasion La Grid Automation Business Unit de Hitachi Energy cherche un leader informatique mondial dynamique pour le rôle de Global BST Manager, Grid Automation, pour diriger une équipe existante de plus de quarante professionnels de l'informatique dans le soutien et la progression des entreprises mondiales de Grid Automation et des initiatives de transformation informatique numérique. Les équipes de solutions d'affaires (ETB) de chaque unité opérationnelle (UB) sont entièrement responsables de la gestion des applications spécifiques à l'UB et des services d'infrastructure, y compris la prestation des services. Ils supervisent et contrôlent ces applications et services tout en respectant les normes mondiales de gouvernance et de sécurité. Les BST conçoivent et mettent en œuvre la feuille de route informatique et le paysage d'application pour leurs UB respectives afin de les aligner sur les exigences opérationnelles. Ils collaborent étroitement avec les départements mondiaux pour fournir des applications à l'échelle de la fonction et des plateformes d'entreprise. Comment vous ferez un impact Diriger la gestion des relations d'affaires avec les BU, y compris le leadership et les conseils en matière de BU\/HUB\/GPG\/Functions. Diriger la demande de TI Mgt pour répondre aux exigences opérationnelles. Gestion et gouvernance de l'organisme de TI de la BST pour appuyer et réaliser les priorités de la demande. Responsable de la gestion de l'application pour les applications spécifiques de la BU, Infrastructure\/ Prestation de services sur place Gestion opérationnelle des sites assignés à la BST. Soutien à la cybersécurité sur place Gestion opérationnelle des sites assignés à la TVB. Transformation numérique Construction des TI Déploiements pour soutenir la croissance des entreprises. Responsable de l'offre totale de TI à l'entreprise et fournit une interface aux partenaires informatiques pertinents, en articulant les besoins de l'entreprise aux partenaires informatiques concernés afin d'assurer un soutien efficace à l'entreprise. Assurer l'alignement de la feuille de route de la TI sur les besoins opérationnels par la communication et des boucles de rétroaction actives entre les intervenants et l'organisation de la TI. Définir et mettre en œuvre les priorités stratégiques en matière de TI dans l'organisation conformément à la stratégie de l'UB et aux initiatives stratégiques en matière d'affaires, en couvrant le paysage des applications des fonctions opérationnelles, en utilisant le portefeuille de solutions informatiques existant ou en veillant à fournir de nouvelles solutions, le cas échéant. Comprendre les exigences de l'entreprise, la stratégie d'affaires actuelle et à long terme et les traduire en occasions pour les TI d'ajouter de la valeur à l'entreprise. Mettre en oeuvre et assurer le respect des normes, outils et processus mondiaux et locaux liés à l'exécution des opérations/projets. Analyser les résultats des vérifications internes et externes et déterminer les domaines d'amélioration communs au sein de l'organisation. Fournir le point d'escalade BU pour toutes les questions liées à la TI. Responsable du budget et des investissements de la BST et de la transparence des coûts informatiques unitaires. Établissement de documents normalisés pour les vérifications et leurs dossiers, constatations et rapports. Élaborer et partager des pratiques exemplaires dans la collectivité de la TVB. Favoriser la communication entre l'UB et l'organisation informatique. Veiller (avec le soutien des RH) à ce que le domaine de responsabilité soit bien organisé, doté de personnel, qualifié et dirigé. Guider, motiver et développer des subordonnés directs et indirects dans le cadre des politiques des RH, au profit de l'entreprise et de l'employé. Votre expérience Au moins 15 ans d'expérience professionnelle dans le domaine de l'informatique. 10 ans d'expérience dans des organisations mondiales et diverses avec une compréhension de l'infrastructure, des applications et des plateformes. Un baccalauréat est requis; une maîtrise est préférée. Forte capacité de communication écrite et verbale. Très organisé avec attention au détail. Un succès avéré dans les organisations matricielles. Capable de diriger avec succès des équipes éloignées sur plusieurs fuseaux horaires Plus d'infos sur nous : Hitachi Energy est un leader technologique mondial qui fait progresser un avenir énergétique durable pour tous. Nous servons nos clients dans les secteurs des services publics, de l'industrie et de l'infrastructure avec des solutions et des services innovants tout au long de la chaîne de valeur. Avec les clients et les partenaires, nous sommes les pionniers des technologies et nous permettons la transformation numérique nécessaire pour accélérer la transition énergétique vers

jobs.title: Global BU Sales Leader - Grid Automation
jobs.description: Join Hitachi Energy's Grid Automation business as our Global Head of Sales. You will lead a global team driving commercial strategy and sales execution across a portfolio that includes enterprise software, automation and communications, power conversion solutions and services. This is a high-impact leadership role at the center of our global go-to-market transformation (Suisen)—focused on customer connection, agility, empowerment, and commercial excellence. You will work across product lines and regions to align diverse sales teams and deliver growth, while shaping how we serve customers in a rapidly evolving energy landscape. The location of this role is flexible globally and will be determined in subsequent stages. How You'll Make an Impact Lead global sales performance across all Grid Automation offerings. Manage a small central team of industry leaders and functional experts focused on global sales strategy and governance. Provide dotted-line leadership to sales leaders in global product groups and regional hubs. Align multiple sales operating models under a unified go-to-market strategy. Drive forecasting discipline, pipeline health, and deal governance. Champion customer-first sales execution and strategic account leadership. Accelerate growth in software, digital, and lifecycle-based offerings. Expand reach through partner ecosystems and channel programs. Collaborate with regional, product, and functional leaders to ensure execution. Lead through transformation, simplifying structures and empowering teams. Your Background 15+ years in global sales leadership roles in energy, software, or industrial sectors. Proven success managing complex, matrixed sales organizations. Experience leading sales transformation or go-to-market redesigns. Strong commercial acumen and forecasting discipline. Familiarity with enterprise software, automation, and power systems. Executive presence and ability to influence across functions and geographies. Bachelor's degree required; advanced degree preferred. Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.

jobs.title: Technical Buyer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Hitachi Energy, High Voltage Products, is renowned worldwide as a specialist for power transmission and distribution. The Service unit is responsible for the worldwide after sales support of generator circuit-breaker (GCB) systems and gas insulated switchgears (GIS), including training, installation and commissioning, scheduled maintenance, added value services, troubleshooting, extensions, retrofits and replacements. As a Technical Buyer, you act as a key interface between Procurement, Engineering, Quality, and our global supplier network. You ensure that technically specified materials, components, and services are clearly defined, technically clarified, qualified, and available in line with project, quality, and delivery requirements. Through close cross‑functional collaboration, you translate engineering requirements into robust sourcing solutions and support supplier qualification and technical alignment. Your role contributes directly to product quality, supply reliability, and operational excellence, enabling Hitachi Energy to deliver innovative and sustainable energy solutions to our customers worldwide. How you'll make an impact Perform technical clarification of materials, drawings, specifications, and engineering changes in close collaboration with Engineering and suppliers Support and coordinate Production Part Approval Process (PPAP) activities, first samples, and supplier qualification processes Conduct technical evaluations of alternative materials, deviation requests, and obsolescence cases Collaborate closely with Strategic and Operational Buyers on supplier- and material-related topics Support the handling of supplier complaints, Non‑Conformity Reports (NCRs), and root cause analyses Support and participate in supplier assessments and technical supplier evaluations, including capability, quality, and process maturity reviews Contribute to supplier performance evaluations together with Quality and Strategic Procurement Ensure accuracy and completeness of material and supplier master data in SAP and act as the technical contact point during supplier escalations Support Service Organization and Project Teams in complex or urgent procurement topics Your background Completed technical education (e.g. Polymechanic, Automation Technician, Mechanical Technician, Design Engineer or similar) 3-5 years experience in technical procurement or SCM‑related roles Strong understanding of technical drawings, Bill of Material and manufacturing processes Experience working with suppliers on technical and quality‑related topics Structured, solution‑oriented, and communicative working style Good German skills and very good English skills SAP knowledge Proactive, structured, and solution-focused working style. Team oriented mindset with strong cross-functional collaboration More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: L'occasione Hitachi Energy, prodotti ad alta tensione, è rinomata in tutto il mondo come specialista per la trasmissione e la distribuzione di energia. L'unità di servizio è responsabile per il mondo dopo il supporto di vendita di sistemi generatore-rompatore (GCB) e commutatori isolati a gas (GIS), tra cui formazione, installazione e messa in servizio, manutenzione programmata, servizi di valore aggiunto, risoluzione dei problemi, estensioni, retrofit e sostituzioni. Come Acquirente Tecnico, si agisce come un'interfaccia chiave tra Procurement, Ingegneria, Qualità e la nostra rete di fornitori globale. Assicurarsi che materiali, componenti e servizi tecnicamente specificati siano chiaramente definiti, tecnicamente chiariti, qualificati e disponibili in linea con i requisiti di progetto, qualità e consegna. Attraverso una stretta collaborazione interfunzionale, traduci i requisiti di ingegneria in soluzioni di sourcing robuste e supporta la qualificazione dei fornitori e l'allineamento tecnico. Il vostro ruolo contribuisce direttamente alla qualità del prodotto, all'affidabilità e all'eccellenza operativa, consentendo a Hitachi Energy di fornire soluzioni energetiche innovative e sostenibili ai nostri clienti in tutto il mondo. Competenze tecniche di progettazione e di analisi dei materiali e dei processi di qualificazione dei fornitori di servizi. Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.

Through close cross‑functional collaboration, you translate engineering requirements into robust sourcing solutions and support supplier qualification and technical alignment. Your role contributes directly to product quality, supply reliability, and operational excellence, enabling Hitachi Energy to deliver innovative and sustainable energy solutions to our customers worldwide. How you'll make an impact Perform technical clarification of materials, drawings, specifications, and engineering changes in close collaboration with Engineering and suppliers Support and coordinate Production Part Approval Process (PPAP) activities, first samples, and supplier qualification processes Conduct technical evaluations of alternative materials, deviation requests, and obsolescence cases Collaborate closely with Strategic and Operational Buyers on supplier- and material-related topics Support the handling of supplier complaints, Non‑Conformity Reports (NCRs), and root cause analyses Support and participate in supplier assessments and technical supplier evaluations, including capability, quality, and process maturity reviews Contribute to supplier performance evaluations together with Quality and Strategic Procurement Ensure accuracy and completeness of material and supplier master data in SAP and act as the technical contact point during supplier escalations Support Service Organization and Project Teams in complex or urgent procurement topics Your background Completed technical education (e.g. Polymechanic, Automation Technician, Mechanical Technician, Design Engineer or similar) 3-5 years experience in technical procurement or SCM‑related roles Strong understanding of technical drawings, Bill of Material and manufacturing processes Experience working with suppliers on technical and quality‑related topics Structured, solution‑oriented, and communicative working style Good German skills and very good English skills SAP knowledge Proactive, structured, and solution-focused working style. Team oriented mindset with strong cross-functional collaboration More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Chance Hitachi Energy, High Voltage Products, ist weltweit als Spezialist für Stromübertragung und -verteilung bekannt. Die Service-Einheit ist für die weltweite nach dem Vertrieb von Generator-Schalter (GCB)-Systemen und gasisolierten Schaltanlagen (GIS) verantwortlich, einschließlich Schulung, Installation und Inbetriebnahme, geplante Wartung, Mehrwertdienste, Fehlersuche, Erweiterungen, Nachrüstungen und Ersatz. Als Technischer Käufer fungieren Sie als zentrale Schnittstelle zwischen Beschaffung, Engineering, Qualität und unserem weltweiten Lieferantennetzwerk. Sie stellen sicher, dass technisch spezifizierte Materialien, Komponenten und Dienstleistungen klar definiert, technisch geklärt, qualifiziert und gemäß Projekt-, Qualitäts- und Lieferanforderungen verfügbar sind. Durch eine enge funktionsübergreifende Zusammenarbeit übersetzen Sie technische Anforderungen in robuste Beschaffungslösungen und unterstützen die Lieferantenqualifikation und technische Ausrichtung. Ihre Rolle trägt direkt zur Produktqualität, Lieferzuverlässigkeit und operativer Exzellenz bei und ermöglicht es Hitachi Energy, unseren Kunden weltweit innovative und nachhaltige Energielösungen zu liefern. Wie Sie einen Einfluss auf die technische Klärung von Werkstoffen, Zeichnungen, Spezifikationen und technischen Veränderungen in enger Zusammenarbeit mit Ingenieur und Zulieferern ausüben Support und koordinieren Produktionsteilgenehmigungsprozess (PP-AP) Tätigkeiten, erste Proben und Lieferantenqualifikationsprozesse Führen Sie technische Auswertungen von alternativen Materialien, Abweichungensanforderungen und obsolescence cases Teamorientiertes Mindset mit starker funktionsübergreifender Zusammenarbeit Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und gleichzeitig eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'opportunité Hitachi Energy, produits haute tension, est reconnue dans le monde entier comme un spécialiste de la transmission et de la distribution de puissance. L'unité de service est responsable de l'appui après vente dans le monde entier des systèmes de disjoncteurs de générateurs (GCB) et des commutateurs isolés de gaz (GIS), y compris la formation, l'installation et la mise en service, l'entretien programmé, les services à valeur ajoutée, le dépannage, les extensions, les mises à niveau et les remplacements. En tant qu'acheteur technique, vous agissez comme une interface clé entre l'approvisionnement, l'ingénierie, la qualité et notre réseau mondial de fournisseurs. Vous veillez à ce que les matériaux, composants et services techniquement spécifiés soient clairement définis, clarifiés techniquement, qualifiés et disponibles conformément aux exigences du projet, de la qualité et de la livraison. Grâce à une collaboration interfonctionnelle étroite, vous traduisez les exigences d'ingénierie en solutions d'approvisionnement robustes et soutenez la qualification du fournisseur et l'alignement technique. Votre rôle contribue directement à la qualité des produits, à la fiabilité de l'offre et à l'excellence opérationnelle, permettant à Hitachi Energy de proposer des solutions énergétiques innovantes et durables à nos clients dans le monde entier. Comment vous aurez un impact Effectuer des clarifications techniques des matériaux, des dessins, des spécifications et des changements d'ingénierie en étroite collaboration avec l'ingénierie et les fournisseurs Appuyer et coordonner les activités du processus d'approbation des parties de production (PPAP), les premiers échantillons et les processus de qualification des fournisseurs Effectuer des évaluations techniques des matériaux de remplacement, des demandes d'écart et des cas d'obsolescence Collaborer étroitement avec les acheteurs stratégiques et opérationnels sur les sujets liés aux fournisseurs et aux matériaux Appuyer le traitement des plaintes des fournisseurs, les rapports sur la non-conformité et les analyses des causes profondes Appuyer et participer aux évaluations des fournisseurs et aux évaluations techniques des fournisseurs, y compris les évaluations des capacités, de la qualité et de la maturité des processus Contribuer aux évaluations du rendement des fournisseurs ainsi qu'aux évaluations de la qualité et de l'approvisionnement stratégique Assurer l'exactitude et l'exhaustivité des données maîtresses des matériaux et des fournisseurs dans le SAP et agir comme point de contact technique pendant l'escalade des fournisseurs Services de soutien Organisation et équipes de projet dans des domaines complexes ou urgents Vos antécédents Formation technique terminée (p. ex. polymécanique, technicien d'automatisation, technicien mécanique, ingénieur de conception ou similaire) 3-5 ans d L'esprit d'équipe avec une solide collaboration interfonctionnelle Plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Mitarbeiter/in Endprüfung 80 - 100% (w/m/d)
jobs.description: Über die Position Als Mitarbeiter Endprüfung bei Hitachi Energy bist du ein entscheidendes Bindeglied zwischen Produktion und Auslieferung. Du stellst sicher, dass unsere Produkte vor der Freigabe höchsten Qualitäts-, Sicherheits- und Dokumentationsanforderungen entsprechen. Mit deinem Qualitätsbewusstsein und deinem strukturierten Vorgehen trägst du maßgeblich zur Zuverlässigkeit unserer Produkte und zur Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden bei. Das kannst du bewirken Testen von Generatorleistungsschaltern im Prüffeld (80%): Prüfen der Generator Leistungsschalter gemäss vorgegebenem Prüfplan Bewertung der Messergebnisse Durchführung von Kundenabnahmen in Englischer Sprache Erkennen von mechanischen und elektrischen Fehlern Analyse und Korrektur von Verdrahtungsfehlern im Steuerschrank Übernahme der Verantwortung für das Prüfen der zugeteilten Schalter (zeitlicher Ablauf sowie Qualität der Prüfung) Mitarbeit bei der Verbesserung des Messequipments sowie der Prüfprozesse Montage- und Verdrahtungsarbeiten (20%): Selbstständige Verdrahtung von Baugruppen und Schaltersystemen gemäss Arbeitspapieren wie Kundenauftrag, Elektroschema, Checkliste und Arbeits­plan Montage von PGHV-Produkten entsprechend der in den Qualitätssicherungsverfahren und Arbeitsanweisungen festgehaltenen Vorgaben und Zielsetzungen Lesen und verstehen von technischen Zeichnungen und Stücklisten Das bringst du mit Abgeschlossene elektrotechnische Grundausbildung (Automatiker EFZ, o.ä.) Erfahrung im lesen und verstehen von elektrischen Schemas, Montagezeichnungen und Arbeitsanweisungen Kenntnisse der Prüfung elektrischer Maschinen und von Steuerschränken sind von Vorteil Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse (mündlich, schriftlich) Affinität zu Computern (Messequipment, diverse Softwaretools, Dokumentation erstellen und pflegen) Gutes Verständnis für Arbeitssicherheit, hohes Qualitätsbewusstsein sowie kundenorientiertes Denken und professioneller Umgang mit Kunden Mehr über uns Hitachi Energy steht für innovative Technologien und nachhaltige Energielösungen weltweit. Bei uns erwartet dich ein sicherer Arbeitsplatz in einem zukunftsorientierten Unternehmen, spannende Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, ein kollegiales und wertschätzendes Arbeitsumfeld sowie attraktive Sozialleistungen.

descriptionByLocale.it: Come controllo finale dei dipendenti presso Hitachi Energy, sei un collegamento chiave tra produzione e consegna. Assicurati che i nostri prodotti soddisfino i requisiti di alta qualità, sicurezza e documentazione prima che vengano rilasciati. Con la vostra consapevolezza della qualità e il vostro approccio strutturato, contribuite in modo significativo all'affidabilità dei nostri prodotti e alla soddisfazione dei nostri clienti. Prova degli interruttori del circuito del generatore nel campo di prova (80%): Testing degli interruttori a circuito generatore secondo il piano di prova specificato Valutazione dei risultati di misura Attuazione dei ritiri dei clienti in inglese Rilevazione di guasti meccanici ed elettrici Analisi e correzione degli errori di cablaggio nell'armadietto di controllo Accettare la responsabilità per testare gli interruttori assegnati (esecuzione puntuale e qualità del test) Questo ti porta con completa formazione elettrotecnica di base (automatico EFZ, ecc.) esperienza nella lettura e comprensione di schemi elettrici, disegni di montaggio e istruzioni di lavoro La conoscenza di testare macchine elettriche e armadi di controllo sono di vantaggio Molto buona conoscenza di tedesco e inglese (oralmente, per iscritto) Affinità per computer (messequipment, vari strumenti software, documentazione e manutenzione) Siamo alla ricerca di un posto di lavoro sicuro in una società orientata al futuro, opportunità di sviluppo entusiasmanti, un ambiente di lavoro collegiale e a valore aggiunto e benefici sociali attraenti.
descriptionByLocale.en: As an employee final check at Hitachi Energy, you are a key link between production and delivery. You make sure our products meet the highest quality, safety and documentation requirements before they are released. With your quality awareness and your structured approach, you contribute significantly to the reliability of our products and to the satisfaction of our customers. Testing of the generator circuit breakers in the test field (80%): Testing of the generator circuit breakers according to the specified test plan Evaluation of the measurement results Implementation of customer withdrawals in English Detection of mechanical and electrical faults Analysis and correction of wiring errors in the control cabinet Accepting responsibility for testing the assigned switches (timely execution and quality of the test) This brings you with completed basic electrotechnical training (automatic EFZ, etc.) experience in reading and understanding electrical schemes, assembly drawings and work instructions Knowledge of testing electrical machines and control cabinets are of advantage Very good knowledge of German and English (orally, in writing) Affinity for computers (messequipment, various software tools, documentation and maintenance) We are looking for a safe workplace in a future-oriented company, exciting development opportunities, a collegial and value-adding working environment and attractive social benefits.

descriptionByLocale.fr: En tant qu'employé de vérification finale chez Hitachi Energy, vous êtes un lien clé entre la production et la livraison. Vous vous assurez que nos produits répondent aux exigences de qualité, de sécurité et de documentation les plus élevées avant leur libération. Avec votre sensibilisation à la qualité et votre approche structurée, vous contribuez de manière significative à la fiabilité de nos produits et à la satisfaction de nos clients. Essai des disjoncteurs du générateur dans le champ d'essai (80 %) : Essai des disjoncteurs du générateur selon le plan d'essai spécifié Évaluation des résultats de mesure Mise en œuvre des retraits du client en anglais Détection des défauts mécaniques et électriques Analyse et correction des erreurs de câblage dans l'armoire de commande Acceptation de la responsabilité de l'essai des interrupteurs attribués (exécution en temps utile et qualité de l'essai) Cela vous apporte avec une formation électrotechnique de base complète (EFZ automatique, etc.) l'expérience de la lecture et de la compréhension des schémas électriques, des dessins de montage et des instructions de travail La connaissance de l'essai des machines électriques et des armoires de commande sont d'avantage Très bonne connaissance de l'allemand et de l'anglais (ou, par écrit) Affinité pour ordinateurs (matériel, divers outils logiciels, documentation et maintenance) Nous sommes à la recherche d'un milieu de travail sécuritaire dans une entreprise tournée vers l'avenir, des possibilités de développement passionnantes, un environnement de travail collégial et valorisant et des avantages sociaux attrayants.

jobs.title: Global Product Specialist – Solid-State Transformers (SSTs) 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Solid-State Transformers (SSTs) are emerging as critical infrastructure for modern data centers, particularly AI facilities, by providing high efficiency (up to 98.5%), compact, and intelligent power management. Unlike conventional transformers, SSTs utilize power electronics to convert medium-voltage grid power directly to 800V DC, significantly reducing footprint, increasing efficiency, and easing grid interconnection. Join us as a Global Product Specialist – Solid-State Transformers (SSTs) and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of data center supply infrastructure, guiding both Hitachi Energy and clients toward smarter, greener, and more resilient operations. If you combine a solid understanding of relevant technologies with insight into customer value drivers—and can translate customer needs into actionable requirements that keep our solutions both innovative and aligned with client expectations—then this role is an excellent fit for you. How you´ll make an impact Conduct market evaluations, competitor analyses, and identify gaps in product, solutions, and services, while assessing Hitachi Energy's positioning Gather and analyze global standards, market requirements, customer needs, and values to contribute to the product roadmap Support the Global Product Manager in creating business cases for product, solutions, and service development projects Support global and local marketing teams in creating market communication materials, including assistance with new product launches Provide sales support, participate in customer meetings, and attend trade shows as required, ensuring the availability of appropriate training materials for internal and external use Drive technical solutions across Hitachi Energy's global footprint, following an annual cycle of activities to govern Global Product Management Your background Bachelor's degree in engineering, along with 10+ years of related experience preferred Prior experience in Product Management or Product Ownership within data centre domain, and knowledge of Solid-State Transformer (SST) technology Possess a technical mindset to serve as a technical expert, instilling customer confidence in the product and contributing to product design Ability to simplify and present the value proposition of a complex offering Strong expertise in qualitative and quantitative business analysis Proficient in analyzing market potential through product segmentation, go-to-market channels, and developing business cases. Willingness to travel domestically and internationally (20%) More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

jobs.title: Legal Counsel 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: As Legal Counsel, you will play a key role in our legal team by providing comprehensive legal support to several Business Units and central Functions. As a generalist you cover all fields of contract and commercial law, with an additional focus on public procurement law, R&D, labour law, and data privacy. Your responsibilities will encompass the management and execution of all types of contracts, overseeing potential disputes, and handling various day-to-day business operations. If you possess refined legal skills, can tackle complex issues within an international corporate setting, and are determined, energetic, and capable of influencing at all levels, we invite you to join our team! How you will make an impact: Comprehensive legal support to Hitachi Energy's Business Units and central Functions in all domestic and international legal matters, in particular in the field of contract and commercial law, with an additional focus on public procurement, R&D, Labour Law, and Data Privacy Offer targeted legal advice to support key strategic goals, safeguard the company's reputation and interests, and ensure compliance with relevant laws, regulations and internal policies Communicate and work cross-functionally with other legal counsels, and your stakeholders namely in Sales, SCM, Research, and Management ﻿﻿Provide training to internal clients on relevant legal and contractual topics ﻿﻿Develop and implement standards, policies, and procedures related to your function Advise on the resolution of pre-litigation claims and disputes and handle complex commercial litigation mat-ters, including selecting, engaging, and managing outside counsel, and collaborating with Hitachi Energy local counsels Your background: Master's degree in law, preferably with additional qualifications acquired in the US or UK Admission to the Bar in Switzerland Legal generalist with experience as in-house counsel or attorney-at-law in contract and commercial law. Knowledge in R&D, Labour Law, and Data Privacy is a plus Business- and solution-driven approach with yet the ability to provide accurate, high-quality legal advice and a sound judgment in developing and implementing legal solutions Responsiveness and high degree of responsibility with the willingness to think “out of the box” Ability to work under pressure and in a cross-functional and cross-cultural environment that is changing and may be challenging Well-developed oral and written communication skills in German and English; French and Italian are an advantage More about us : At Hitachi Energy, we believe that diversity powers innovation and collaboration. Our teams are made up of individuals from a wide range of backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives, working together across borders and disciplines to shape a more sustainable energy future. We are committed to fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels respected, valued, and empowered to contribute their best.

descriptionByLocale.it: Come Consigliere Legale, svolgerai un ruolo chiave nel nostro team legale fornendo un supporto legale completo a diverse unità aziendali e funzioni centrali. Come generalista si copre tutti i settori del contratto e del diritto commerciale, con un ulteriore focus sulla legge sugli appalti pubblici, R&D, diritto del lavoro e privacy dei dati. Le vostre responsabilità comprenderanno la gestione e l'esecuzione di tutti i tipi di contratti, supervisionando potenziali controversie, e la gestione di varie operazioni aziendali quotidiane. Se possiedi competenze legali raffinate, puoi affrontare questioni complesse all'interno di un contesto aziendale internazionale, e sei determinato, energico, e in grado di influenzare a tutti i livelli, ti invitiamo a unirti al nostro team! Come farete un impatto: Supporto legale completo per le Business Unit di Hitachi Energy e le Funzioni centrali in tutte le questioni legali nazionali e internazionali, in particolare nel campo del contratto e del diritto commerciale, con un ulteriore focus sugli appalti pubblici, R&D, Diritto del lavoro e Privacy Offrire consulenza legale mirata per sostenere obiettivi strategici chiave, salvaguardare la reputazione e gli interessi dell'azienda, e garantire il rispetto di leggi, regolamenti e politiche interne Il tuo background: Laurea magistrale in diritto, preferibilmente con ulteriori titoli acquisiti negli Stati Uniti o nel Regno Unito Ammissione al Bar in Svizzera Generalista legale con esperienza come consulente in-house o avvocato-at-law in contratto e diritto commerciale. Conoscenza in R&D, diritto del lavoro e privacy dei dati è un approccio più orientato al business e alla soluzione, ma la capacità di fornire consigli legali accurati e di alta qualità e un giudizio valido nello sviluppo e nell'attuazione di soluzioni legali Responsabilità e alto grado di responsabilità con la volontà di pensare “fuori dalla scatola” Capacità di lavorare sotto pressione e in un ambiente cross-funzionale e interculturale che sta cambiando e può essere sfidante I nostri team sono costituiti da persone provenienti da una vasta gamma di sfondi, esperienze e prospettive, lavorando insieme attraverso confini e discipline per plasmare un futuro energetico più sostenibile. Ci impegniamo a promuovere un ambiente inclusivo in cui tutti si sentono rispettati, valutati e abilitati a contribuire al meglio.
descriptionByLocale.en: As Legal Counsel, you will play a key role in our legal team by providing comprehensive legal support to several Business Units and central Functions. As a generalist you cover all fields of contract and commercial law, with an additional focus on public procurement law, R&D, labour law, and data privacy. Your responsibilities will encompass the management and execution of all types of contracts, overseeing potential disputes, and handling various day-to-day business operations. If you possess refined legal skills, can tackle complex issues within an international corporate setting, and are determined, energetic, and capable of influencing at all levels, we invite you to join our team! How you will make an impact: Comprehensive legal support to Hitachi Energy's Business Units and central Functions in all domestic and international legal matters, in particular in the field of contract and commercial law, with an additional focus on public procurement, R&D, Labour Law, and Data Privacy Offer targeted legal advice to support key strategic goals, safeguard the company's reputation and interests, and ensure compliance with relevant laws, regulations and internal policies Communicate and work cross-functionally with other legal counsels, and your stakeholders namely in Sales, SCM, Research, and Management ﻿﻿Provide training to internal clients on relevant legal and contractual topics ﻿﻿Develop and implement standards, policies, and procedures related to your function Advise on the resolution of pre-litigation claims and disputes and handle complex commercial litigation mat-ters, including selecting, engaging, and managing outside counsel, and collaborating with Hitachi Energy local counsels Your background: Master's degree in law, preferably with additional qualifications acquired in the US or UK Admission to the Bar in Switzerland Legal generalist with experience as in-house counsel or attorney-at-law in contract and commercial law. Knowledge in R&D, Labour Law, and Data Privacy is a plus Business- and solution-driven approach with yet the ability to provide accurate, high-quality legal advice and a sound judgment in developing and implementing legal solutions Responsiveness and high degree of responsibility with the willingness to think “out of the box” Ability to work under pressure and in a cross-functional and cross-cultural environment that is changing and may be challenging Well-developed oral and written communication skills in German and English; French and Italian are an advantage More about us : At Hitachi Energy, we believe that diversity powers innovation and collaboration. Our teams are made up of individuals from a wide range of backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives, working together across borders and disciplines to shape a more sustainable energy future. We are committed to fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels respected, valued, and empowered to contribute their best.
descriptionByLocale.de: Als Legal Counsel spielen Sie eine Schlüsselrolle in unserem Rechtsteam, indem Sie mehrere Business Units und zentrale Funktionen umfassend legal unterstützen. Als Generalist erfassen Sie alle Bereiche des Vertrags- und Handelsrecht, mit einem zusätzlichen Fokus auf öffentliches Beschaffungsrecht, F&D, Arbeitsrecht und Datenschutz. Ihre Verantwortung umfasst die Verwaltung und Durchführung aller Arten von Verträgen, die Überwachung potenzieller Streitigkeiten und die Abwicklung verschiedener Tagesgeschäfte. Wenn Sie über verfeinerte juristische Fähigkeiten verfügen, komplexe Probleme in einem internationalen Unternehmensumfeld lösen können und entschlossen, energisch und in der Lage sind, auf allen Ebenen zu beeinflussen, laden wir Sie zu unserem Team ein! Wie Sie Auswirkungen haben: Umfassende rechtliche Unterstützung der Geschäftsbereiche von Hitachi Energy und zentrale Funktionen in allen nationalen und internationalen Rechtsfragen, insbesondere im Bereich des Vertrags- und Handelsrechts, mit einem zusätzlichen Fokus auf öffentliche Beschaffung, R&D, Arbeitsrecht und Datenschutzangebot gezielte rechtliche Beratung zur Unterstützung strategischer Ziele, die Wahrung des Rufs und der Interessen des Unternehmens und die Einhaltung relevanter Gesetze, Vorschriften und interner Richtlinien Ihr Hintergrund: Master-Abschluss im Recht, vorzugsweise mit zusätzlichen Qualifikationen erworben in den USA oder UK Zulassung zur Bar in der Schweiz Legal Generalist mit Erfahrung als hauseigene Beratung oder Anwalt-at-law im Vertrags- und Handelsrecht. Wissen in R&D, Arbeitsrecht und Datenschutz ist ein Plus Business-und Lösungs-orientierter Ansatz mit noch die Fähigkeit, eine genaue, qualitativ hochwertige Rechtsberatung und ein fundiertes Urteil in der Entwicklung und Umsetzung von Rechtslösungen Reaktionsfähigkeit und hohe Verantwortung mit der Bereitschaft, "out of the box" Fähigkeit, unter Druck zu arbeiten und in einem funktions- und kulturübergreifenden Umfeld, das sich verändert und möglicherweise herausfordernd sein kann. Unsere Teams bestehen aus Individuen aus einer Vielzahl von Hintergründen, Erfahrungen und Perspektiven, die Zusammenarbeit über Grenzen und Disziplinen hinweg, um eine nachhaltigere Energie Zukunft zu gestalten. Wir sind verpflichtet, ein integratives Umfeld zu fördern, in dem jeder sich respektiert, geschätzt und befähigt fühlt, sein Bestes beizutragen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: En tant que conseiller juridique, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans notre équipe juridique en fournissant un soutien juridique complet à plusieurs unités commerciales et fonctions centrales. En tant que généraliste, vous couvrez tous les domaines du droit des contrats et du droit commercial, en mettant davantage l'accent sur le droit des marchés publics, la R-D, le droit du travail et la protection des données. Vos responsabilités comprendront la gestion et l'exécution de tous les types de contrats, la surveillance des différends potentiels et le traitement de diverses activités courantes. Si vous possédez des compétences juridiques raffinées, pouvez aborder des questions complexes au sein d'une entreprise internationale, et sont déterminés, énergiques et capables d'influencer à tous les niveaux, nous vous invitons à rejoindre notre équipe! Comment vous allez avoir un impact : Un soutien juridique complet aux unités d'affaires et aux fonctions centrales d'Hitachi Energy dans toutes les affaires juridiques nationales et internationales, en particulier dans le domaine du droit des contrats et du droit commercial, en mettant davantage l'accent sur les marchés publics, la R-D, le droit du travail et la protection des données. Offrir des conseils juridiques ciblés pour appuyer les principaux objectifs stratégiques, protéger la réputation et les intérêts de l'entreprise, et assurer le respect des lois, règlements et politiques internes pertinents. Communiquer et travailler de façon interfonctionnelle avec d'autres conseillers juridiques, et vos parties prenantes, notamment dans les domaines des ventes, de la MSC, de la recherche et de la gestion. Votre formation: Maîtrise en droit, de préférence avec des qualifications supplémentaires acquises aux États-Unis ou au Royaume-Uni Admission au barreau en Suisse Généraliste juridique ayant une expérience en tant qu'avocat ou avocat en droit contractuel et commercial. La connaissance en R-D, en droit du travail et en protection des données est une approche plus axée sur l'entreprise et la solution, avec pourtant la capacité de fournir des conseils juridiques précis et de haute qualité et un jugement solide dans l'élaboration et la mise en oeuvre de solutions juridiques. Réceptivité et haut degré de responsabilité avec la volonté de penser hors de l'encadré.Capacité de travailler sous pression et dans un environnement interfonctionnel et interculturel qui change et peut être difficile. Nos équipes sont composées de personnes issues d'un large éventail de milieux, d'expériences et de perspectives, travaillant ensemble au-delà des frontières et des disciplines pour façonner un avenir énergétique plus durable. Nous sommes déterminés à favoriser un environnement inclusif où chacun se sent respecté, valorisé et habilité à contribuer au mieux.

jobs.title: Laboratory Manager – High Voltage Testing 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Our local product group Insulation & Components is the technology leader in design and manufacture of high volt-age transformer bushings. All renowned international companies of the electrical industry, active in power genera-tion, transmission and distribution are among our customers. We have a top position in the high voltage trans-former bushing areas worldwide. In this highly responsible and dynamic role, you will lead our laboratory team at MICAFIL in Zürich-Altstetten (ZH) and ensure that we further strengthen our competitiveness and develop our Swiss branch to meet the global market growth in the field of energy. In this important role, you will continuously drive forward the efficient and innovative processes of our 3 different laboratories together with a strong team. If you have a passion for leadership and high voltage testing, we offer you the stage to bring about real change and actively shape the future of our production processes. How you'll make an impact Lead the laboratory team, including resource management and team development (15 FTE) and act as the point of contact for HV testing at Zürich-Altstetten MICAFIL Ensure compliance with safety and quality standards (IEC\/IEEE) Analyze & implement efficient production & business processes to increase safety, quality and productivity Ensure high output through reliable high-voltage testing procedures (AC, DC, impulse, partial discharge) Identify and integrate new technologies and best practices to drive the continuous improvement process (CIP) together with your team and our Process Engineering team Collaborate closely with planning, quality assurance, logistics, other production departments and relevant stakeholders for holistic process design and improvement Be responsible for optimal work and maintenance instructions and other relevant regulations (e.g. ISO, Lean, Six Sigma) Develop and monitor the most important key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure success and re-port to operations manager As People Manager, you will be responsible to ensure compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures and guidelines Your background Technical apprenticeship and qualifications (Bachelor \/ Master) in the field of Electrical Engineering or equivalent Several years of experience in a similar leadership position (High-Voltage Testing\/Insulation Technology\/Power Engineering) Solid knowledge in high-voltage systems, generators, and automation systems Solid knowledge of lean management, Six Sigma and other process optimization methods Proven experience in leading and motivating cross-functional teams Strong problem-solving skills and a data-driven approach to decision making combined with a strong focus on safety Excellent time management, communication and organizational skills Fluent in German and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile del laboratorio – Test ad alta tensione 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire de laboratoire – Essai à haute tension 80 - 100% (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: L'opportunità Il nostro gruppo di prodotti locale Insulation & Components è il leader tecnologico nella progettazione e produzione di boccole per trasformatori ad alta potenza. Tutte le rinomate aziende internazionali dell'industria elettrica, attive nella produzione di energia, trasmissione e distribuzione sono tra i nostri clienti. Abbiamo una posizione superiore nelle aree boccole trans-former ad alta tensione in tutto il mondo. In questo ruolo altamente responsabile e dinamico, guiderai il nostro team di laboratorio presso MICAFIL a Zürich-Altstetten (ZH) e ti assicurerai di rafforzare ulteriormente la nostra competitività e sviluppare il nostro ramo svizzero per soddisfare la crescita globale del mercato nel campo dell'energia. In questo ruolo importante, continuerai a guidare i processi efficienti e innovativi dei nostri 3 laboratori diversi insieme a un team forte. Se avete una passione per la leadership e i test ad alta tensione, vi offriamo la fase per portare a cambiamenti reali e modellare attivamente il futuro dei nostri processi produttivi. Guidare il team di laboratorio, compresa la gestione delle risorse e lo sviluppo del team (15 FTE) e agire come punto di contatto per i test HV a Zürich-Altstetten MICAFIL Assicurarsi il rispetto degli standard di sicurezza e qualità (IEC\/IEEE) Analizzare e implementare processi produttivi e aziendali efficienti per aumentare la sicurezza, la qualità e la produttività Garantire un elevato rendimento attraverso procedure di test affidabili ad alta tensione (AC, DC, impulso, scarico parziale) Identificare e integrare nuove tecnologie e best practice per guidare il processo di miglioramento continuo (CIP) insieme al vostro team e al nostro team di Process Engineering Collaborare a stretto contatto con la pianificazione, la garanzia della qualità, la logistica, altri diparti di produzione e parti interessate rilevanti per la progettazione e il miglioramento del processo L'apprendistato tecnico e le qualifiche (Bachelor \/ Master) nel campo dell'ingegneria elettrica o equivalente Diversi anni di esperienza in una posizione di leadership simile (High-Voltage Testing\/Insulation Technology\/Power Engineering) Conoscenze solide in sistemi di alta tensione, generatori e sistemi di automazione Conoscenza solida della gestione magra, Six Sigma e altri metodi di ottimizzazione dei processi Esperienza dimostrata nei team leader e motivanti di cross-funzionalità Forte capacità di problem solving e un approccio data-driven al processo decisionale combinato con un forte focus sulla sicurezza Eccellente gestione del tempo, comunicazione e capacità organizzative Fluent in tedesco e inglese Maggiori informazioni su di noi Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali possono creare un ambiente in cui tutti si sviluppano.
descriptionByLocale.en: The opportunity Our local product group Insulation & Components is the technology leader in design and manufacture of high volt-age transformer bushings. We have a top position in the high voltage trans-former bushing areas worldwide. In this highly responsible and dynamic role, you will lead our laboratory team at MICAFIL in Zürich-Altstetten (ZH) and ensure that we further strengthen our competitiveness and develop our Swiss branch to meet the global market growth in the field of energy.
