jobs.title: Electrical Design Engineer - Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. How you'll make an impact Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency Your background Degree in electrical engineering or a related field 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team English is a must, Italian is beneficial Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement. More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Ingegnere di progettazione elettrica - Trasformatori a secco 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Ingénieur de conception électrique - Transformateurs à sec 80 – 100% (f/m/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Unisciti al nostro team di ingegneria Dry Transformer, ti aiuterà a modellare i progetti di nuova generazione che migliorano la sicurezza, l'efficienza e la sostenibilità nelle applicazioni di potenza critica. Collaborerai a stretto contatto con R&D, produzione, qualità e supply chain per tradurre i requisiti dei clienti in soluzioni manifatturiere e vederli attraverso prototipi, test di tipo e rilascio seriale. Lavorando in progetti e standard globali, approfondirete le vostre competenze nei sistemi di isolamento, nella progettazione elettromagnetica e nelle prestazioni termiche, contribuendo alla digitalizzazione dei nostri processi di progettazione. Questo è un ruolo di alto impatto in cui il vostro lavoro consente direttamente elettricità affidabile per industrie e comunità in tutto il mondo. Mansioni - Condurre lo sviluppo di specifiche e modelli di progettazione, assicurando che soddisfino tutti gli standard e le normative pertinenti - Condurre approfondite recensioni e verifiche di progettazione, implementando modifiche per elevare la qualità del progetto - Monitorare e gestire le linee temporali del progetto, garantire la realizzazione di pietre miliari di progettazione e i progetti vengono consegnati in orario - Condurre valutazioni dei rischi, sviluppare strategie di mitigazione e cercare opportunità di innovazione progettuale - Impegnarsi con i clienti per catturare e incorporare il loro feedback in soluzioni di design, migliorando la soddisfazione del cliente - Collabora con il team della supply chain per garantire che i progetti siano manufacturable e convenienti, selezionando materiali e componenti ottimali - Preparare e mantenere una documentazione dettagliata che supporta i processi di progettazione e facilita la condivisione delle conoscenze - Identificare e implementare continui miglioramenti di progettazione basati sui risultati dei test e sulle migliori pratiche del settore, migliorando qualità ed efficienza Requisiti - Laurea in ingegneria elettrica o in un campo correlato - 2-5 anni di esperienza nella progettazione elettrica di trasformatori di tipo secco - Eccellente analitica e capacità di problem solving - Capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente e come parte di un team multidisciplinare - L'inglese è un must, l'italiano è benefico - atteggiamento proattivo, automotivato e con un forte senso di proprietà - Aperto a cambiamento, feedback e miglioramento continuo Cosa? - Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. ## Mansioni - Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations - Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality - Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule - Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations - Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction - Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components - Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing - Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency ## Requisiti - Degree in electrical engineering or a related field - 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers - Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills - Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team - English is a must, Italian is beneficial - Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership - Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement ## Cosa offriamo - Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Mit unserem Dry Transformer Engineering Team können Sie Designs der nächsten Generation gestalten, die Sicherheit, Effizienz und Nachhaltigkeit in kritischen Leistungsanwendungen verbessern. Sie arbeiten eng mit F&D, Produktion, Qualität und Lieferkette zusammen, um die Kundenanforderungen in manufakturierbare Lösungen zu übersetzen und durch Prototypen, Mustertests und Serienfreigabe zu sehen. In der Zusammenarbeit mit globalen Projekten und Standards vertiefen Sie Ihr Know-how in Isolationssystemen, elektromagnetischem Design und thermischer Leistung und tragen zur Digitalisierung unserer Designprozesse bei. Dies ist eine wichtige Rolle, in der Ihre Arbeit direkt zuverlässigen Strom für Industrien und Gemeinden weltweit ermöglicht. Mansion - Führen Sie die Entwicklung von Design-Spezifikationen und -Modellen, um sicherzustellen, dass sie alle relevanten Standards und Vorschriften erfüllen - Durchführung gründlicher Design-Bewertungen und -Verifikationen, Umsetzung von Änderungen zur Erhöhung der Projektqualität - Überwachen und verwalten Sie die Projektzeitpläne, um sicherzustellen, dass Design-Meilen erreicht werden und Projekte termingerecht ausgeliefert werden - Risikobewertungen durchführen, Strategien zur Minderung entwickeln und Chancen für Designinnovationen suchen - Nehmen Sie mit Kunden ein, um ihr Feedback in Designlösungen zu erfassen und zu integrieren, die Kundenzufriedenheit zu verbessern - Mit dem Supply Chain Team zusammenarbeiten, um sicherzustellen, dass Designs herstellbar und kostengünstig sind, optimale Materialien und Komponenten auswählen - Bereiten und pflegen detaillierte Dokumentationen, die Designprozesse unterstützen und den Wissensaustausch erleichtern - Erkennen und implementieren Sie kontinuierliche Designverbesserungen basierend auf Testergebnissen und branchenspezifischen Best Practices, Verbesserung der Qualität und Effizienz Voraussetzungen - Grad in der Elektrotechnik oder einem verwandten Bereich - 2-5 Jahre Erfahrung in der Elektrotechnik von Trockentransformatoren - Ausgezeichnete analytische und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, sowohl unabhängig als auch als Teil eines multidisziplinären Teams zu arbeiten - Englisch ist ein Muss, Italienisch ist nützlich - Pro-aktive Haltung, selbst motiviert und mit einem starken Gefühl des Eigentums - Offen für Veränderungen, Feedback und kontinuierliche Verbesserung Cosa offriamo - Unsere flexiblen Arbeitspraktiken helfen Ihnen dabei, die persönliche und geschäftliche Leistung zu optimieren und eine Umgebung zu schaffen, in der alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione L'occasion De vous joindre à notre équipe d'ingénierie de Transformateur Dry, vous aiderez à façonner des conceptions de prochaine génération qui améliorent la sécurité, l'efficacité et la durabilité dans les applications énergétiques critiques. Vous collaborerez étroitement avec la R-D, la production, la qualité et la chaîne d'approvisionnement afin de traduire les exigences des clients en solutions de fabrication et de les voir par prototype, essai de type et libération en série. En travaillant sur des projets et des normes mondiaux, vous approfondirez votre expertise en systèmes d'isolation, conception électromagnétique et performance thermique tout en contribuant à la numérisation de nos processus de conception. Il s'agit d'un rôle à fort impact où votre travail permet directement une électricité fiable pour les industries et les collectivités du monde entier. Mansioni - Diriger l'élaboration de spécifications et de modèles de conception, en s'assurant qu'ils répondent à toutes les normes et réglementations pertinentes - Procéder à des examens et vérifications approfondis de la conception, en apportant des modifications pour améliorer la qualité des projets - Surveiller et gérer le calendrier des projets, s'assurer que les étapes de la conception sont atteintes et que les projets sont exécutés dans les délais prévus - Effectuer des évaluations des risques, élaborer des stratégies d'atténuation et rechercher des possibilités d'innovation en matière de conception - S'engager auprès des clients pour capturer et intégrer leurs commentaires dans les solutions de conception, en améliorant la satisfaction des clients - Collaborer avec l'équipe de la chaîne d'approvisionnement pour s'assurer que les designs sont fabriqués et rentables, en choisissant des matériaux et composants optimaux - Préparer et tenir à jour une documentation détaillée qui appuie les processus de conception et facilite le partage des connaissances - Identifier et mettre en oeuvre des améliorations continues de conception basées sur les résultats des essais et les meilleures pratiques de l'industrie, en améliorant la qualité et l'efficacité Requisiti - Diplôme en génie électrique ou domaine connexe - 2-5 ans d'expérience en conception électrique de transformateurs de type sec - Excellentes compétences en analyse et résolution de problèmes - Capacité de travailler indépendamment et dans le cadre d'une équipe multidisciplinaire - L'anglais est un must, l'italien est bénéfique - attitude pro-active, automotivée et avec un fort sentiment de propriété - Ouvert au changement, retour d'information et amélioration continue Cosa offriamo - Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et commerciale tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir

jobs.title: Commissioning Engineer 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity At Hitachi Energy, our purpose is to advance a sustainable energy future for all. We bring power to homes, schools, hospitals, and industries — and we do so with people who are passionate, collaborative, and committed to making a real difference. As a SCADA\/RTU Commissioning Engineer, you will join our Grid Automation Systems team in Baden, Switzerland. In this role, you will oversee the commissioning of substation automation systems for medium‑complexity assignments, ensuring all activities are completed safely, efficiently, and in line with contract requirements, quality standards, and safety expectations. How you'll make an impact • Carry out testing and commissioning of substation automation systems at customer sites in Switzerland and abroad, while actively supporting the Service Management team • Execute commissioning activities safely, following all Hitachi Energy and customer safety standards; report hazards and near misses to support continuous improvement • Perform commissioning tasks according to defined process descriptions and checklists; coordinate closely with engineering and project management teams • Identify, track, and resolve open points, ensuring customer sign‑off before site demobilization • Report site progress and planning updates; ensure efficient use of commissioning tools and test equipment • Provide marked‑up drawings to engineering for preparing as‑built documentation and final submissions • Support planning and implementation of commissioning activities • Implement design changes and provide mark‑ups for as‑built project documentation • Coordinate site activities required to finalize customer acceptance certification Your background • Bachelor's degree in electrical engineering or equivalent • 4+ years of experience as a commissioning engineer for automation systems and related products • Strong knowledge of substation SCADA\/RTU systems, HMI principles, and Hitachi Energy products; understanding of protection philosophies • Basic knowledge of communication protocols such as IEC 61850, LON, IEC 101–104, DNP; ability to read schematic drawings and identify discrepancies; strong problem‑solving and conflict‑resolution skills • Familiarity with engineering toolchains typical for SAS\/SCADA (IET600, PCM600, MicroSCADA); willingness to learn across SCADA, RTU, networking, and cybersecurity topics • Strong communication and presentation skills • Proficiency in spoken and written English, German is preferred More about us At Hitachi Energy, we believe that diversity and collaboration are the foundation of great innovation. You will join a global team where different perspectives are valued, and where we work together to advance a sustainable energy future for all.

jobs.title: On-Site IT Service Specialist 80 - 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity In your role as an On-site IT Service Specialist, you will be responsible for delivering Desk Side Support to IT users, specifically handling IT issues that require physical intervention. Your duties will extend to aiding incident resolution through collaboration with various support teams and groups within the IT department. You will play a critical role, serving as a representative of the IT organization, acting as the interface between the customer and other IT functions. How you'll make an impact Diagnoses and resolves IT-related issues effectively and efficiently Ensures that computers are delivered in a 'ready-to-use' condition for IT users Provides ad-hoc training to users on common IT issues and guides them through self-service tools Handles warranty cases in collaboration with the appropriate Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEM) vendors Identifies and report potential risks that could impact the quality of OSS services Offers support to end users and ensure the functionality of IT equipment and software in meeting rooms and other user collaboration areas as part of desk-side support Adheres to prescribed OSS governance, which involves participating in meetings and following the escalation process, among other responsibilities Follows OSS procedures as outlined in the Runbook, Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), and knowledge articles Your background Formal qualification in IT completed from an accredited university or college OR completed an apprenticeship in the field of IT ​ Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal, including the ability to communicate effectively with both business and technical audiences in German and English. ​ Proactive and solution-oriented mindset ​ Demonstrates an ability to work independently and is self-driven ​ Legal authorization to work in applied location is required . We will not sponsor individuals for employment visas now or in the future for this role ​ More about us Hitachi Energy is committed to creating a diverse, inclusive, and collaborative work environment where people from different backgrounds come together to build innovative solutions for a more sustainable energy future.

jobs.title: Field Service Engineer​ – Energy & Power (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Our High Voltage Products division is a worldwide specialist in power transmission and distribution. Our Service Unit supports customers around the globe with Generator Circuit Breaker systems (GCB) and gas‑insulated switchgear (GIS). From training and commissioning to maintenance, troubleshooting, upgrades, and replacements — we ensure critical power infrastructure works reliably, safely, and efficiently. Service is at the heart of everything we do. As part of our international service team, you'll take on varied, hands‑on work and become a recognized product expert. After comprehensive, practical training in Switzerland, you'll travel the world to commission and maintain GCB systems — all while working in a dynamic, multicultural environment. This is a role with real impact, technical depth, and plenty of room to grow. How you´ll make an impact Lead multicultural service projects for GCB on power plants from 20 MW to 1600 MW worldwide Ensure smooth and timely execution of installation and maintenance work on site Perform the final quality check and guarantee that all work meets our high standards Deliver product training directly to customers at their facilities Identify risks proactively and implement effective mitigation measures Coordinate on‑site teams and give practical, clear instructions Manage resource and provide regular reporting to project management Drive process improvements and implement efficiency‑boosting initiatives on site Your background Completed apprenticeship in metalwork, electrical engineering, or automotive technology Solid electrical knowledge (essential); further education such as a technician diploma is a plus Minimum 2 years of professional experience; experience in site leadership is an advantage Good English skills (B2 or above); German is a plus High willingness to travel — up to 80% worldwide Flexible, resilient, and communicative team player who enjoys solving problems pragmatically and values high safety and quality standards More about us Exciting and varied tasks with great creative freedom Attractive training and development opportunities Interesting and very varied activities\/projects, including off-shore assignments Well-established and dynamic team Open corporate culture An attractive benefits package including fixed, travel and meal expenses, as well as a say in the choice of accommodation

This is a role with real impact, technical depth, and plenty of room to grow. How you´ll make an impact Lead multicultural service projects for GCB on power plants from 20 MW to 1600 MW worldwide Ensure smooth and timely execution of installation and maintenance work on site Perform the final quality check and guarantee that all work meets our high standards Deliver product training directly to customers at their facilities Identify risks proactively and implement effective mitigation measures Coordinate on‑site teams and give practical, clear instructions Manage resource and provide regular reporting to project management Drive process improvements and implement efficiency‑boosting initiatives on site Your background Completed apprenticeship in metalwork, electrical engineering, or automotive technology Solid electrical knowledge (essential); further education such as a technician diploma is a plus Minimum 2 years of professional experience; experience in site leadership is an advantage Good English skills (B2 or above); German is a plus High willingness to travel — up to 80% worldwide Flexible, resilient, and communicative team player who enjoys solving problems pragmatically and values high safety and quality standards More about us Exciting and varied tasks with great creative freedom Attractive training and development opportunities Interesting and very varied activities\/projects, including off-shore assignments Well-established and dynamic team Open corporate culture An attractive benefits package including fixed, travel and meal expenses, as well as a say in the choice of accommodation
descriptionByLocale.fr: The opportunity Our High Voltage Products division is a worldwide specialist in power transmission and distribution. Our Service Unit supports customers around the globe with Generator Circuit Breaker systems (GCB) and gas‑insulated switchgear (GIS). From training and commissioning to maintenance, troubleshooting, upgrades, and replacements — we ensure critical power infrastructure works reliably, safely, and efficiently. Service is at the heart of everything we do. As part of our international service team, you'll take on varied, hands‑on work and become a recognized product expert. After comprehensive, practical training in Switzerland, you'll travel the world to commission and maintain GCB systems — all while working in a dynamic, multicultural environment. This is a role with real impact, technical depth, and plenty of room to grow. jobs.title: Operating Unit Manager for Substation Automation Systems - Europe
jobs.description: The Opportunity As the Operating Unit Manager for Substation Automation Systems HUB Europe, you will play a pivotal leadership role in shaping the strategic direction, performance, and growth of our Substation Automation portfolio across the region. You will oversee all commercial, operational, and technical aspects of the HUB, ensuring excellence in project execution, customer satisfaction, and business results. This role reports to the HUB Leader and collaborates closely with global Product Management, R&D, and cross‑regional teams. Location is flexible within Europe and will be confirmed during later stages. This role requires frequent travel within Europe and occasional international travel. How You'll Make an Impact Drive Strategic Direction & Business Growth: Develop and execute the HUB's strategy in alignment with global objectives. Identify market opportunities, expand customer relationships, and grow sales in substation automation solutions including protection relays, SCADA, control systems, and communication technologies. Lead Operational Excellence: Oversee engineering, project delivery, sales support, and service execution. Define and track KPIs to secure efficient operations, on‑time delivery, customer satisfaction, and strong financial performance. Strengthen Customer & Market Presence: Build and maintain strong relationships with key customers, partners, and stakeholders across Europe. Represent Hitachi Energy as a subject matter expert at industry forums and customer engagements. Ensure Financial Performance: Manage budgets, forecasts, and resource allocation to achieve revenue, margin, and profitability targets. Identify improvement opportunities to enhance efficiency and reduce cost. Advance Technical Expertise & Innovation: Stay at the forefront of substation automation technologies, industry trends, competitor movements, and regulatory changes. Promote innovation and technology adoption across the HUB. Champion Quality, Safety & Compliance: Ensure operations comply with internal policies, industry standards, and European regulations. Promote a strong safety and quality culture across all teams and activities. Collaborate Across Functions: Partner with global product management, R&D, and other regional business units to share best practices, align strategies, and maximize value from the full Hitachi Energy portfolio. Lead & Develop High‑Performing Teams: Recruit, mentor, and empower a strong team of engineers, project managers, and commercial professionals. Foster a culture of collaboration, continuous learning, and operational excellence. Your Background Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Automation Engineering, or a related field; a Master's degree or MBA is an advantage. 10–15 years of experience in the power transmission and distribution industry, with deep expertise in substation automation systems, of which 5–7 years in a leadership role managing a business unit, department, or similar organization within a multinational environment. Strong technical knowledge across substation automation architectures, protective relaying, SCADA, control systems, IEC 61850, and cybersecurity for critical infrastructure. Proven success in business strategy execution, P&L management, contract negotiation, and complex project delivery and strong understanding of the European energy market, customer landscape, and regulatory environment. Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder‑management skills with the ability to influence across a matrix environment. Fluency in English is required; additional European languages are an asset.

titleByLocale.it: Gestione unità operativa per sistemi di automazione sottostazione - Europa
titleByLocale.en: Operating Unit Manager for Substation Automation Systems - Europe
titleByLocale.fr: Gestionnaire d'unité d'exploitation pour les systèmes d'automatisation des stations - Europe

descriptionByLocale.it: L'opportunità Come responsabile unità operativa per sistemi di automazione di sottostazione HUB Europe, si svolgerà un ruolo di leadership fondamentale nella definizione della direzione strategica, delle prestazioni e della crescita del nostro portafoglio di automazione di sottostazione in tutta la regione. Potrai supervisionare tutti gli aspetti commerciali, operativi e tecnici del HUB, garantendo l'eccellenza nell'esecuzione del progetto, nella soddisfazione del cliente e nei risultati aziendali. Questo ruolo riporta al Leader HUB e collabora a stretto contatto con i team globali di Product Management, R&D e cross-regional. La posizione è flessibile in Europa e sarà confermata nelle fasi successive. Questo ruolo richiede frequenti viaggi in Europa e occasionali viaggi internazionali. Come farete un Impact Drive Direzione Strategica & Business Growth: Sviluppare ed eseguire la strategia HUB in allineamento con gli obiettivi globali. Identificare le opportunità di mercato, espandere le relazioni con i clienti e aumentare le vendite in soluzioni di automazione sottostazione tra cui relè di protezione, SCADA, sistemi di controllo e tecnologie di comunicazione. Eccellenza Operativa Lead: supervisionare l'ingegneria, la consegna del progetto, il supporto di vendita e l'esecuzione dei servizi. Definire e monitorare i KPI per garantire operazioni efficienti, consegne puntuali, soddisfazione del cliente e prestazioni finanziarie forti. Rafforzare la presenza del cliente e del mercato: costruire e mantenere forti relazioni con i clienti, i partner e le parti interessate principali in tutta Europa. Rappresentare Hitachi Energy come esperto di materia tematica presso forum di settore e impegni dei clienti. Garantire prestazioni finanziarie: gestire budget, previsioni e allocazione delle risorse per raggiungere obiettivi di reddito, margine e redditività. Identificare opportunità di miglioramento per migliorare l'efficienza e ridurre i costi. Advance Technical Expertise & Innovation: Soggiorna all'avanguardia nelle tecnologie di automazione sottostazione, nelle tendenze del settore, nei movimenti dei concorrenti e nei cambiamenti normativi. Promuovere l'innovazione e l'adozione della tecnologia attraverso l'HUB. Qualità Campione, sicurezza e conformità: assicurarsi che le operazioni siano conformi alle politiche interne, agli standard del settore e alle normative europee. Promuovere una forte cultura della sicurezza e della qualità in tutte le squadre e le attività. Collabora con Across Functions: Partner con la gestione globale dei prodotti, R&D e altri business unit regionali per condividere le migliori pratiche, allineare le strategie e massimizzare il valore dal portafoglio completo di Hitachi Energy. Lead & Develop High-Performing Teams: Recruit, mentore, e rafforzare un forte team di ingegneri, project manager e professionisti commerciali. Promuovere una cultura di collaborazione, apprendimento continuo e eccellenza operativa. La tua laurea di primo livello in ingegneria elettrica, ingegneria dell'automazione, o un campo correlato; un master o MBA è un vantaggio. 10-15 anni di esperienza nel settore della trasmissione e della distribuzione di energia, con profonda esperienza nei sistemi di automazione di sottostazione, di cui 5-7 anni in un ruolo di leadership che gestisce un'unità aziendale, un dipartimento o un'organizzazione simile all'interno di un ambiente multinazionale. Forte conoscenza tecnica attraverso architetture di automazione di sottostazione, relè protettivo, SCADA, sistemi di controllo, IEC 61850 e sicurezza informatica per infrastrutture critiche. Risultato successo nell'esecuzione della strategia aziendale, nella gestione P&L, nella negoziazione dei contratti e nella fornitura di progetti complessi e nella forte comprensione del mercato europeo dell'energia, del paesaggio dei clienti e dell'ambiente normativo. Eccellente leadership, comunicazione e capacità di gestione degli stakeholder con la capacità di influenzare in un ambiente matrice. È richiesta una fluidità in inglese; le lingue europee aggiuntive sono un bene.

descriptionByLocale.de: Die Chance Als Operating Unit Manager für Substation Automation Systems HUB Europe spielen Sie eine zentrale Führungsrolle bei der Gestaltung der strategischen Richtung, Leistung und Wachstum unseres Substation Automation Portfolios in der gesamten Region. Sie werden alle kaufmännischen, operativen und technischen Aspekte der HUB beaufsichtigen, die für herausragende Leistungen bei der Projektdurchführung, Kundenzufriedenheit und Geschäftsergebnisse sorgen. Diese Rolle berichtet an den HUB-Leiter und arbeitet eng mit globalen Produktmanagement-, R&D- und überregionalen Teams zusammen. Der Standort ist in Europa flexibel und wird in späteren Phasen bestätigt. Diese Rolle erfordert häufige Reisen in Europa und gelegentliche internationale Reisen. Wie Sie einen Impact Drive Strategic Direction & Business Growth machen: Entwickeln und führen Sie die Strategie der HUB in Einklang mit globalen Zielen. Erkennen Sie Marktchancen, erweitern Sie Kundenbeziehungen und steigern Sie den Vertrieb in Umspannautomatisierungslösungen, einschließlich Schutzrelais, SCADA, Steuerungssysteme und Kommunikationstechnologien. Lead Operational Excellence: Übersehen Sie Engineering, Projektauslieferung, Vertriebsunterstützung und Serviceausführung. Definieren und verfolgen KPIs, um effizienten Betrieb, On-Time-Lieferung, Kundenzufriedenheit und starke Finanzleistung zu sichern. Kunden- und Marktpräsenz stärken: Erstellen und pflegen Sie starke Beziehungen zu Schlüsselkunden, Partnern und Interessenvertretern in ganz Europa. Vertreten Sie Hitachi Energy als Fachexperte in Branchenforen und Kundenengagements. Finanzielle Leistung gewährleisten: Budgets, Prognosen und Ressourcenzuweisung verwalten, um Einnahmen, Margen und Rentabilitätsziele zu erreichen. Erkennen Sie Verbesserungsmöglichkeiten, um Effizienz zu steigern und Kosten zu senken. Advance Technical Expertise & Innovation: Bleiben Sie an der Spitze der Umspanntechnik, Branchentrends, Wettbewerberbewegungen und regulatorischen Veränderungen. Förderung der Innovations- und Technologieakzeptanz im gesamten HUB. Champion Quality, Safety & Compliance: Stellen Sie sicher, dass die internen Richtlinien, Industriestandards und europäischen Vorschriften eingehalten werden. Fördern Sie eine starke Sicherheits- und Qualitätskultur in allen Teams und Aktivitäten. Verbundene Across-Funktionen: Partner mit globalem Produktmanagement, R&D und anderen regionalen Geschäftsbereichen, um Best Practices zu teilen, Strategien auszurichten und den Wert aus dem gesamten Hitachi Energy-Portfolio zu maximieren. Lead & Develop High‐Performing Teams: Rekrutieren, Mentor und stärken ein starkes Team von Ingenieuren, Projektmanagern und Profis. Eine Kultur der Zusammenarbeit, des kontinuierlichen Lernens und der operativen Exzellenz. Ihr Hintergrund Bachelor-Abschluss in Elektrotechnik, Automatisierungstechnik oder ein verwandten Bereich; ein Master-Abschluss oder MBA ist ein Vorteil. 10–15 Jahre Erfahrung in der Energieübertragungs- und Distributionsindustrie, mit tiefem Know-how in Umspannwerksautomatisierungssystemen, davon 5–7 Jahre in einer Führungsrolle, die eine Geschäftseinheit, Abteilung oder ähnliche Organisation innerhalb eines multinationalen Umfelds verwaltet. Starkes technisches Wissen über Umspannautomatisierungsarchitekturen, Schutzrelais, SCADA, Steuerungssysteme, IEC 61850 und Cybersicherheit für kritische Infrastruktur. Erprobter Erfolg bei der Umsetzung von Geschäftsstrategien, P&L-Management, Vertragsverhandlungen und komplexen Projektauslieferungen und starkem Verständnis des europäischen Energiemarktes, der Kundenlandschaft und des regulatorischen Umfelds. Ausgezeichnete Führungs-, Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Management-Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, über eine Matrix-Umgebung zu beeinflussen. Die Flut in Englisch ist erforderlich; zusätzliche europäische Sprachen sind ein Vermögenswert.
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'opportunité En tant que gestionnaire d'unité d'exploitation de Substation Automation Systems HUB Europe, vous jouerez un rôle de premier plan dans l'orientation stratégique, la performance et la croissance de notre portefeuille de Substation Automation dans toute la région. Vous superviserez tous les aspects commerciaux, opérationnels et techniques du HUB, assurant l'excellence dans l'exécution des projets, la satisfaction des clients et les résultats commerciaux. Ce rôle relève du chef de la DGPS et collabore étroitement avec les équipes mondiales de gestion des produits, de R-D et d'autres régions. L'emplacement est flexible en Europe et sera confirmé au cours des étapes ultérieures. Ce rôle exige des voyages fréquents en Europe et des voyages internationaux occasionnels. Comment vous ferez un impact Conduire l'orientation stratégique et la croissance des entreprises: Développer et exécuter la stratégie de la HUB en harmonie avec les objectifs globaux. Identifier les débouchés commerciaux, élargir les relations avec les clients et accroître les ventes dans les solutions d'automatisation des sous-stations, y compris les relais de protection, SCADA, les systèmes de contrôle et les technologies de communication. Excellence opérationnelle principale : Superviser l'ingénierie, la réalisation de projets, le soutien aux ventes et l'exécution des services. Définir et suivre les ICR pour assurer l'efficacité des opérations, la livraison dans les délais, la satisfaction de la clientèle et une bonne performance financière. Renforcer la présence du client et du marché : établir et maintenir des relations solides avec les principaux clients, partenaires et parties prenantes en Europe. Représenter Hitachi Energy en tant qu'expert dans les forums de l'industrie et les engagements des clients. Assurer le rendement financier : Gérer les budgets, les prévisions et l'affectation des ressources pour atteindre les objectifs de recettes, de marge et de rentabilité. Déterminer les possibilités d'amélioration pour accroître l'efficience et réduire les coûts. Expertise technique et innovation avancées : restez à l'avant-garde des technologies d'automatisation des sous-stations, des tendances de l'industrie, des mouvements de concurrents et des changements réglementaires. Promouvoir l'innovation et l'adoption de technologies dans l'ensemble du HUB. Champion Qualité, Sécurité et Conformité: Veiller à ce que les opérations soient conformes aux politiques internes, aux normes de l'industrie et aux réglementations européennes. Promouvoir une solide culture de sécurité et de qualité dans toutes les équipes et activités. Collaborer à l'échelle des fonctions : S'associer à la gestion des produits à l'échelle mondiale, à la R-D et à d'autres unités opérationnelles régionales pour partager les meilleures pratiques, harmoniser les stratégies et maximiser la valeur du portefeuille complet d'Hitachi Energy. Dirigez et développez des équipes à haut rendement : recrutez, mentorez et autonomisez une solide équipe d'ingénieurs, de gestionnaires de projets et de professionnels du commerce. Favoriser une culture de collaboration, d'apprentissage continu et d'excellence opérationnelle. Votre baccalauréat en génie électrique, en génie d'automatisation ou dans un domaine connexe; une maîtrise ou un MBA est un avantage. 10 à 15 ans d'expérience dans l'industrie du transport et de la distribution d'électricité, avec une expertise approfondie dans les systèmes d'automatisation des sous-stations, dont 5 à 7 ans dans un rôle de leadership de gestion d'une unité commerciale, d'un département ou d'une organisation similaire dans un environnement multinational. Forte connaissance technique des architectures d'automatisation des sous-stations, relais de protection, SCADA, systèmes de contrôle, CEI 61850 et cybersécurité pour les infrastructures essentielles. Succès prouvé dans l'exécution de la stratégie commerciale, la gestion de la P&L, la négociation de contrats, la réalisation de projets complexes et une bonne compréhension du marché européen de l'énergie, du paysage client et de l'environnement réglementaire. Excellent leadership, communication et compétences en gestion des intervenants avec la capacité d'influencer dans un environnement matriciel. La maîtrise de l'anglais est nécessaire; d'autres langues européennes sont un atout.

jobs.title: Senior R&D Electrical Engineer for Medium Frequency Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our Next Generation Grids Transformers team in Geneva and shape the future of energy. As a Senior R&D Electrical Engineer, you will work on cutting-edge transformer technologies in a dynamic, international environment. You'll be part of a collaborative team, contributing to the full R&D lifecycle—from concept to testing and product launch, ensuring that our solutions meet both technical specifications and market demands. This role offers hands-on experience, technical growth, and the chance to make a real impact in the energy transition. How you will make an impact Apply your knowledge of electromagnetism to support innovative concepts' validation through simulations Tackle a variety of engineering challenges on Medium Frequency Transformers Contribute to the development of new features in our internal design tools Organize prototyping and testing activities to validate new technologies\/products in collaboration with global teams Align your work with our strategic technology roadmap Take ownership of work packages and deliver results using a structured approach Deepen your understanding of transformer technologies and support internal consulting to optimize your R&D activities Contribute to intellectual property and risk management activities in R&D Your background MSc or PhD in Electrical or Electromechanical Engineering, ideally with experience in R&D within a business environment Knowledge of electromagnetism and circuit theory with ability to perform electromagnetic simulations Proficiency in MATLAB and\/or Python Strong communication skills in English (French is a plus) Analytical thinking and ability to work independently and collaboratively within interdisciplinary and international teams Awareness of business processes related to product development More about us We offer flexible working practices and a supportive environment where you can grow your skills and career. What you can expect from us Exciting career and training opportunities within Hitachi Energy Inclusive and diverse work culture Discounts on fitness memberships and various services Attractive pension benefits through our company pension fund
